authors_text: Sarah Fakhoury,Devjeet Roy,Harry Pines,Tyler Cleveland,Cole Peterson,Venera Arnaoudova,Bonita Sharif,Jonathan Maletic
title: gazel: Supporting Source Code Edits in Eye-Tracking Studies
title_zh: gelel：支持眼动追踪研究中的源代码编辑
abstract: Eye tracking tools are used in software engineering research to study various software development activities. However, a major limitation of these tools is their inability to track gaze data for activities that involve source code editing. We present a novel solution to support eye tracking experiments for tasks involving source code edits as an extension of the iTrace community infrastructure. We introduce the iTrace-Atom plugin and gazel -- a Python data processing pipeline that maps gaze information to changing source code elements and provides researchers with a way to query this dynamic data. iTrace-Atom is evaluated via a series of simulations and is over 99% accurate at high eye-tracking speeds of over 1,000Hz. iTrace and gazel completely revolutionize the way eye tracking studies are conducted in realistic settings with the presence of scrolling, context switching, and now editing. This opens the doors to support many day-to-day software engineering tasks such as bug fixing, adding new features, and refactoring.
summary: Eye tracking tools are used in software engineering research to study various software development activities. However, a major limitation of these tools is their inability to track gaze data for activities that involve source code editing. We present a novel solution to support eye tracking experiments for tasks involving source code edits as an extension of the iTrace community infrastructure. We introduce the iTrace-Atom plugin and gazel -- a Python data processing pipeline that maps gaze information to changing source code elements and provides researchers with a way to query this dynamic data. iTrace-Atom is evaluated via a series of simulations and is over 99% accurate at high eye-tracking speeds of over 1,000Hz. iTrace and gazel completely revolutionize the way eye tracking studies are conducted in realistic settings with the presence of scrolling, context switching, and now editing. This opens the doors to support many day-to-day software engineering tasks such as bug fixing, adding new features, and refactoring.
abstract_zh: 眼动追踪工具用于软件工程研究中，以研究各种软件开发活动。然而，这些工具的一个主要限制是它们无法跟踪涉及源代码编辑的活动的注视数据。我们提出了一种新颖的解决方案来支持涉及源代码编辑的任务的眼动追踪实验，作为 iTrace 社区基础设施的扩展。我们引入了 iTrace-Atom 插件和gazel——一个Python数据处理管道，它将注视信息映射到不断变化的源代码元素，并为研究人员提供了一种查询动态数据的方法。 iTrace-Atom 通过一系列模拟进行评估，在超过 1,000Hz 的高眼动追踪速度下准确率超过 99%。 iTrace 和 gelel 彻底改变了在现实环境中进行眼动追踪研究的方式，包括滚动、上下文切换和现在的编辑。这为支持许多日常软件工程任务（例如错误修复、添加新功能和重构）打开了大门。

AI.tldr: 本文提出gazel工具和iTrace-Atom插件，用于在源代码编辑任务中支持眼动追踪研究。
AI.motivation: 现有眼动追踪工具无法有效跟踪涉及源代码编辑的活动，限制了软件工程研究对日常开发任务（如调试、重构）的观察。
AI.method: 通过扩展iTrace社区基础设施，开发iTrace-Atom插件和Python数据处理管道gazel，将眼动数据映射到动态变化的代码元素，并通过高频率模拟验证准确性。
AI.result: iTrace-Atom在超过1,000Hz的追踪速度下达到99%以上的准确率，实现了包含滚动、上下文切换和编辑的现实场景眼动研究。
AI.conclusion: 该工具革新了眼动研究方法，使研究人员能够分析更贴近实际的软件开发活动，推动对代码编辑行为的深入理解。

title: Score-Based Explanations in Data Management and Machine Learning: An Answer-Set Programming Approach to Counterfactual Analysis
title_zh: 数据管理和机器学习中基于分数的解释：反事实分析的答案集编程方法
comment: Revised version for camera ready. Typos corrected, new references, and a new section with background material added. Paper associated to forthcoming short course at Fall School. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2007.12799
comments: Revised version for camera ready. Typos corrected, new references, and a new section with background material added. Paper associated to forthcoming short course at Fall School. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2007.12799
abstract: We describe some recent approaches to score-based explanations for query answers in databases and outcomes from classification models in machine learning. The focus is on work done by the author and collaborators. Special emphasis is placed on declarative approaches based on answer-set programming to the use of counterfactual reasoning for score specification and computation. Several examples that illustrate the flexibility of these methods are shown.
summary: We describe some recent approaches to score-based explanations for query answers in databases and outcomes from classification models in machine learning. The focus is on work done by the author and collaborators. Special emphasis is placed on declarative approaches based on answer-set programming to the use of counterfactual reasoning for score specification and computation. Several examples that illustrate the flexibility of these methods are shown.
abstract_zh: 我们描述了一些最新的方法，对数据库中的查询答案和机器学习中的分类模型的结果进行基于分数的解释。重点是作者和合作者所做的工作。特别强调基于答案集编程的声明性方法，以使用反事实推理进行分数指定和计算。显示了说明这些方法的灵活性的几个示例。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于答案集编程（ASP）的反事实分析方法，用于数据管理和机器学习中的评分解释。
AI.motivation: 传统解释方法难以灵活处理复杂查询和模型预测的可解释性需求，需更声明式的解决方案。
AI.method: 采用答案集编程框架，结合反事实推理机制，实现对数据库查询结果和分类模型评分的动态分析与解释。
AI.result: 通过多个案例验证了该方法在处理评分规范、反事实假设及复杂依赖关系时的灵活性和有效性。
AI.conclusion: ASP方法为跨领域评分解释提供了统一建模思路，未来可扩展至更多实际应用场景。

authors_text: Reza Bagherian Azhiri,Mohammad Esmaeili,Mohsen Jafarzadeh,Mehrdad Nourani
title: EMG Signal Classification Using Reflection Coefficients and Extreme Value Machine
title_zh: 使用反射系数和极值机对 EMG 信号进行分类
comment: Accepted for presentation in IEEE Biomedical Circuits and Systems Conference (BioCAS 2021)
comments: Accepted for presentation in IEEE Biomedical Circuits and Systems Conference (BioCAS 2021)
abstract: Electromyography is a promising approach to the gesture recognition of humans if an efficient classifier with high accuracy is available. In this paper, we propose to utilize Extreme Value Machine (EVM) as a high-performance algorithm for the classification of EMG signals. We employ reflection coefficients obtained from an Autoregressive (AR) model to train a set of classifiers. Our experimental results indicate that EVM has better accuracy in comparison to the conventional classifiers approved in the literature based on K-Nearest Neighbors (KNN) and Support Vector Machine (SVM).
summary: Electromyography is a promising approach to the gesture recognition of humans if an efficient classifier with high accuracy is available. In this paper, we propose to utilize Extreme Value Machine (EVM) as a high-performance algorithm for the classification of EMG signals. We employ reflection coefficients obtained from an Autoregressive (AR) model to train a set of classifiers. Our experimental results indicate that EVM has better accuracy in comparison to the conventional classifiers approved in the literature based on K-Nearest Neighbors (KNN) and Support Vector Machine (SVM).
abstract_zh: 如果有高精度的高效分类器，肌电图是一种很有前途的人类手势识别方法。在本文中，我们建议利用极值机（EVM）作为 EMG 信号分类的高性能算法。我们使用从自回归 (AR) 模型获得的反射系数来训练一组分类器。我们的实验结果表明，与文献中基于 K 最近邻 (KNN) 和支持向量机 (SVM) 的传统分类器相比，EVM 具有更好的准确性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用反射系数和极值机（EVM）对肌电信号（EMG）进行分类，以提高手势识别的准确性。
AI.motivation: 肌电信号在手势识别中具有潜力，但需高效且高精度的分类算法。传统分类器如KNN和SVM存在局限性，需探索更优方法。
AI.method: 通过自回归（AR）模型提取反射系数作为特征，结合极值机（EVM）构建分类器，并与KNN、SVM等传统方法对比实验。
AI.result: 实验表明，基于反射系数和EVM的分类器在准确率上优于KNN和SVM等传统分类算法。
AI.conclusion: 反射系数与极值机的结合为肌电信号分类提供了有效方案，相较于传统方法具有更高的分类精度。

title: VQA-Aid: Visual Question Answering for Post-Disaster Damage Assessment and Analysis
title_zh: VQA-Aid：用于灾后损害评估和分析的可视化问答
abstract: Visual Question Answering system integrated with Unmanned Aerial Vehicle (UAV) has a lot of potentials to advance the post-disaster damage assessment purpose. Providing assistance to affected areas is highly dependent on real-time data assessment and analysis. Scope of the Visual Question Answering is to understand the scene and provide query related answer which certainly faster the recovery process after any disaster. In this work, we address the importance of \textit{visual question answering (VQA)} task for post-disaster damage assessment by presenting our recently developed VQA dataset called \textit{HurMic-VQA} collected during hurricane Michael, and comparing the performances of baseline VQA models.
summary: Visual Question Answering system integrated with Unmanned Aerial Vehicle (UAV) has a lot of potentials to advance the post-disaster damage assessment purpose. Providing assistance to affected areas is highly dependent on real-time data assessment and analysis. Scope of the Visual Question Answering is to understand the scene and provide query related answer which certainly faster the recovery process after any disaster. In this work, we address the importance of \textit{visual question answering (VQA)} task for post-disaster damage assessment by presenting our recently developed VQA dataset called \textit{HurMic-VQA} collected during hurricane Michael, and comparing the performances of baseline VQA models.
abstract_zh: 与无人机（UAV）集成的视觉问答系统在推进灾后损失评估方面具有很大的潜力。向受影响地区提供援助高度依赖于实时数据评估和分析。视觉问答的范围是了解场景并提供与查询相关的答案，这肯定会加快灾难后的恢复过程。在这项工作中，我们通过展示我们最近开发的在迈克尔飓风期间收集的名为 \textit{HurMic-VQA} 的 VQA 数据集，并比较基线 VQA 模型的性能，解决了 \textit{视觉问答（VQA）} 任务对于灾后损失评估的重要性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合无人机与视觉问答（VQA）的系统，用于灾后损害评估，并构建了HurMic-VQA数据集以比较基线模型性能。
AI.motivation: 灾后恢复依赖实时数据分析，传统方法效率不足，需借助VQA技术加速损害评估过程。
AI.method: 整合无人机采集灾后图像，构建HurMic-VQA数据集，并测试多种基线VQA模型在该数据集上的表现。
AI.result: 实验结果验证了VQA模型在灾后图像问答任务中的有效性，突显了HurMic-VQA数据集的实用性。
AI.conclusion: VQA技术可显著提升灾后损害评估效率，所提出的数据集为相关研究提供了重要支持。

authors_text: Kevin Yang,Tianjun Zhang,Chris Cummins,Brandon Cui,Benoit Steiner,Linnan Wang,Joseph E. Gonzalez,Dan Klein,Yuandong Tian
title: Learning Space Partitions for Path Planning
title_zh: 用于路径规划的学习空间分区
abstract: Path planning, the problem of efficiently discovering high-reward trajectories, often requires optimizing a high-dimensional and multimodal reward function. Popular approaches like CEM and CMA-ES greedily focus on promising regions of the search space and may get trapped in local maxima. DOO and VOOT balance exploration and exploitation, but use space partitioning strategies independent of the reward function to be optimized. Recently, LaMCTS empirically learns to partition the search space in a reward-sensitive manner for black-box optimization. In this paper, we develop a novel formal regret analysis for when and why such an adaptive region partitioning scheme works. We also propose a new path planning method LaP3 which improves the function value estimation within each sub-region, and uses a latent representation of the search space. Empirically, LaP3 outperforms existing path planning methods in 2D navigation tasks, especially in the presence of difficult-to-escape local optima, and shows benefits when plugged into the planning components of model-based RL such as PETS. These gains transfer to highly multimodal real-world tasks, where we outperform strong baselines in compiler phase ordering by up to 39% on average across 9 tasks, and in molecular design by up to 0.4 on properties on a 0-1 scale. Code is available at https://github.com/yangkevin2/neurips2021-lap3.
summary: Path planning, the problem of efficiently discovering high-reward trajectories, often requires optimizing a high-dimensional and multimodal reward function. Popular approaches like CEM and CMA-ES greedily focus on promising regions of the search space and may get trapped in local maxima. DOO and VOOT balance exploration and exploitation, but use space partitioning strategies independent of the reward function to be optimized. Recently, LaMCTS empirically learns to partition the search space in a reward-sensitive manner for black-box optimization. In this paper, we develop a novel formal regret analysis for when and why such an adaptive region partitioning scheme works. We also propose a new path planning method LaP3 which improves the function value estimation within each sub-region, and uses a latent representation of the search space. Empirically, LaP3 outperforms existing path planning methods in 2D navigation tasks, especially in the presence of difficult-to-escape local optima, and shows benefits when plugged into the planning components of model-based RL such as PETS. These gains transfer to highly multimodal real-world tasks, where we outperform strong baselines in compiler phase ordering by up to 39% on average across 9 tasks, and in molecular design by up to 0.4 on properties on a 0-1 scale. Code is available at https://github.com/yangkevin2/neurips2021-lap3.
abstract_zh: 路径规划是有效发现高奖励轨迹的问题，通常需要优化高维和多模态奖励函数。 CEM 和 CMA-ES 等流行方法贪婪地关注搜索空间的有希望的区域，并可能陷入局部最大值。 DOO 和 VOOT 平衡探索和利用，但使用独立于要优化的奖励函数的空间划分策略。最近，LaMCTS 根据经验学习以奖励敏感的方式划分搜索空间以进行黑盒优化。在本文中，我们开发了一种新颖的形式遗憾分析，用于分析这种自适应区域划分方案何时以及为何起作用。我们还提出了一种新的路径规划方法 LaP3，它改进了每个子区域内的函数值估计，并使用搜索空间的潜在表示。根据经验，LaP3 在 2D 导航任务中优于现有的路径规划方法，尤其是在存在难以逃避局部最优的情况下，并且在插入基于模型的 RL 的规划组件（例如 PETS）时显示出优势。这些成果转移到了高度多模态的现实世界任务中，在这些任务中，我们在 9 项任务中的编译器阶段顺序平均优于强基线高达 39%，而在分子设计中，在 0-1 等级的属性上优于强基线高达 0.4。代码可在 https://github.com/yangkevin2/neurips2021-lap3 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为LaP3的路径规划方法，通过学习奖励敏感的空间划分策略来优化高维多模态奖励函数。
AI.motivation: 现有路径规划方法如CEM、CMA-ES易陷入局部最优，而DOO和VOOT的分区策略与奖励函数无关，LaMCTS虽奖励敏感但缺乏理论分析，需改进函数估计与空间表示。
AI.method: 开发了LaP3方法，通过改进子区域函数值估计并引入搜索空间的潜在表示，结合自适应区域划分策略进行优化。
AI.result: LaP3在2D导航任务中优于现有方法，尤其在逃离局部最优时表现突出，并在编译器阶段排序和分子设计任务中分别平均提升39%和0.4的性能。
AI.conclusion: LaP3通过奖励敏感的空间划分和潜在表示有效提升了路径规划性能，适用于复杂多模态实际问题。

title: Reversible Colour Density Compression of Images using cGANs
title_zh: 使用 cGAN 对图像进行可逆颜色密度压缩
abstract: Image compression using colour densities is historically impractical to decompress losslessly. We examine the use of conditional generative adversarial networks in making this transformation more feasible, through learning a mapping between the images and a loss function to train on. We show that this method is effective at producing visually lossless generations, indicating that efficient colour compression is viable.
summary: Image compression using colour densities is historically impractical to decompress losslessly. We examine the use of conditional generative adversarial networks in making this transformation more feasible, through learning a mapping between the images and a loss function to train on. We show that this method is effective at producing visually lossless generations, indicating that efficient colour compression is viable.
abstract_zh: 使用颜色密度的图像压缩在历史上对于无损解压是不切实际的。我们研究了条件生成对抗网络的使用，通过学习图像和要训练的损失函数之间的映射，使这种转换更加可行。我们证明这种方法可以有效地产生视觉无损的生成，这表明高效的颜色压缩是可行的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出使用条件生成对抗网络（cGANs）实现图像颜色密度的可逆压缩，通过学习图像与损失函数的映射关系，使压缩后能无损恢复图像。
AI.motivation: 传统颜色密度压缩方法难以实现无损解压，需探索更高效的图像压缩方案。
AI.method: 基于cGANs设计模型，通过训练学习图像与损失函数间的映射关系，实现颜色密度压缩与重建。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法能生成视觉无损的图像，验证了高效颜色压缩的可行性。
AI.conclusion: cGANs可有效解决颜色密度压缩的无损解压难题，为图像压缩提供了新思路。

title: Checking whether a word is Hamming-isometric in linear time
title_zh: 检查一个单词在线性时间内是否是汉明等距的
abstract: A finite word $f$ is Hamming-isometric if for any two word $u$ and $v$ of same length avoiding $f$, $u$ can be transformed into $v$ by changing one by one all the letters on which $u$ differs from $v$, in such a way that all of the new words obtained in this process also avoid~$f$. Words which are not Hamming-isometric have been characterized as words having a border with two mismatches. We derive from this characterization a linear-time algorithm to check whether a word is Hamming-isometric. It is based on pattern matching algorithms with $k$ mismatches. Lee-isometric words over a four-letter alphabet have been characterized as words having a border with two Lee-errors. We derive from this characterization a linear-time algorithm to check whether a word over an alphabet of size four is Lee-isometric.
summary: A finite word $f$ is Hamming-isometric if for any two word $u$ and $v$ of same length avoiding $f$, $u$ can be transformed into $v$ by changing one by one all the letters on which $u$ differs from $v$, in such a way that all of the new words obtained in this process also avoid~$f$. Words which are not Hamming-isometric have been characterized as words having a border with two mismatches. We derive from this characterization a linear-time algorithm to check whether a word is Hamming-isometric. It is based on pattern matching algorithms with $k$ mismatches. Lee-isometric words over a four-letter alphabet have been characterized as words having a border with two Lee-errors. We derive from this characterization a linear-time algorithm to check whether a word over an alphabet of size four is Lee-isometric.
abstract_zh: 有限词$f$是汉明等距的，如果对于任何两个相同长度的词$u$和$v$避开$f$，通过一一改变$u$与$v$不同的所有字母，$u$可以转化为$v$，这样在这个过程中获得的所有新词也避开~$f$。非汉明等距的单词被表征为具有两个不匹配的边界的单词。我们从这个特征中推导出一个线性时间算法来检查一个单词是否是汉明等距的。它基于具有 $k$ 不匹配的模式匹配算法。四字母字母表上的 Lee 等距单词被表征为具有两个 Lee 错误边框的单词。我们从这个特征中推导出线性时间算法来检查大小为 4 的字母表上的单词是否是 Lee 等距的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种线性时间算法，用于判断一个有限单词是否为Hamming等距单词。
AI.motivation: Hamming等距单词在字符串处理和模式匹配中具有重要性质，但此前缺乏高效的判定方法。本文旨在解决这一问题并扩展至Lee等距单词的判定。
AI.method: 基于已有的字符化结果（如单词存在两个错配边界的非等距特性），结合k错配模式匹配算法设计线性时间判定方法。
AI.result: 开发出可在O(n)时间内判定单词是否为Hamming等距的算法，并扩展至四元字母表的Lee等距判定。
AI.conclusion: 通过将理论特征转化为算法条件，实现了高效判定方法，为相关领域提供了实用工具。

title: Learning and Generalization in Overparameterized Normalizing Flows
title_zh: 过度参数化归一化流中的学习和泛化
abstract: In supervised learning, it is known that overparameterized neural networks with one hidden layer provably and efficiently learn and generalize, when trained using stochastic gradient descent with a sufficiently small learning rate and suitable initialization. In contrast, the benefit of overparameterization in unsupervised learning is not well understood. Normalizing flows (NFs) constitute an important class of models in unsupervised learning for sampling and density estimation. In this paper, we theoretically and empirically analyze these models when the underlying neural network is a one-hidden-layer overparametrized network. Our main contributions are two-fold: (1) On the one hand, we provide theoretical and empirical evidence that for constrained NFs (this class of NFs underlies many NF constructions) with the one-hidden-layer network, overparametrization hurts training. (2) On the other hand, we prove that unconstrained NFs, a recently introduced model, can efficiently learn any reasonable data distribution under minimal assumptions when the underlying network is overparametrized and has one hidden-layer.
summary: In supervised learning, it is known that overparameterized neural networks with one hidden layer provably and efficiently learn and generalize, when trained using stochastic gradient descent with a sufficiently small learning rate and suitable initialization. In contrast, the benefit of overparameterization in unsupervised learning is not well understood. Normalizing flows (NFs) constitute an important class of models in unsupervised learning for sampling and density estimation. In this paper, we theoretically and empirically analyze these models when the underlying neural network is a one-hidden-layer overparametrized network. Our main contributions are two-fold: (1) On the one hand, we provide theoretical and empirical evidence that for constrained NFs (this class of NFs underlies many NF constructions) with the one-hidden-layer network, overparametrization hurts training. (2) On the other hand, we prove that unconstrained NFs, a recently introduced model, can efficiently learn any reasonable data distribution under minimal assumptions when the underlying network is overparametrized and has one hidden-layer.
abstract_zh: 在监督学习中，众所周知，当使用具有足够小的学习率和适当的初始化的随机梯度下降进行训练时，具有一个隐藏层的过参数化神经网络可以证明且有效地学习和泛化。相比之下，无监督学习中过度参数化的好处还没有得到很好的理解。归一化流（NF）构成了采样和密度估计的无监督学习中的一类重要模型。在本文中，当底层神经网络是单隐层超参数化网络时，我们从理论上和实证上分析了这些模型。我们的主要贡献有两个：（1）一方面，我们提供了理论和经验证据，表明对于具有单隐藏层网络的约束 NF（此类 NF 是许多 NF 结构的基础），过度参数化会损害训练。 (2) 另一方面，我们证明，当底层网络过度参数化并且具有一个隐藏层时，无约束 NF（一种最近引入的模型）可以在最小假设下有效地学习任何合理的数据分布。

AI.tldr: 本文分析了过参数化归一化流模型（NFs）在无监督学习中的学习与泛化能力，重点探讨受限与无约束NFs在单隐藏层网络下的表现差异。
AI.motivation: 监督学习中过参数化神经网络已被证明有效，但无监督学习中NFs的过参数化优势尚不明确，需理论与实证分析以填补这一空白。
AI.method: 通过理论证明与实验验证，分别研究受限NFs和无约束NFs在单隐藏层过参数化网络下的训练与学习能力。
AI.result: 受限NFs的过参数化会损害训练效果，而无约束NFs在合理假设下可高效学习任意数据分布。
AI.conclusion: 过参数化对NFs的影响取决于模型结构，无约束NFs在理论保证下具有更强的学习能力，为后续研究提供方向。

title: Learning to Reach, Swim, Walk and Fly in One Trial: Data-Driven Control with Scarce Data and Side Information
title_zh: 在一次试验中学习伸手、游泳、行走和飞行：利用稀缺数据和辅助信息进行数据驱动控制
abstract: We develop a learning-based control algorithm for unknown dynamical systems under very severe data limitations. Specifically, the algorithm has access to streaming and noisy data only from a single and ongoing trial. It accomplishes such performance by effectively leveraging various forms of side information on the dynamics to reduce the sample complexity. Such side information typically comes from elementary laws of physics and qualitative properties of the system. More precisely, the algorithm approximately solves an optimal control problem encoding the system's desired behavior. To this end, it constructs and iteratively refines a data-driven differential inclusion that contains the unknown vector field of the dynamics. The differential inclusion, used in an interval Taylor-based method, enables to over-approximate the set of states the system may reach. Theoretically, we establish a bound on the suboptimality of the approximate solution with respect to the optimal control with known dynamics. We show that the longer the trial or the more side information is available, the tighter the bound. Empirically, experiments in a high-fidelity F-16 aircraft simulator and MuJoCo's environments illustrate that, despite the scarcity of data, the algorithm can provide performance comparable to reinforcement learning algorithms trained over millions of environment interactions. Besides, we show that the algorithm outperforms existing techniques combining system identification and model predictive control.
summary: We develop a learning-based control algorithm for unknown dynamical systems under very severe data limitations. Specifically, the algorithm has access to streaming and noisy data only from a single and ongoing trial. It accomplishes such performance by effectively leveraging various forms of side information on the dynamics to reduce the sample complexity. Such side information typically comes from elementary laws of physics and qualitative properties of the system. More precisely, the algorithm approximately solves an optimal control problem encoding the system's desired behavior. To this end, it constructs and iteratively refines a data-driven differential inclusion that contains the unknown vector field of the dynamics. The differential inclusion, used in an interval Taylor-based method, enables to over-approximate the set of states the system may reach. Theoretically, we establish a bound on the suboptimality of the approximate solution with respect to the optimal control with known dynamics. We show that the longer the trial or the more side information is available, the tighter the bound. Empirically, experiments in a high-fidelity F-16 aircraft simulator and MuJoCo's environments illustrate that, despite the scarcity of data, the algorithm can provide performance comparable to reinforcement learning algorithms trained over millions of environment interactions. Besides, we show that the algorithm outperforms existing techniques combining system identification and model predictive control.
abstract_zh: 我们为非常严格的数据限制下的未知动力系统开发了一种基于学习的控制算法。具体来说，该算法只能访问来自单个持续试验的流数据和噪声数据。它通过有效地利用各种形式的动态辅助信息来降低样本复杂性来实现这样的性能。此类辅助信息通常来自物理基本定律和系统的定性特性。更准确地说，该算法近似解决了编码系统所需行为的最优控制问题。为此，它构建并迭代地细化了数据驱动的微分包含，其中包含动力学的未知向量场。基于区间泰勒的方法中使用的微分包含能够过度近似系统可能达到的状态集。理论上，我们对已知动力学的最优控制的近似解的次优性建立了界限。我们表明，试验时间越长或可用的辅助信息越多，界限就越紧。根据经验，在高保真 F-16 飞机模拟器和 MuJoCo 环境中进行的实验表明，尽管数据稀缺，但该算法可以提供与经过数百万次环境交互训练的强化学习算法相当的性能。此外，我们表明该算法优于结合系统识别和模型预测控制的现有技术。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于数据驱动的控制算法，在数据极度稀缺的情况下，通过利用系统动力学的侧信息（如物理定律和系统性质）来实现对未知动态系统的有效控制。
AI.motivation: 传统控制方法在数据稀缺时难以有效学习系统动力学，而强化学习需要大量交互数据。本文旨在开发一种在单次试验中仅使用流数据和侧信息即可实现高性能控制的算法。
AI.method: 算法通过构建并迭代优化数据驱动的微分包含（differential inclusion），结合区间泰勒方法近似系统可达状态集，同时利用侧信息降低样本复杂度，最终求解近似最优控制问题。
AI.result: 在F-16飞行模拟器和MuJoCo环境中，算法在数据稀缺条件下表现优于传统模型预测控制与系统辨识结合的方法，且性能接近需数百万次交互的强化学习算法。
AI.conclusion: 通过有效利用侧信息和微分包含的理论框架，本文方法在数据极度有限时仍能实现高精度控制，为实际工程中的稀疏数据控制问题提供了新思路。

search_text: Learning to Reach, Swim, Walk and Fly in One Trial: Data-Driven Control with Scarce Data and Side Information 在一次试验中学习伸手、游泳、行走和飞行：利用稀缺数据和辅助信息进行数据驱动控制 We develop a learning-based control algorithm for unknown dynamical systems under very severe data limitations. Specifically, the algorithm has access to streaming and noisy data only from a single and ongoing trial. It accomplishes such performance by effectively leveraging various forms of side information on the dynamics to reduce the sample complexity. Such side information typically comes from elementary laws of physics and qualitative properties of the system. More precisely, the algorithm approximately solves an optimal control problem encoding the system's desired behavior. To this end, it constructs and iteratively refines a data-driven differential inclusion that contains the unknown vector field of the dynamics. The differential inclusion, used in an interval Taylor-based method, enables to over-approximate the set of states the system may reach. Theoretically, we establish a bound on the suboptimality of the approximate solution with respect to the optimal control with known dynamics. We show that the longer the trial or the more side information is available, the tighter the bound. Empirically, experiments in a high-fidelity F-16 aircraft simulator and MuJoCo's environments illustrate that, despite the scarcity of data, the algorithm can provide performance comparable to reinforcement learning algorithms trained over millions of environment interactions. Besides, we show that the algorithm outperforms existing techniques combining system identification and model predictive control. 我们为非常严格的数据限制下的未知动力系统开发了一种基于学习的控制算法。具体来说，该算法只能访问来自单个持续试验的流数据和噪声数据。它通过有效地利用各种形式的动态辅助信息来降低样本复杂性来实现这样的性能。此类辅助信息通常来自物理基本定律和系统的定性特性。更准确地说，该算法近似解决了编码系统所需行为的最优控制问题。为此，它构建并迭代地细化了数据驱动的微分包含，其中包含动力学的未知向量场。基于区间泰勒的方法中使用的微分包含能够过度近似系统可能达到的状态集。理论上，我们对已知动力学的最优控制的近似解的次优性建立了界限。我们表明，试验时间越长或可用的辅助信息越多，界限就越紧。根据经验，在高保真 F-16 飞机模拟器和 MuJoCo 环境中进行的实验表明，尽管数据稀缺，但该算法可以提供与经过数百万次环境交互训练的强化学习算法相当的性能。此外，我们表明该算法优于结合系统识别和模型预测控制的现有技术。 本文提出一种基于数据驱动的控制算法，在数据极度稀缺的情况下，通过利用系统动力学的侧信息（如物理定律和系统性质）来实现对未知动态系统的有效控制。 Franck Djeumou,Ufuk Topcu eess.SY,cs.LG,cs.RO,math.OC

title: QUBO transformation using Eigenvalue Decomposition
title_zh: 使用特征值分解的 QUBO 变换
abstract: Quadratic Unconstrained Binary Optimization (QUBO) is a general-purpose modeling framework for combinatorial optimization problems and is a requirement for quantum annealers. This paper utilizes the eigenvalue decomposition of the underlying Q matrix to alter and improve the search process by extracting the information from dominant eigenvalues and eigenvectors to implicitly guide the search towards promising areas of the solution landscape. Computational results on benchmark datasets illustrate the efficacy of our routine demonstrating significant performance improvements on problems with dominant eigenvalues.
summary: Quadratic Unconstrained Binary Optimization (QUBO) is a general-purpose modeling framework for combinatorial optimization problems and is a requirement for quantum annealers. This paper utilizes the eigenvalue decomposition of the underlying Q matrix to alter and improve the search process by extracting the information from dominant eigenvalues and eigenvectors to implicitly guide the search towards promising areas of the solution landscape. Computational results on benchmark datasets illustrate the efficacy of our routine demonstrating significant performance improvements on problems with dominant eigenvalues.
abstract_zh: 二次无约束二元优化 (QUBO) 是用于组合优化问题的通用建模框架，也是量子退火器的要求。本文利用基础 Q 矩阵的特征值分解，通过从主导特征值和特征向量中提取信息来改变和改进搜索过程，以隐式引导搜索到解决方案景观的有希望的区域。基准数据集的计算结果说明了我们例程的有效性，证明了对具有主导特征值的问题的显着性能改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用Q矩阵的特征值分解对QUBO问题进行转换，以优化量子退火器的求解过程。
AI.motivation: 传统QUBO求解方法在存在主导特征值的问题上效率不足，需通过特征信息引导搜索方向以提升性能。
AI.method: 通过分解Q矩阵的特征值与特征向量，提取主导成分并隐式引导搜索过程，改进量子退火器的优化路径。
AI.result: 在基准数据集测试中，该方法在具有显著主导特征值的问题上展现出明显性能提升。
AI.conclusion: 特征值分解方法能有效优化QUBO求解，尤其适用于存在主导特征值的场景，具有进一步研究价值。

authors_text: Tianrui Liu,Qingjie Meng,Jun-Jie Huang,Athanasios Vlontzos,Daniel Rueckert,Bernhard Kainz
title: Video Summarization through Reinforcement Learning with a 3D Spatio-Temporal U-Net
title_zh: 使用 3D 时空 U-Net 通过强化学习进行视频摘要
abstract: Intelligent video summarization algorithms allow to quickly convey the most relevant information in videos through the identification of the most essential and explanatory content while removing redundant video frames. In this paper, we introduce the 3DST-UNet-RL framework for video summarization. A 3D spatio-temporal U-Net is used to efficiently encode spatio-temporal information of the input videos for downstream reinforcement learning (RL). An RL agent learns from spatio-temporal latent scores and predicts actions for keeping or rejecting a video frame in a video summary. We investigate if real/inflated 3D spatio-temporal CNN features are better suited to learn representations from videos than commonly used 2D image features. Our framework can operate in both, a fully unsupervised mode and a supervised training mode. We analyse the impact of prescribed summary lengths and show experimental evidence for the effectiveness of 3DST-UNet-RL on two commonly used general video summarization benchmarks. We also applied our method on a medical video summarization task. The proposed video summarization method has the potential to save storage costs of ultrasound screening videos as well as to increase efficiency when browsing patient video data during retrospective analysis or audit without loosing essential information
summary: Intelligent video summarization algorithms allow to quickly convey the most relevant information in videos through the identification of the most essential and explanatory content while removing redundant video frames. In this paper, we introduce the 3DST-UNet-RL framework for video summarization. A 3D spatio-temporal U-Net is used to efficiently encode spatio-temporal information of the input videos for downstream reinforcement learning (RL). An RL agent learns from spatio-temporal latent scores and predicts actions for keeping or rejecting a video frame in a video summary. We investigate if real/inflated 3D spatio-temporal CNN features are better suited to learn representations from videos than commonly used 2D image features. Our framework can operate in both, a fully unsupervised mode and a supervised training mode. We analyse the impact of prescribed summary lengths and show experimental evidence for the effectiveness of 3DST-UNet-RL on two commonly used general video summarization benchmarks. We also applied our method on a medical video summarization task. The proposed video summarization method has the potential to save storage costs of ultrasound screening videos as well as to increase efficiency when browsing patient video data during retrospective analysis or audit without loosing essential information
abstract_zh: 智能视频摘要算法可以通过识别最重要和最具解释性的内容来快速传达视频中最相关的信息，同时删除冗余的视频帧。在本文中，我们介绍了用于视频摘要的 3DST-UNet-RL 框架。 3D 时空 U-Net 用于有效编码输入视频的时空信息，用于下游强化学习 (RL)。强化学习代理从时空潜在分数中学习，并预测在视频摘要中保留或拒绝视频帧的操作。我们研究真实/膨胀的 3D 时空 CNN 特征是否比常用的 2D 图像特征更适合从视频中学习表示。我们的框架可以在完全无监督模式和监督训练模式下运行。我们分析了规定摘要长度的影响，并展示了 3DST-UNet-RL 在两个常用的通用视频摘要基准上有效性的实验证据。我们还将我们的方法应用于医学视频摘要任务。所提出的视频摘要方法有可能节省超声筛查视频的存储成本，并提高在回顾性分析或审核期间浏览患者视频数据时的效率，而不会丢失基本信息

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于3D时空U-Net和强化学习的视频摘要框架3DST-UNet-RL，通过编码时空信息并利用强化学习预测关键帧，实现视频内容的高效摘要生成。
AI.motivation: 传统视频摘要方法依赖2D图像特征，难以捕捉时空动态信息。本文旨在探索3D时空CNN特征是否优于2D特征，并开发一种可同时支持无监督和有监督模式的通用视频摘要框架。
AI.method: 采用3D时空U-Net编码器提取视频时空特征，通过强化学习代理根据时空潜在特征预测帧保留或剔除动作，对比真实/膨胀3D特征与2D特征的表示能力，支持两种训练模式。
AI.result: 在通用视频摘要基准和医疗视频任务中验证有效性，实验表明该方法在保持关键信息的同时减少存储成本，提升回溯分析效率。
AI.conclusion: 3DST-UNet-RL框架证明了3D时空特征在视频摘要中的优势，其无监督与有监督模式的灵活性及跨领域适用性为视频分析提供了新方向。

title: A Max-Min Entropy Framework for Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 强化学习的最大-最小熵框架
abstract: In this paper, we propose a max-min entropy framework for reinforcement learning (RL) to overcome the limitation of the soft actor-critic (SAC) algorithm implementing the maximum entropy RL in model-free sample-based learning. Whereas the maximum entropy RL guides learning for policies to reach states with high entropy in the future, the proposed max-min entropy framework aims to learn to visit states with low entropy and maximize the entropy of these low-entropy states to promote better exploration. For general Markov decision processes (MDPs), an efficient algorithm is constructed under the proposed max-min entropy framework based on disentanglement of exploration and exploitation. Numerical results show that the proposed algorithm yields drastic performance improvement over the current state-of-the-art RL algorithms.
summary: In this paper, we propose a max-min entropy framework for reinforcement learning (RL) to overcome the limitation of the soft actor-critic (SAC) algorithm implementing the maximum entropy RL in model-free sample-based learning. Whereas the maximum entropy RL guides learning for policies to reach states with high entropy in the future, the proposed max-min entropy framework aims to learn to visit states with low entropy and maximize the entropy of these low-entropy states to promote better exploration. For general Markov decision processes (MDPs), an efficient algorithm is constructed under the proposed max-min entropy framework based on disentanglement of exploration and exploitation. Numerical results show that the proposed algorithm yields drastic performance improvement over the current state-of-the-art RL algorithms.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种用于强化学习（RL）的最大最小熵框架，以克服在无模型基于样本的学习中实现最大熵RL的软演员批评家（SAC）算法的局限性。最大熵强化学习指导学习未来达到高熵状态的策略，而所提出的最大-最小熵框架旨在学习访问低熵状态并最大化这些低熵状态的熵以促进更好的探索。对于一般马尔可夫决策过程（MDP），在所提出的基于探索和利用解开的最大-最小熵框架下构造了一种有效的算法。数值结果表明，所提出的算法比当前最先进的强化学习算法具有显着的性能改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种最大-最小熵框架用于强化学习，以改进软演员评论家（SAC）算法在无模型样本学习中的局限性。
AI.motivation: 现有最大熵RL方法引导策略趋向高熵状态，但可能忽视低熵状态的探索，而低熵状态的优化对复杂任务至关重要。
AI.method: 构建最大-最小熵框架，通过分离探索与利用，使策略在访问低熵状态的同时最大化其熵值，促进更高效的探索。
AI.result: 数值实验表明，该算法在性能上显著优于当前最先进的强化学习算法。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过平衡低熵状态探索与熵最大化，有效提升了强化学习的性能，为复杂任务提供了新思路。

authors_text: Ke Chen,Yufei Li,Yingfeng Chen,Changjie Fan,Zhipeng Hu,Wei Yang
title: GLIB: Towards Automated Test Oracle for Graphically-Rich Applications
title_zh: GLIB：针对图形丰富的应用程序实现 Oracle 自动化测试
abstract: Graphically-rich applications such as games are ubiquitous with attractive visual effects of Graphical User Interface (GUI) that offers a bridge between software applications and end-users. However, various types of graphical glitches may arise from such GUI complexity and have become one of the main component of software compatibility issues. Our study on bug reports from game development teams in NetEase Inc. indicates that graphical glitches frequently occur during the GUI rendering and severely degrade the quality of graphically-rich applications such as video games. Existing automated testing techniques for such applications focus mainly on generating various GUI test sequences and check whether the test sequences can cause crashes. These techniques require constant human attention to captures non-crashing bugs such as bugs causing graphical glitches. In this paper, we present the first step in automating the test oracle for detecting non-crashing bugs in graphically-rich applications. Specifically, we propose \texttt{GLIB} based on a code-based data augmentation technique to detect game GUI glitches. We perform an evaluation of \texttt{GLIB} on 20 real-world game apps (with bug reports available) and the result shows that \texttt{GLIB} can achieve 100\% precision and 99.5\% recall in detecting non-crashing bugs such as game GUI glitches. Practical application of \texttt{GLIB} on another 14 real-world games (without bug reports) further demonstrates that \texttt{GLIB} can effectively uncover GUI glitches, with 48 of 53 bugs reported by \texttt{GLIB} having been confirmed and fixed so far.
summary: Graphically-rich applications such as games are ubiquitous with attractive visual effects of Graphical User Interface (GUI) that offers a bridge between software applications and end-users. However, various types of graphical glitches may arise from such GUI complexity and have become one of the main component of software compatibility issues. Our study on bug reports from game development teams in NetEase Inc. indicates that graphical glitches frequently occur during the GUI rendering and severely degrade the quality of graphically-rich applications such as video games. Existing automated testing techniques for such applications focus mainly on generating various GUI test sequences and check whether the test sequences can cause crashes. These techniques require constant human attention to captures non-crashing bugs such as bugs causing graphical glitches. In this paper, we present the first step in automating the test oracle for detecting non-crashing bugs in graphically-rich applications. Specifically, we propose \texttt{GLIB} based on a code-based data augmentation technique to detect game GUI glitches. We perform an evaluation of \texttt{GLIB} on 20 real-world game apps (with bug reports available) and the result shows that \texttt{GLIB} can achieve 100\% precision and 99.5\% recall in detecting non-crashing bugs such as game GUI glitches. Practical application of \texttt{GLIB} on another 14 real-world games (without bug reports) further demonstrates that \texttt{GLIB} can effectively uncover GUI glitches, with 48 of 53 bugs reported by \texttt{GLIB} having been confirmed and fixed so far.
abstract_zh: 游戏等图形丰富的应用程序无处不在，图形用户界面 (GUI) 具有吸引人的视觉效果，在软件应用程序和最终用户之间架起了一座桥梁。然而，这种 GUI 的复杂性可能会引起各种类型的图形故障，并已成为软件兼容性问题的主要组成部分之一。我们对网易公司游戏开发团队的错误报告进行的研究表明，GUI 渲染过程中经常出现图形故障，严重降低了视频游戏等图形丰富的应用程序的质量。现有的针对此类应用程序的自动化测试技术主要集中于生成各种GUI测试序列并检查测试序列是否会导致崩溃。这些技术需要持续的人工关注来捕获非崩溃错误，例如导致图形故障的错误。在本文中，我们介绍了自动化测试预言机的第一步，用于检测图形丰富的应用程序中的非崩溃错误。具体来说，我们提出基于基于代码的数据增强技术的 \texttt{GLIB} 来检测游戏 GUI 故障。我们对 20 个真实游戏应用程序（提供错误报告）对 \texttt{GLIB} 进行了评估，结果表明 \texttt{GLIB} 在检测游戏 GUI 故障等非崩溃错误时可以实现 100\% 的精度和 99.5\% 的召回率。 \texttt{GLIB} 在另外 14 个真实游戏（没有错误报告）上的实际应用进一步证明 \texttt{GLIB} 可以有效地发现 GUI 故障，目前 \texttt{GLIB} 报告的 53 个错误中有 48 个已得到确认和修复。

AI.tldr: 本文提出GLIB，一种用于图形丰富应用（如游戏）的自动化测试工具，旨在检测非崩溃类图形界面（GUI）故障。
AI.motivation: 现有自动化测试技术主要关注崩溃检测，而图形丰富应用中的非崩溃图形故障（如渲染异常）难以被发现，且严重影响软件质量。
AI.method: 基于代码驱动的数据增强技术，GLIB通过分析GUI渲染逻辑自动识别图形故障，无需人工干预即可捕捉非崩溃类缺陷。
AI.result: 在20个含已知缺陷的游戏中，GLIB实现100%精确率和99.5%召回率；在14个无缺陷报告的游戏中，发现的53个缺陷中48个被确认并修复。
AI.conclusion: GLIB有效解决了图形丰富应用中非崩溃GUI故障的自动化检测难题，显著提升测试效率与缺陷发现能力。

These techniques require constant human attention to captures non-crashing bugs such as bugs causing graphical glitches. In this paper, we present the first step in automating the test oracle for detecting non-crashing bugs in graphically-rich applications. Specifically, we propose \texttt{GLIB} based on a code-based data augmentation technique to detect game GUI glitches. Practical application of \texttt{GLIB} on another 14 real-world games (without bug reports) further demonstrates that \texttt{GLIB} can effectively uncover GUI glitches, with 48 of 53 bugs reported by \texttt{GLIB} having been confirmed and fixed so far. 游戏等图形丰富的应用程序无处不在，图形用户界面 (GUI) 具有吸引人的视觉效果，在软件应用程序和最终用户之间架起了一座桥梁。然而，这种 GUI 的复杂性可能会引起各种类型的图形故障，并已成为软件兼容性问题的主要组成部分之一。我们对网易公司游戏开发团队的错误报告进行的研究表明，GUI 渲染过程中经常出现图形故障，严重降低了视频游戏等图形丰富的应用程序的质量。现有的针对此类应用程序的自动化测试技术主要集中于生成各种GUI测试序列并检查测试序列是否会导致崩溃。这些技术需要持续的人工关注来捕获非崩溃错误，例如导致图形故障的错误。在本文中，我们介绍了自动化测试预言机的第一步，用于检测图形丰富的应用程序中的非崩溃错误。具体来说，我们提出基于基于代码的数据增强技术的 \texttt{GLIB} 来检测游戏 GUI 故障。我们对 20 个真实游戏应用程序（提供错误报告）对 \texttt{GLIB} 进行了评估，结果表明 \texttt{GLIB} 在检测游戏 GUI 故障等非崩溃错误时可以实现 100\% 的精度和 99.5\% 的召回率。 \texttt{GLIB} 在另外 14 个真实游戏（没有错误报告）上的实际应用进一步证明 \texttt{GLIB} 可以有效地发现 GUI 故障，目前 \texttt{GLIB} 报告的 53 个错误中有 48 个已得到确认和修复。 本文提出GLIB，一种用于图形丰富应用（如游戏）的自动化测试工具，旨在检测非崩溃类图形界面（GUI）故障。 Ke Chen,Yufei Li,Yingfeng Chen,Changjie Fan,Zhipeng Hu,Wei Yang cs.SE,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Yichao Yan,Jinpeng Li,Shengcai Liao,Jie Qin,Bingbing Ni,Xiaokang Yang,Ling Shao
title: Exploring Visual Context for Weakly Supervised Person Search
title_zh: 探索弱监督人员搜索的视觉上下文
abstract: Person search has recently emerged as a challenging task that jointly addresses pedestrian detection and person re-identification. Existing approaches follow a fully supervised setting where both bounding box and identity annotations are available. However, annotating identities is labor-intensive, limiting the practicability and scalability of current frameworks. This paper inventively considers weakly supervised person search with only bounding box annotations. We proposed to address this novel task by investigating three levels of context clues (i.e., detection, memory and scene) in unconstrained natural images. The first two are employed to promote local and global discriminative capabilities, while the latter enhances clustering accuracy. Despite its simple design, our CGPS achieves 80.0% in mAP on CUHK-SYSU, boosting the baseline model by 8.8%. Surprisingly, it even achieves comparable performance with several supervised person search models. Our code is available at https://github.com/ljpadam/CGPS
summary: Person search has recently emerged as a challenging task that jointly addresses pedestrian detection and person re-identification. Existing approaches follow a fully supervised setting where both bounding box and identity annotations are available. However, annotating identities is labor-intensive, limiting the practicability and scalability of current frameworks. This paper inventively considers weakly supervised person search with only bounding box annotations. We proposed to address this novel task by investigating three levels of context clues (i.e., detection, memory and scene) in unconstrained natural images. The first two are employed to promote local and global discriminative capabilities, while the latter enhances clustering accuracy. Despite its simple design, our CGPS achieves 80.0% in mAP on CUHK-SYSU, boosting the baseline model by 8.8%. Surprisingly, it even achieves comparable performance with several supervised person search models. Our code is available at https://github.com/ljpadam/CGPS
abstract_zh: 人员搜索最近成为一项具有挑战性的任务，它共同解决行人检测和人员重新识别问题。现有的方法遵循完全监督的设置，其中边界框和身份注释都可用。然而，注释身份是劳动密集型的，限制了当前框架的实用性和可扩展性。本文创造性地考虑仅使用边界框注释的弱监督人员搜索。我们建议通过研究不受约束的自然图像中的三个级别的上下文线索（即检测、记忆和场景）来解决这项新颖的任务。前两者用于提高局部和全局判别能力，而后者则提高聚类准确性。尽管设计简单，我们的 CGPS 在 CUHK-SYSU 上的 mAP 达到了 80.0%，将基线模型提高了 8.8%。令人惊讶的是，它甚至达到了与几个有监督的人员搜索模型相当的性能。我们的代码位于 https://github.com/ljpadam/CGPS

AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖耗时的身份标注，限制了人物搜索模型的实用性和扩展性，需探索弱监督解决方案。
AI.method: 提出CGPS方法，利用检测、记忆和场景三级视觉上下文线索，增强局部判别性、全局聚类准确性和场景适应性。
AI.result: 在CUHK-SYSU数据集上达到80.0% mAP，较基线提升8.8%，性能接近部分监督模型。
AI.conclusion: 弱监督下通过多级视觉上下文建模可有效提升人物搜索性能，验证了方法的有效性并开源代码。

search_text: Exploring Visual Context for Weakly Supervised Person Search 探索弱监督人员搜索的视觉上下文 Person search has recently emerged as a challenging task that jointly addresses pedestrian detection and person re-identification. Existing approaches follow a fully supervised setting where both bounding box and identity annotations are available. However, annotating identities is labor-intensive, limiting the practicability and scalability of current frameworks. This paper inventively considers weakly supervised person search with only bounding box annotations. We proposed to address this novel task by investigating three levels of context clues (i.e., detection, memory and scene) in unconstrained natural images. The first two are employed to promote local and global discriminative capabilities, while the latter enhances clustering accuracy. Despite its simple design, our CGPS achieves 80.0% in mAP on CUHK-SYSU, boosting the baseline model by 8.8%. Surprisingly, it even achieves comparable performance with several supervised person search models. Our code is available at https://github.com/ljpadam/CGPS 人员搜索最近成为一项具有挑战性的任务，它共同解决行人检测和人员重新识别问题。现有的方法遵循完全监督的设置，其中边界框和身份注释都可用。然而，注释身份是劳动密集型的，限制了当前框架的实用性和可扩展性。本文创造性地考虑仅使用边界框注释的弱监督人员搜索。我们建议通过研究不受约束的自然图像中的三个级别的上下文线索（即检测、记忆和场景）来解决这项新颖的任务。前两者用于提高局部和全局判别能力，而后者则提高聚类准确性。尽管设计简单，我们的 CGPS 在 CUHK-SYSU 上的 mAP 达到了 80.0%，将基线模型提高了 8.8%。令人惊讶的是，它甚至达到了与几个有监督的人员搜索模型相当的性能。我们的代码位于 https://github.com/ljpadam/CGPS 本文提出一种弱监督人物搜索方法，仅使用边界框标注，通过探索视觉上下文提升行人检测与重识别性能。 Yichao Yan,Jinpeng Li,Shengcai Liao,Jie Qin,Bingbing Ni,Xiaokang Yang,Ling Shao cs.CV

authors_text: Pei Ke,Haozhe Ji,Yu Ran,Xin Cui,Liwei Wang,Linfeng Song,Xiaoyan Zhu,Minlie Huang
title: JointGT: Graph-Text Joint Representation Learning for Text Generation from Knowledge Graphs
title_zh: JointGT：用于从知识图生成文本的图文本联合表示学习
abstract: Existing pre-trained models for knowledge-graph-to-text (KG-to-text) generation simply fine-tune text-to-text pre-trained models such as BART or T5 on KG-to-text datasets, which largely ignore the graph structure during encoding and lack elaborate pre-training tasks to explicitly model graph-text alignments. To tackle these problems, we propose a graph-text joint representation learning model called JointGT. During encoding, we devise a structure-aware semantic aggregation module which is plugged into each Transformer layer to preserve the graph structure. Furthermore, we propose three new pre-training tasks to explicitly enhance the graph-text alignment including respective text / graph reconstruction, and graph-text alignment in the embedding space via Optimal Transport. Experiments show that JointGT obtains new state-of-the-art performance on various KG-to-text datasets.
summary: Existing pre-trained models for knowledge-graph-to-text (KG-to-text) generation simply fine-tune text-to-text pre-trained models such as BART or T5 on KG-to-text datasets, which largely ignore the graph structure during encoding and lack elaborate pre-training tasks to explicitly model graph-text alignments. To tackle these problems, we propose a graph-text joint representation learning model called JointGT. During encoding, we devise a structure-aware semantic aggregation module which is plugged into each Transformer layer to preserve the graph structure. Furthermore, we propose three new pre-training tasks to explicitly enhance the graph-text alignment including respective text / graph reconstruction, and graph-text alignment in the embedding space via Optimal Transport. Experiments show that JointGT obtains new state-of-the-art performance on various KG-to-text datasets.
abstract_zh: 现有的用于知识图到文本（KG 到文本）生成的预训练模型只是在 KG 到文本数据集上对文本到文本预训练模型（例如 BART 或 T5）进行微调，这些模型在编码过程中很大程度上忽略了图结构，并且缺乏精细的预训练任务来显式建模图文本对齐。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种称为 JointGT 的图文本联合表示学习模型。在编码过程中，我们设计了一个结构感知语义聚合模块，将其插入每个 Transformer 层以保留图结构。此外，我们提出了三个新的预训练任务来显式增强图文本对齐，包括各自的文本/图重建，以及通过最佳传输在嵌入空间中的图文本对齐。实验表明，JointGT 在各种 KG 到文本数据集上获得了最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出JointGT模型，通过图-文本联合表示学习解决知识图谱到文本生成任务中的结构建模与对齐问题。
AI.motivation: 现有KG-to-text模型微调文本预训练模型时忽略知识图结构，且缺乏显式建模图-文本对齐的预训练任务，导致生成效果受限。
AI.method: 设计结构感知语义聚合模块融入Transformer层以保留图结构，并引入文本重建、图重建及基于最优传输的嵌入空间对齐三个预训练任务。
AI.result: JointGT在多个KG-to-text数据集上取得新的最先进性能，验证了图结构建模与对齐任务的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 联合建模图结构与文本表示并设计针对性预训练任务，能显著提升知识图谱到文本生成的质量。

authors_text: Gordon E. Moon,Hyoukjun Kwon,Geonhwa Jeong,Prasanth Chatarasi,Sivasankaran Rajamanickam,Tushar Krishna
title: Evaluating Spatial Accelerator Architectures with Tiled Matrix-Matrix Multiplication
title_zh: 使用平铺矩阵-矩阵乘法评估空间加速器架构
abstract: There is a growing interest in custom spatial accelerators for machine learning applications. These accelerators employ a spatial array of processing elements (PEs) interacting via custom buffer hierarchies and networks-on-chip. The efficiency of these accelerators comes from employing optimized dataflow (i.e., spatial/temporal partitioning of data across the PEs and fine-grained scheduling) strategies to optimize data reuse. The focus of this work is to evaluate these accelerator architectures using a tiled general matrix-matrix multiplication (GEMM) kernel. To do so, we develop a framework that finds optimized mappings (dataflow and tile sizes) for a tiled GEMM for a given spatial accelerator and workload combination, leveraging an analytical cost model for runtime and energy. Our evaluations over five spatial accelerators demonstrate that the tiled GEMM mappings systematically generated by our framework achieve high performance on various GEMM workloads and accelerators.
summary: There is a growing interest in custom spatial accelerators for machine learning applications. These accelerators employ a spatial array of processing elements (PEs) interacting via custom buffer hierarchies and networks-on-chip. The efficiency of these accelerators comes from employing optimized dataflow (i.e., spatial/temporal partitioning of data across the PEs and fine-grained scheduling) strategies to optimize data reuse. The focus of this work is to evaluate these accelerator architectures using a tiled general matrix-matrix multiplication (GEMM) kernel. To do so, we develop a framework that finds optimized mappings (dataflow and tile sizes) for a tiled GEMM for a given spatial accelerator and workload combination, leveraging an analytical cost model for runtime and energy. Our evaluations over five spatial accelerators demonstrate that the tiled GEMM mappings systematically generated by our framework achieve high performance on various GEMM workloads and accelerators.
abstract_zh: 人们对用于机器学习应用的定制空间加速器越来越感兴趣。这些加速器采用处理元件 (PE) 的空间阵列，通过自定义缓冲区层次结构和片上网络进行交互。这些加速器的效率来自于采用优化的数据流（即跨 PE 的数据的空间/时间分区和细粒度调度）策略来优化数据重用。这项工作的重点是使用平铺通用矩阵-矩阵乘法 (GEMM) 内核来评估这些加速器架构。为此，我们开发了一个框架，利用运行时和能源的分析成本模型，为给定的空间加速器和工作负载组合找到切片 GEMM 的优化映射（数据流和切片大小）。我们对五个空间加速器的评估表明，由我们的框架系统生成的平铺 GEMM 映射在各种 GEMM 工作负载和加速器上实现了高性能。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过分块矩阵乘法（GEMM）内核评估空间加速器架构，并开发一个框架以优化数据流和分块大小，提升加速器性能。
AI.motivation: 随着机器学习应用对定制空间加速器的需求增加，如何高效评估不同架构并优化数据流策略成为关键问题，现有方法缺乏系统性的评估框架。
AI.method: 提出一种基于分析成本模型的框架，针对特定加速器和工作负载自动确定最优数据流策略及分块大小，以优化运行时和能耗。
AI.result: 评估结果表明，该框架生成的分块GEMM映射在五个不同空间加速器上均能实现高性能，有效提升计算效率。
AI.conclusion: 本研究证明了所提框架在优化空间加速器性能上的有效性，为不同架构和工作负载提供了系统化的评估方法，具有广泛的应用前景。

The efficiency of these accelerators comes from employing optimized dataflow (i.e., spatial/temporal partitioning of data across the PEs and fine-grained scheduling) strategies to optimize data reuse. The focus of this work is to evaluate these accelerator architectures using a tiled general matrix-matrix multiplication (GEMM) kernel. To do so, we develop a framework that finds optimized mappings (dataflow and tile sizes) for a tiled GEMM for a given spatial accelerator and workload combination, leveraging an analytical cost model for runtime and energy. Our evaluations over five spatial accelerators demonstrate that the tiled GEMM mappings systematically generated by our framework achieve high performance on various GEMM workloads and accelerators. 人们对用于机器学习应用的定制空间加速器越来越感兴趣。这些加速器采用处理元件 (PE) 的空间阵列，通过自定义缓冲区层次结构和片上网络进行交互。这些加速器的效率来自于采用优化的数据流（即跨 PE 的数据的空间/时间分区和细粒度调度）策略来优化数据重用。这项工作的重点是使用平铺通用矩阵-矩阵乘法 (GEMM) 内核来评估这些加速器架构。为此，我们开发了一个框架，利用运行时和能源的分析成本模型，为给定的空间加速器和工作负载组合找到切片 GEMM 的优化映射（数据流和切片大小）。我们对五个空间加速器的评估表明，由我们的框架系统生成的平铺 GEMM 映射在各种 GEMM 工作负载和加速器上实现了高性能。 本文旨在通过分块矩阵乘法（GEMM）内核评估空间加速器架构，并开发一个框架以优化数据流和分块大小，提升加速器性能。 Gordon E. Moon,Hyoukjun Kwon,Geonhwa Jeong,Prasanth Chatarasi,Sivasankaran Rajamanickam,Tushar Krishna cs.DC,cs.AI,cs.AR

authors_text: Jianyun Xu,Xin Tang,Jian Dou,Xu Shu,Yushi Zhu
title: CenterAtt: Fast 2-stage Center Attention Network
title_zh: CenterAtt：快速 2 阶段中心注意力网络
abstract: In this technical report, we introduce the methods of HIKVISION_LiDAR_Det in the challenge of waymo open dataset real-time 3D detection. Our solution for the competition are built upon Centerpoint 3D detection framework. Several variants of CenterPoint are explored, including center attention head and feature pyramid network neck. In order to achieve real time detection, methods like batchnorm merge, half-precision floating point network and GPU-accelerated voxelization process are adopted. By using these methods, our team ranks 6th among all the methods on real-time 3D detection challenge in the waymo open dataset.
summary: In this technical report, we introduce the methods of HIKVISION_LiDAR_Det in the challenge of waymo open dataset real-time 3D detection. Our solution for the competition are built upon Centerpoint 3D detection framework. Several variants of CenterPoint are explored, including center attention head and feature pyramid network neck. In order to achieve real time detection, methods like batchnorm merge, half-precision floating point network and GPU-accelerated voxelization process are adopted. By using these methods, our team ranks 6th among all the methods on real-time 3D detection challenge in the waymo open dataset.
abstract_zh: 在本技术报告中，我们介绍了 HIKVISION_LiDAR_Det 在 Waymo 开放数据集实时 3D 检测挑战赛中的方法。我们的竞赛解决方案基于 Centerpoint 3D 检测框架。探索了 CenterPoint 的几种变体，包括中心注意力头和特征金字塔网络颈。为了实现实时检测，采用了batchnorm合并、半精度浮点网络和GPU加速体素化过程等方法。通过使用这些方法，我们的团队在 Waymo 开放数据集中实时 3D 检测挑战的所有方法中排名第六。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于CenterPoint框架的实时3D检测方法，用于Waymo开放数据集的挑战
AI.motivation: 提升3D目标检测的实时性与准确性，以应对实际应用场景的需求
AI.method: 基于CenterPoint框架，引入中心注意力头和特征金字塔网络，并采用半精度计算、批量归一化合并及GPU加速体素化以优化实时性
AI.result: 在Waymo开放数据集的实时3D检测挑战中排名第六
AI.conclusion: 证明了所提方法在实时性与检测精度间的平衡，适用于实际自动驾驶场景

title: CompConv: A Compact Convolution Module for Efficient Feature Learning
title_zh: CompConv：用于高效特征学习的紧凑卷积模块
abstract: Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) have achieved remarkable success in various computer vision tasks but rely on tremendous computational cost. To solve this problem, existing approaches either compress well-trained large-scale models or learn lightweight models with carefully designed network structures. In this work, we make a close study of the convolution operator, which is the basic unit used in CNNs, to reduce its computing load. In particular, we propose a compact convolution module, called CompConv, to facilitate efficient feature learning. With the divide-and-conquer strategy, CompConv is able to save a great many computations as well as parameters to produce a certain dimensional feature map. Furthermore, CompConv discreetly integrates the input features into the outputs to efficiently inherit the input information. More importantly, the novel CompConv is a plug-and-play module that can be directly applied to modern CNN structures to replace the vanilla convolution layers without further effort. Extensive experimental results suggest that CompConv can adequately compress the benchmark CNN structures yet barely sacrifice the performance, surpassing other competitors.
summary: Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) have achieved remarkable success in various computer vision tasks but rely on tremendous computational cost. To solve this problem, existing approaches either compress well-trained large-scale models or learn lightweight models with carefully designed network structures. In this work, we make a close study of the convolution operator, which is the basic unit used in CNNs, to reduce its computing load. In particular, we propose a compact convolution module, called CompConv, to facilitate efficient feature learning. With the divide-and-conquer strategy, CompConv is able to save a great many computations as well as parameters to produce a certain dimensional feature map. Furthermore, CompConv discreetly integrates the input features into the outputs to efficiently inherit the input information. More importantly, the novel CompConv is a plug-and-play module that can be directly applied to modern CNN structures to replace the vanilla convolution layers without further effort. Extensive experimental results suggest that CompConv can adequately compress the benchmark CNN structures yet barely sacrifice the performance, surpassing other competitors.
abstract_zh: 卷积神经网络（CNN）在各种计算机视觉任务中取得了显着的成功，但依赖于巨大的计算成本。为了解决这个问题，现有的方法要么压缩训练有素的大规模模型，要么通过精心设计的网络结构来学习轻量级模型。在这项工作中，我们对卷积算子（CNN 中使用的基本单元）进行了深入研究，以减少其计算负载。特别是，我们提出了一种紧凑的卷积模块，称为 CompConv，以促进高效的特征学习。通过分治策略，CompConv 能够节省大量计算量和参数来生成特定维度的特征图。此外，CompConv 谨慎地将输入特征集成到输出中，以有效地继承输入信息。更重要的是，新颖的 CompConv 是一个即插即用的模块，可以直接应用于现代 CNN 结构来取代普通的卷积层，而无需进一步的努力。大量的实验结果表明，CompConv 可以充分压缩基准 CNN 结构，同时几乎不牺牲性能，超越了其他竞争对手。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为CompConv的紧凑卷积模块，旨在通过优化卷积操作减少计算成本，同时保持高效特征学习能力。
AI.motivation: 传统CNN计算成本高，现有方法通过模型压缩或轻量结构设计难以兼顾效率与性能，需从卷积操作本身进行优化。
AI.method: 设计CompConv模块，采用分治策略减少计算量和参数，通过离散整合输入特征保留信息，并支持直接替换传统卷积层。
AI.result: 实验表明CompConv能有效压缩基准CNN结构，性能损失极小且优于其他方法。
AI.conclusion: CompConv作为即插即用模块，为现代CNN提供高效特征学习方案，在压缩模型的同时保持优异性能。

authors_text: Fangneng Zhan,Yingchen Yu,Kaiwen Cui,Gongjie Zhang,Shijian Lu,Jianxiong Pan,Changgong Zhang,Feiying Ma,Xuansong Xie,Chunyan Miao
title: Unbalanced Feature Transport for Exemplar-based Image Translation
title_zh: 基于示例的图像翻译的不平衡特征传输
abstract: Despite the great success of GANs in images translation with different conditioned inputs such as semantic segmentation and edge maps, generating high-fidelity realistic images with reference styles remains a grand challenge in conditional image-to-image translation. This paper presents a general image translation framework that incorporates optimal transport for feature alignment between conditional inputs and style exemplars in image translation. The introduction of optimal transport mitigates the constraint of many-to-one feature matching significantly while building up accurate semantic correspondences between conditional inputs and exemplars. We design a novel unbalanced optimal transport to address the transport between features with deviational distributions which exists widely between conditional inputs and exemplars. In addition, we design a semantic-activation normalization scheme that injects style features of exemplars into the image translation process successfully. Extensive experiments over multiple image translation tasks show that our method achieves superior image translation qualitatively and quantitatively as compared with the state-of-the-art.
summary: Despite the great success of GANs in images translation with different conditioned inputs such as semantic segmentation and edge maps, generating high-fidelity realistic images with reference styles remains a grand challenge in conditional image-to-image translation. This paper presents a general image translation framework that incorporates optimal transport for feature alignment between conditional inputs and style exemplars in image translation. The introduction of optimal transport mitigates the constraint of many-to-one feature matching significantly while building up accurate semantic correspondences between conditional inputs and exemplars. We design a novel unbalanced optimal transport to address the transport between features with deviational distributions which exists widely between conditional inputs and exemplars. In addition, we design a semantic-activation normalization scheme that injects style features of exemplars into the image translation process successfully. Extensive experiments over multiple image translation tasks show that our method achieves superior image translation qualitatively and quantitatively as compared with the state-of-the-art.
abstract_zh: 尽管 GAN 在具有不同条件输入（例如语义分割和边缘图）的图像翻译方面取得了巨大成功，但生成具有参考样式的高保真逼真图像仍然是条件图像到图像翻译的巨大挑战。本文提出了一个通用图像翻译框架，该框架结合了图像翻译中条件输入和风格范例之间特征对齐的最佳传输。最佳传输的引入显着减轻了多对一特征匹配的约束，同时在条件输入和样本之间建立准确的语义对应关系。我们设计了一种新颖的不平衡最优传输来解决条件输入和样本之间广泛存在的偏差分布特征之间的传输。此外，我们设计了一种语义激活标准化方案，成功地将样本的风格特征注入到图像翻译过程中。对多个图像翻译任务的广泛实验表明，与最先进的方法相比，我们的方法在定性和定量上实现了卓越的图像翻译。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于最优运输的不平衡特征传输框架，用于解决条件图像到图像翻译中参考风格生成的挑战。
AI.motivation: 尽管GAN在图像翻译中取得成功，但生成与参考样式匹配的高保真图像仍面临条件输入与风格示例之间特征分布不匹配的挑战。
AI.method: 设计了不平衡最优运输方法处理条件输入与示例间的分布偏差，并引入语义激活归一化方案将示例风格特征注入翻译过程。
AI.result: 在多个图像翻译任务中，该方法在定性和定量指标上均优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过引入不平衡最优运输和语义归一化，框架有效提升了条件图像翻译中风格迁移的准确性和真实性。

search_text: Unbalanced Feature Transport for Exemplar-based Image Translation 基于示例的图像翻译的不平衡特征传输 Despite the great success of GANs in images translation with different conditioned inputs such as semantic segmentation and edge maps, generating high-fidelity realistic images with reference styles remains a grand challenge in conditional image-to-image translation. This paper presents a general image translation framework that incorporates optimal transport for feature alignment between conditional inputs and style exemplars in image translation. The introduction of optimal transport mitigates the constraint of many-to-one feature matching significantly while building up accurate semantic correspondences between conditional inputs and exemplars. We design a novel unbalanced optimal transport to address the transport between features with deviational distributions which exists widely between conditional inputs and exemplars. In addition, we design a semantic-activation normalization scheme that injects style features of exemplars into the image translation process successfully. Extensive experiments over multiple image translation tasks show that our method achieves superior image translation qualitatively and quantitatively as compared with the state-of-the-art. 尽管 GAN 在具有不同条件输入（例如语义分割和边缘图）的图像翻译方面取得了巨大成功，但生成具有参考样式的高保真逼真图像仍然是条件图像到图像翻译的巨大挑战。本文提出了一个通用图像翻译框架，该框架结合了图像翻译中条件输入和风格范例之间特征对齐的最佳传输。最佳传输的引入显着减轻了多对一特征匹配的约束，同时在条件输入和样本之间建立准确的语义对应关系。我们设计了一种新颖的不平衡最优传输来解决条件输入和样本之间广泛存在的偏差分布特征之间的传输。此外，我们设计了一种语义激活标准化方案，成功地将样本的风格特征注入到图像翻译过程中。对多个图像翻译任务的广泛实验表明，与最先进的方法相比，我们的方法在定性和定量上实现了卓越的图像翻译。 本文提出了一种基于最优运输的不平衡特征传输框架，用于解决条件图像到图像翻译中参考风格生成的挑战。 Fangneng Zhan,Yingchen Yu,Kaiwen Cui,Gongjie Zhang,Shijian Lu,Jianxiong Pan,Changgong Zhang,Feiying Ma,Xuansong Xie,Chunyan Miao cs.CV

authors_text: Mohammed Salah Al-Radhi,Tamás Gábor Csapó,Géza Németh
title: Advances in Speech Vocoding for Text-to-Speech with Continuous Parameters
title_zh: 具有连续参数的文本到语音的语音声编码的进展
comment: 6 pages, 3 figures, International Conference on Artificial Intelligence and Speech Technology (AIST2020)
comments: 6 pages, 3 figures, International Conference on Artificial Intelligence and Speech Technology (AIST2020)
abstract: Vocoders received renewed attention as main components in statistical parametric text-to-speech (TTS) synthesis and speech transformation systems. Even though there are vocoding techniques give almost accepted synthesized speech, their high computational complexity and irregular structures are still considered challenging concerns, which yield a variety of voice quality degradation. Therefore, this paper presents new techniques in a continuous vocoder, that is all features are continuous and presents a flexible speech synthesis system. First, a new continuous noise masking based on the phase distortion is proposed to eliminate the perceptual impact of the residual noise and letting an accurate reconstruction of noise characteristics. Second, we addressed the need of neural sequence to sequence modeling approach for the task of TTS based on recurrent networks. Bidirectional long short-term memory (LSTM) and gated recurrent unit (GRU) are studied and applied to model continuous parameters for more natural-sounding like a human. The evaluation results proved that the proposed model achieves the state-of-the-art performance of the speech synthesis compared with the other traditional methods.
summary: Vocoders received renewed attention as main components in statistical parametric text-to-speech (TTS) synthesis and speech transformation systems. Even though there are vocoding techniques give almost accepted synthesized speech, their high computational complexity and irregular structures are still considered challenging concerns, which yield a variety of voice quality degradation. Therefore, this paper presents new techniques in a continuous vocoder, that is all features are continuous and presents a flexible speech synthesis system. First, a new continuous noise masking based on the phase distortion is proposed to eliminate the perceptual impact of the residual noise and letting an accurate reconstruction of noise characteristics. Second, we addressed the need of neural sequence to sequence modeling approach for the task of TTS based on recurrent networks. Bidirectional long short-term memory (LSTM) and gated recurrent unit (GRU) are studied and applied to model continuous parameters for more natural-sounding like a human. The evaluation results proved that the proposed model achieves the state-of-the-art performance of the speech synthesis compared with the other traditional methods.
abstract_zh: 声码器作为统计参数文本到语音 (TTS) 合成和语音转换系统的主要组件再次受到关注。尽管声编码技术可以提供几乎被接受的合成语音，但它们的高计算复杂性和不规则结构仍然被认为是具有挑战性的问题，这会导致各种语音质量下降。因此，本文提出了连续声码器的新技术，即所有特征都是连续的，并提出了一种灵活的语音合成系统。首先，提出了一种基于相位失真的新的连续噪声掩蔽，以消除残留噪声的感知影响并准确重建噪声特征。其次，我们解决了基于循环网络的 TTS 任务对神经序列到序列建模方法的需求。研究了双向长短期记忆 (LSTM) 和门控循环单元 (GRU)，并将其应用于连续参数建模，以获得更自然的声音，就像人类一样。评估结果证明，与其他传统方法相比，所提出的模型实现了语音合成的最先进性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于连续参数的语音合成新方法，改进传统语音编码器的缺陷。
AI.motivation: 现有语音编码器存在计算复杂度高、结构不规则导致语音质量下降的问题，需更自然的连续参数建模方法。
AI.method: 提出连续噪声掩蔽技术消除残余噪声影响，并采用双向LSTM/GRU神经网络建模连续参数。
AI.result: 实验表明新模型在语音合成任务中达到当前最优性能，优于传统方法。
AI.conclusion: 基于连续参数的神经网络方法能有效提升语音合成质量，验证了新模型的先进性。

title: Practical Transferability Estimation for Image Classification Tasks
title_zh: 图像分类任务的实用可迁移性估计
comment: This paper is not the latest version. Please refer to Transferability-Guided Cross-Domain Cross-Task Transfer Learning (IEEE TNNLS'24) for more details.https://ieeexplore.ieee.org/abstract/document/10420486
comments: This paper is not the latest version. Please refer to Transferability-Guided Cross-Domain Cross-Task Transfer Learning (IEEE TNNLS'24) for more details.https://ieeexplore.ieee.org/abstract/document/10420486
abstract: Transferability estimation is an essential problem in transfer learning to predict how good the performance is when transferring a source model (or source task) to a target task. Recent analytical transferability metrics have been widely used for source model selection and multi-task learning. A major challenge is how to make transfereability estimation robust under the cross-domain cross-task settings. The recently proposed OTCE score solves this problem by considering both domain and task differences, with the help of transfer experiences on auxiliary tasks, which causes an efficiency overhead. In this work, we propose a practical transferability metric called JC-NCE score that dramatically improves the robustness of the task difference estimation in OTCE, thus removing the need for auxiliary tasks. Specifically, we build the joint correspondences between source and target data via solving an optimal transport problem with a ground cost considering both the sample distance and label distance, and then compute the transferability score as the negative conditional entropy of the matched labels. Extensive validations under the intra-dataset and inter-dataset transfer settings demonstrate that our JC-NCE score outperforms the auxiliary-task free version of OTCE for 7% and 12%, respectively, and is also more robust than other existing transferability metrics on average.
summary: Transferability estimation is an essential problem in transfer learning to predict how good the performance is when transferring a source model (or source task) to a target task. Recent analytical transferability metrics have been widely used for source model selection and multi-task learning. A major challenge is how to make transfereability estimation robust under the cross-domain cross-task settings. The recently proposed OTCE score solves this problem by considering both domain and task differences, with the help of transfer experiences on auxiliary tasks, which causes an efficiency overhead. In this work, we propose a practical transferability metric called JC-NCE score that dramatically improves the robustness of the task difference estimation in OTCE, thus removing the need for auxiliary tasks. Specifically, we build the joint correspondences between source and target data via solving an optimal transport problem with a ground cost considering both the sample distance and label distance, and then compute the transferability score as the negative conditional entropy of the matched labels. Extensive validations under the intra-dataset and inter-dataset transfer settings demonstrate that our JC-NCE score outperforms the auxiliary-task free version of OTCE for 7% and 12%, respectively, and is also more robust than other existing transferability metrics on average.
abstract_zh: 可迁移性估计是迁移学习中的一个重要问题，用于预测将源模型（或源任务）迁移到目标任务时的性能有多好。最近的分析可转移性指标已广泛用于源模型选择和多任务学习。一个主要挑战是如何在跨域跨任务设置下使可转移性估计变得稳健。最近提出的 OTCE 评分通过考虑领域和任务差异，借助辅助任务上的迁移经验来解决这个问题，这会导致效率开销。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种称为 JC-NCE 分数的实用可转移性指标，它极大地提高了 OTCE 中任务差异估计的鲁棒性，从而消除了对辅助任务的需要。具体来说，我们通过考虑样本距离和标签距离，通过解决具有地面成本的最优传输问题来建立源数据和目标数据之间的联合对应关系，然后将可转移性分数计算为匹配标签的负条件熵。数据集内和数据集间传输设置下的广泛验证表明，我们的 JC-NCE 分数分别比 OTCE 的无辅助任务版本高 7% 和 12%，并且平均而言也比其他现有可传输性指标更稳健。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需辅助任务的图像分类任务迁移性评估方法JC-NCE，通过优化传输问题提升跨领域跨任务设置下的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有迁移性评估方法如OTCE依赖辅助任务导致效率低下，亟需一种更高效且能同时处理领域与任务差异的评估指标。
AI.method: 通过求解考虑样本距离与标签距离的最优传输问题建立源目标数据联合对应关系，以匹配标签的条件熵负值作为迁移性评分。
AI.result: 在同数据集与跨数据集迁移场景中，JC-NCE分别优于无辅助任务版OTCE 7%和12%，且平均鲁棒性优于其他现有指标。
AI.conclusion: JC-NCE通过联合建模领域与任务差异，有效消除了对辅助任务的依赖，在迁移性评估中实现了性能与鲁棒性的双重提升。

search_text: Practical Transferability Estimation for Image Classification Tasks 图像分类任务的实用可迁移性估计 Transferability estimation is an essential problem in transfer learning to predict how good the performance is when transferring a source model (or source task) to a target task. Recent analytical transferability metrics have been widely used for source model selection and multi-task learning. A major challenge is how to make transfereability estimation robust under the cross-domain cross-task settings. The recently proposed OTCE score solves this problem by considering both domain and task differences, with the help of transfer experiences on auxiliary tasks, which causes an efficiency overhead. In this work, we propose a practical transferability metric called JC-NCE score that dramatically improves the robustness of the task difference estimation in OTCE, thus removing the need for auxiliary tasks. Specifically, we build the joint correspondences between source and target data via solving an optimal transport problem with a ground cost considering both the sample distance and label distance, and then compute the transferability score as the negative conditional entropy of the matched labels. Extensive validations under the intra-dataset and inter-dataset transfer settings demonstrate that our JC-NCE score outperforms the auxiliary-task free version of OTCE for 7% and 12%, respectively, and is also more robust than other existing transferability metrics on average. 可迁移性估计是迁移学习中的一个重要问题，用于预测将源模型（或源任务）迁移到目标任务时的性能有多好。最近的分析可转移性指标已广泛用于源模型选择和多任务学习。一个主要挑战是如何在跨域跨任务设置下使可转移性估计变得稳健。最近提出的 OTCE 评分通过考虑领域和任务差异，借助辅助任务上的迁移经验来解决这个问题，这会导致效率开销。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种称为 JC-NCE 分数的实用可转移性指标，它极大地提高了 OTCE 中任务差异估计的鲁棒性，从而消除了对辅助任务的需要。具体来说，我们通过考虑样本距离和标签距离，通过解决具有地面成本的最优传输问题来建立源数据和目标数据之间的联合对应关系，然后将可转移性分数计算为匹配标签的负条件熵。数据集内和数据集间传输设置下的广泛验证表明，我们的 JC-NCE 分数分别比 OTCE 的无辅助任务版本高 7% 和 12%，并且平均而言也比其他现有可传输性指标更稳健。 本文提出了一种无需辅助任务的图像分类任务迁移性评估方法JC-NCE，通过优化传输问题提升跨领域跨任务设置下的鲁棒性。 Yang Tan,Yang Li,Shao-Lun Huang cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG

title: Informative Class Activation Maps
title_zh: 信息丰富的类激活图
abstract: We study how to evaluate the quantitative information content of a region within an image for a particular label. To this end, we bridge class activation maps with information theory. We develop an informative class activation map (infoCAM). Given a classification task, infoCAM depict how to accumulate information of partial regions to that of the entire image toward a label. Thus, we can utilise infoCAM to locate the most informative features for a label. When applied to an image classification task, infoCAM performs better than the traditional classification map in the weakly supervised object localisation task. We achieve state-of-the-art results on Tiny-ImageNet.
summary: We study how to evaluate the quantitative information content of a region within an image for a particular label. To this end, we bridge class activation maps with information theory. We develop an informative class activation map (infoCAM). Given a classification task, infoCAM depict how to accumulate information of partial regions to that of the entire image toward a label. Thus, we can utilise infoCAM to locate the most informative features for a label. When applied to an image classification task, infoCAM performs better than the traditional classification map in the weakly supervised object localisation task. We achieve state-of-the-art results on Tiny-ImageNet.
abstract_zh: 我们研究如何评估特定标签的图像内区域的定量信息内容。为此，我们将类激活图与信息论联系起来。我们开发了一个信息丰富的类激活图（infoCAM）。给定一个分类任务，infoCAM 描述了如何将部分区域的信息累积到整个图像的标签信息。因此，我们可以利用 infoCAM 来定位标签信息最丰富的特征。当应用于图像分类任务时，infoCAM在弱监督目标定位任务中比传统分类图表现更好。我们在 Tiny-ImageNet 上取得了最先进的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于信息论的类激活图（infoCAM），用于评估图像中特定区域对分类标签的信息贡献，并在弱监督目标定位任务中取得优异效果。
AI.motivation: 传统类激活图难以量化区域信息贡献，导致定位不准确。通过引入信息论，可更精确评估特征区域对分类结果的贡献度。
AI.method: 结合信息论与类激活图，开发infoCAM方法，通过计算区域信息累积程度定位关键特征区域。
AI.result: 在Tiny-ImageNet数据集上，infoCAM在弱监督目标定位任务中达到当时最优性能，优于传统方法。
AI.conclusion: infoCAM能有效定位最具信息量的图像区域，为弱监督目标定位提供了更精确的特征分析工具。

search_text: Informative Class Activation Maps 信息丰富的类激活图 We study how to evaluate the quantitative information content of a region within an image for a particular label. To this end, we bridge class activation maps with information theory. We develop an informative class activation map (infoCAM). Given a classification task, infoCAM depict how to accumulate information of partial regions to that of the entire image toward a label. Thus, we can utilise infoCAM to locate the most informative features for a label. When applied to an image classification task, infoCAM performs better than the traditional classification map in the weakly supervised object localisation task. We achieve state-of-the-art results on Tiny-ImageNet. 我们研究如何评估特定标签的图像内区域的定量信息内容。为此，我们将类激活图与信息论联系起来。我们开发了一个信息丰富的类激活图（infoCAM）。给定一个分类任务，infoCAM 描述了如何将部分区域的信息累积到整个图像的标签信息。因此，我们可以利用 infoCAM 来定位标签信息最丰富的特征。当应用于图像分类任务时，infoCAM在弱监督目标定位任务中比传统分类图表现更好。我们在 Tiny-ImageNet 上取得了最先进的结果。 本文提出了一种基于信息论的类激活图（infoCAM），用于评估图像中特定区域对分类标签的信息贡献，并在弱监督目标定位任务中取得优异效果。 Zhenyue Qin,Dongwoo Kim,Tom Gedeon cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Zhihan Yue,Yujing Wang,Juanyong Duan,Tianmeng Yang,Congrui Huang,Yunhai Tong,Bixiong Xu
title: TS2Vec: Towards Universal Representation of Time Series
title_zh: TS2Vec：迈向时间序列的通用表示
abstract: This paper presents TS2Vec, a universal framework for learning representations of time series in an arbitrary semantic level. Unlike existing methods, TS2Vec performs contrastive learning in a hierarchical way over augmented context views, which enables a robust contextual representation for each timestamp. Furthermore, to obtain the representation of an arbitrary sub-sequence in the time series, we can apply a simple aggregation over the representations of corresponding timestamps. We conduct extensive experiments on time series classification tasks to evaluate the quality of time series representations. As a result, TS2Vec achieves significant improvement over existing SOTAs of unsupervised time series representation on 125 UCR datasets and 29 UEA datasets. The learned timestamp-level representations also achieve superior results in time series forecasting and anomaly detection tasks. A linear regression trained on top of the learned representations outperforms previous SOTAs of time series forecasting. Furthermore, we present a simple way to apply the learned representations for unsupervised anomaly detection, which establishes SOTA results in the literature. The source code is publicly available at https://github.com/yuezhihan/ts2vec.
summary: This paper presents TS2Vec, a universal framework for learning representations of time series in an arbitrary semantic level. Unlike existing methods, TS2Vec performs contrastive learning in a hierarchical way over augmented context views, which enables a robust contextual representation for each timestamp. Furthermore, to obtain the representation of an arbitrary sub-sequence in the time series, we can apply a simple aggregation over the representations of corresponding timestamps. We conduct extensive experiments on time series classification tasks to evaluate the quality of time series representations. As a result, TS2Vec achieves significant improvement over existing SOTAs of unsupervised time series representation on 125 UCR datasets and 29 UEA datasets. The learned timestamp-level representations also achieve superior results in time series forecasting and anomaly detection tasks. A linear regression trained on top of the learned representations outperforms previous SOTAs of time series forecasting. Furthermore, we present a simple way to apply the learned representations for unsupervised anomaly detection, which establishes SOTA results in the literature. The source code is publicly available at https://github.com/yuezhihan/ts2vec.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了 TS2Vec，一个用于学习任意语义级别的时间序列表示的通用框架。与现有方法不同，TS2Vec 在增强上下文视图上以分层方式执行对比学习，从而为每个时间戳提供强大的上下文表示。此外，为了获得时间序列中任意子序列的表示，我们可以对相应时间戳的表示应用简单的聚合。我们对时间序列分类任务进行了广泛的实验，以评估时间序列表示的质量。因此，TS2Vec 在 125 个 UCR 数据集和 29 个 UEA 数据集上实现了对现有无监督时间序列表示 SOTA 的显着改进。学习到的时间戳级表示在时间序列预测和异常检测任务中也取得了优异的结果。在学习到的表示之上训练的线性回归优于之前的时间序列预测的 SOTA。此外，我们提出了一种简单的方法，将学习到的表示应用于无监督异常检测，该方法在文献中建立了 SOTA 结果。源代码可在 https://github.com/yuezhihan/ts2vec 公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出TS2Vec框架，旨在学习适用于任意语义层次的时间序列通用表示方法。
AI.motivation: 现有时间序列表示方法难以同时满足不同粒度需求且泛化能力不足，需构建更鲁棒的上下文表示并支持灵活子序列分析。
AI.method: 采用分层对比学习策略，在增强的上下文视图中训练模型获取时间戳级表示，通过聚合对应时间戳表示生成任意子序列表示。
AI.result: 在125个UCR和29个UEA数据集上显著优于现有方法，在预测任务中线性回归模型超越SOTA，无监督异常检测也达SOTA水平。
AI.conclusion: TS2Vec通过分层对比学习实现了时间序列表示的通用性，在多个任务中验证了其有效性，为时间序列分析提供了统一解决方案。
