title: Interactive Object Segmentation with Dynamic Click Transform
title_zh: 具有动态点击变换的交互式对象分割
comment: This paper was accepted by IEEE International Conference on Image Processing (ICIP) 2021
comments: This paper was accepted by IEEE International Conference on Image Processing (ICIP) 2021
abstract: In the interactive segmentation, users initially click on the target object to segment the main body and then provide corrections on mislabeled regions to iteratively refine the segmentation masks. Most existing methods transform these user-provided clicks into interaction maps and concatenate them with image as the input tensor. Typically, the interaction maps are determined by measuring the distance of each pixel to the clicked points, ignoring the relation between clicks and mislabeled regions. We propose a Dynamic Click Transform Network~(DCT-Net), consisting of Spatial-DCT and Feature-DCT, to better represent user interactions. Spatial-DCT transforms each user-provided click with individual diffusion distance according to the target scale, and Feature-DCT normalizes the extracted feature map to a specific distribution predicted from the clicked points. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed method and achieve favorable performance compared to the state-of-the-art on three standard benchmark datasets.
summary: In the interactive segmentation, users initially click on the target object to segment the main body and then provide corrections on mislabeled regions to iteratively refine the segmentation masks. Most existing methods transform these user-provided clicks into interaction maps and concatenate them with image as the input tensor. Typically, the interaction maps are determined by measuring the distance of each pixel to the clicked points, ignoring the relation between clicks and mislabeled regions. We propose a Dynamic Click Transform Network~(DCT-Net), consisting of Spatial-DCT and Feature-DCT, to better represent user interactions. Spatial-DCT transforms each user-provided click with individual diffusion distance according to the target scale, and Feature-DCT normalizes the extracted feature map to a specific distribution predicted from the clicked points. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed method and achieve favorable performance compared to the state-of-the-art on three standard benchmark datasets.
abstract_zh: 在交互式分割中，用户首先单击目标对象来分割主体，然后对错误标记的区域进行修正，以迭代地细化分割掩模。大多数现有方法将这些用户提供的点击转换为交互图，并将它们与图像连接起来作为输入张量。通常，交互图是通过测量每个像素到点击点的距离来确定的，忽略点击和错误标记区域之间的关系。我们提出了动态点击变换网络（DCT-Net），由空间 DCT 和特征 DCT 组成，以更好地表示用户交互。 Spatial-DCT根据目标尺度将每个用户提供的点击转换为单独的扩散距离，而Feature-DCT将提取的特征图标准化为从点击点预测的特定分布。我们证明了我们提出的方法的有效性，并与三个标准基准数据集上的最新技术相比取得了良好的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种动态点击转换网络（DCT-Net），用于改进交互式对象分割中的用户点击表示方法。
AI.motivation: 现有方法通过距离度量生成交互图但忽略点击与误标记区域的关系，导致分割精度受限。
AI.method: 设计包含空间DCT和特征DCT的双分支网络：空间DCT根据目标尺度生成个性化扩散距离，特征DCT将特征图归一化为点击点预测的分布。
AI.result: 在三个标准数据集上达到优于现有方法的分割性能，验证了动态点击表示的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 动态点击转换机制能更精准捕捉用户交互信息，为交互式分割提供新思路。

title: Prediction of the facial growth direction with Machine Learning methods
title_zh: 用机器学习方法预测面部生长方向
abstract: First attempts of prediction of the facial growth (FG) direction were made over half of a century ago. Despite numerous attempts and elapsed time, a satisfactory method has not been established yet and the problem still poses a challenge for medical experts. To our knowledge, this paper is the first Machine Learning approach to the prediction of FG direction. Conducted data analysis reveals the inherent complexity of the problem and explains the reasons of difficulty in FG direction prediction based on 2D X-ray images. To perform growth forecasting, we employ a wide range of algorithms, from logistic regression, through tree ensembles to neural networks and consider three, slightly different, problem formulations. The resulting classification accuracy varies between 71% and 75%.

Despite numerous attempts and elapsed time, a satisfactory method has not been established yet and the problem still poses a challenge for medical experts. To our knowledge, this paper is the first Machine Learning approach to the prediction of FG direction. Conducted data analysis reveals the inherent complexity of the problem and explains the reasons of difficulty in FG direction prediction based on 2D X-ray images. To perform growth forecasting, we employ a wide range of algorithms, from logistic regression, through tree ensembles to neural networks and consider three, slightly different, problem formulations. The resulting classification accuracy varies between 71% and 75%.
abstract_zh: 半个多世纪前，人们首次尝试预测面部生长（FG）方向。尽管经过多次尝试和时间的推移，仍然没有找到令人满意的方法，这个问题仍然对医学专家提出了挑战。据我们所知，本文是第一个预测 FG 方向的机器学习方法。进行的数据分析揭示了问题的内在复杂性，并解释了基于 2D X 射线图像的 FG 方向预测困难的原因。为了进行增长预测，我们采用了多种算法，从逻辑回归、树集成到神经网络，并考虑了三种略有不同的问题表述。最终的分类准确度在 71% 到 75% 之间。

AI.tldr: 本文提出使用机器学习方法预测面部生长方向，解决传统方法未能有效解决的难题。
AI.motivation: 尽管已有超过半个世纪的研究，但面部生长方向预测仍缺乏有效方法，需探索新途径。
AI.method: 采用逻辑回归、树集成、神经网络等多种算法，并尝试三种不同的问题建模方式。
AI.result: 分类准确率在71%至75%之间，验证了机器学习方法的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 机器学习可作为预测面部生长方向的可行工具，但问题复杂性仍需进一步研究优化。

authors_text: Tiago Barros,Ricardo Pereira,Luís Garrote,Cristiano Premebida,Urbano J. Nunes
title: Place recognition survey: An update on deep learning approaches
title_zh: 地点认知调查：深度学习方法的更新
abstract: Autonomous Vehicles (AV) are becoming more capable of navigating in complex environments with dynamic and changing conditions. A key component that enables these intelligent vehicles to overcome such conditions and become more autonomous is the sophistication of the perception and localization systems. As part of the localization system, place recognition has benefited from recent developments in other perception tasks such as place categorization or object recognition, namely with the emergence of deep learning (DL) frameworks. This paper surveys recent approaches and methods used in place recognition, particularly those based on deep learning. The contributions of this work are twofold: surveying recent sensors such as 3D LiDARs and RADARs, applied in place recognition; and categorizing the various DL-based place recognition works into supervised, unsupervised, semi-supervised, parallel, and hierarchical categories. First, this survey introduces key place recognition concepts to contextualize the reader. Then, sensor characteristics are addressed. This survey proceeds by elaborating on the various DL-based works, presenting summaries for each framework. Some lessons learned from this survey include: the importance of NetVLAD for supervised end-to-end learning; the advantages of unsupervised approaches in place recognition, namely for cross-domain applications; or the increasing tendency of recent works to seek, not only for higher performance but also for higher efficiency.
summary: Autonomous Vehicles (AV) are becoming more capable of navigating in complex environments with dynamic and changing conditions. A key component that enables these intelligent vehicles to overcome such conditions and become more autonomous is the sophistication of the perception and localization systems. As part of the localization system, place recognition has benefited from recent developments in other perception tasks such as place categorization or object recognition, namely with the emergence of deep learning (DL) frameworks. This paper surveys recent approaches and methods used in place recognition, particularly those based on deep learning. The contributions of this work are twofold: surveying recent sensors such as 3D LiDARs and RADARs, applied in place recognition; and categorizing the various DL-based place recognition works into supervised, unsupervised, semi-supervised, parallel, and hierarchical categories. First, this survey introduces key place recognition concepts to contextualize the reader. Then, sensor characteristics are addressed. This survey proceeds by elaborating on the various DL-based works, presenting summaries for each framework. Some lessons learned from this survey include: the importance of NetVLAD for supervised end-to-end learning; the advantages of unsupervised approaches in place recognition, namely for cross-domain applications; or the increasing tendency of recent works to seek, not only for higher performance but also for higher efficiency.
abstract_zh: 自动驾驶汽车 (AV) 在动态和变化的复杂环境中的导航能力越来越强。使这些智能车辆能够克服这些条件并变得更加自主的关键组件是感知和定位系统的复杂性。作为定位系统的一部分，地点识别受益于其他感知任务（例如地点分类或对象识别）的最新发展，即深度学习（DL）框架的出现。本文调查了地点识别中使用的最新方法和方法，特别是基于深度学习的方法和方法。这项工作的贡献是双重的：调查应用于位置识别的最新传感器，例如 3D LiDAR 和 RADAR；并将各种基于深度学习的地点识别工作分为有监督、无监督、半监督、并行和分层类别。首先，本次调查介绍了关键地点识别概念，以使读者了解情境。然后，解决传感器特性。本次调查详细阐述了各种基于深度学习的工作，并对每个框架进行了总结。从本次调查中汲取的一些经验教训包括： NetVLAD 对于监督式端到端学习的重要性；无监督方法在地点识别方面的优势，即跨领域应用；或者最近的作品越来越倾向于寻求更高的性能和更高的效率。

AI.tldr: 综述深度学习在地点识别中的最新方法，涵盖传感器应用与分类
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶车辆需要更精确的定位系统，而深度学习的发展推动了地点识别技术的进步，需要系统性综述现有方法
AI.method: 通过分类深度学习方法（监督、无监督等）并分析3D LiDAR和RADAR等传感器在地点识别中的应用
AI.result: 总结出NetVLAD在监督学习中的重要性，无监督方法适用于跨领域应用，以及当前研究趋向于兼顾性能与效率
AI.conclusion: 深度学习显著提升了地点识别能力，未来需进一步优化跨领域适应性和计算效率

title: Humble Teachers Teach Better Students for Semi-Supervised Object Detection
title_zh: 谦虚的老师教更好的学生进行半监督目标检测
abstract: We propose a semi-supervised approach for contemporary object detectors following the teacher-student dual model framework. Our method is featured with 1) the exponential moving averaging strategy to update the teacher from the student online, 2) using plenty of region proposals and soft pseudo-labels as the student's training targets, and 3) a light-weighted detection-specific data ensemble for the teacher to generate more reliable pseudo-labels. Compared to the recent state-of-the-art -- STAC, which uses hard labels on sparsely selected hard pseudo samples, the teacher in our model exposes richer information to the student with soft-labels on many proposals. Our model achieves COCO-style AP of 53.04% on VOC07 val set, 8.4% better than STAC, when using VOC12 as unlabeled data. On MS-COCO, it outperforms prior work when only a small percentage of data is taken as labeled. It also reaches 53.8% AP on MS-COCO test-dev with 3.1% gain over the fully supervised ResNet-152 Cascaded R-CNN, by tapping into unlabeled data of a similar size to the labeled data.
summary: We propose a semi-supervised approach for contemporary object detectors following the teacher-student dual model framework. Our method is featured with 1) the exponential moving averaging strategy to update the teacher from the student online, 2) using plenty of region proposals and soft pseudo-labels as the student's training targets, and 3) a light-weighted detection-specific data ensemble for the teacher to generate more reliable pseudo-labels. Compared to the recent state-of-the-art -- STAC, which uses hard labels on sparsely selected hard pseudo samples, the teacher in our model exposes richer information to the student with soft-labels on many proposals. Our model achieves COCO-style AP of 53.04% on VOC07 val set, 8.4% better than STAC, when using VOC12 as unlabeled data. On MS-COCO, it outperforms prior work when only a small percentage of data is taken as labeled. It also reaches 53.8% AP on MS-COCO test-dev with 3.1% gain over the fully supervised ResNet-152 Cascaded R-CNN, by tapping into unlabeled data of a similar size to the labeled data.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种遵循师生双模型框架的当代物体检测器的半监督方法。我们的方法具有以下特点：1）指数移动平均策略从学生在线更新教师，2）使用大量区域建议和软伪标签作为学生的训练目标，3）轻量级的检测特定数据集成，供教师生成更可靠的伪标签。与最近最先进的 STAC（在稀疏选择的硬伪样本上使用硬标签）相比，我们模型中的教师在许多提案上使用软标签向学生展示了更丰富的信息。当使用 VOC12 作为未标记数据时，我们的模型在 VOC07 ​​验证集上实现了 53.04% 的 COCO 式 AP，比 STAC 好 8.4%。在 MS-COCO 上，当只有一小部分数据被标记时，它的性能优于之前的工作。通过利用与标记数据大小相似的未标记数据，它在 MS-COCO 测试开发上的 AP 也达到了 53.8%，比完全监督的 ResNet-152 Cascaded R-CNN 提高了 3.1%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于教师-学生双模型框架的半监督目标检测方法，通过软伪标签和数据集成提升检测性能。
AI.motivation: 现有半监督方法（如STAC）依赖稀疏硬伪标签，限制了信息传递效率，需通过软标签和更可靠的伪标签生成提升学生模型表现。
AI.method: 采用指数移动平均更新教师模型，利用大量区域提议和软伪标签训练学生模型，并设计轻量级检测专用数据集成策略生成可靠伪标签。
AI.result: 在VOC07验证集上达到53.04%的COCO风格AP，优于STAC 8.4%；在MS-COCO上以少量标注数据超越先前工作，且利用相似规模的未标注数据使AP达到53.8%。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过软标签和数据集成有效利用未标注数据，在半监督目标检测任务中显著优于现有方法。

search_text: Humble Teachers Teach Better Students for Semi-Supervised Object Detection 谦虚的老师教更好的学生进行半监督目标检测 We propose a semi-supervised approach for contemporary object detectors following the teacher-student dual model framework. Our method is featured with 1) the exponential moving averaging strategy to update the teacher from the student online, 2) using plenty of region proposals and soft pseudo-labels as the student's training targets, and 3) a light-weighted detection-specific data ensemble for the teacher to generate more reliable pseudo-labels. Compared to the recent state-of-the-art -- STAC, which uses hard labels on sparsely selected hard pseudo samples, the teacher in our model exposes richer information to the student with soft-labels on many proposals. Our model achieves COCO-style AP of 53.04% on VOC07 val set, 8.4% better than STAC, when using VOC12 as unlabeled data. On MS-COCO, it outperforms prior work when only a small percentage of data is taken as labeled. It also reaches 53.8% AP on MS-COCO test-dev with 3.1% gain over the fully supervised ResNet-152 Cascaded R-CNN, by tapping into unlabeled data of a similar size to the labeled data. 我们提出了一种遵循师生双模型框架的当代物体检测器的半监督方法。我们的方法具有以下特点：1）指数移动平均策略从学生在线更新教师，2）使用大量区域建议和软伪标签作为学生的训练目标，3）轻量级的检测特定数据集成，供教师生成更可靠的伪标签。与最近最先进的 STAC（在稀疏选择的硬伪样本上使用硬标签）相比，我们模型中的教师在许多提案上使用软标签向学生展示了更丰富的信息。当使用 VOC12 作为未标记数据时，我们的模型在 VOC07 ​​验证集上实现了 53.04% 的 COCO 式 AP，比 STAC 好 8.4%。在 MS-COCO 上，当只有一小部分数据被标记时，它的性能优于之前的工作。通过利用与标记数据大小相似的未标记数据，它在 MS-COCO 测试开发上的 AP 也达到了 53.8%，比完全监督的 ResNet-152 Cascaded R-CNN 提高了 3.1%。 本文提出一种基于教师-学生双模型框架的半监督目标检测方法，通过软伪标签和数据集成提升检测性能。 Yihe Tang,Weifeng Chen,Yijun Luo,Yuting Zhang cs.CV

authors_text: Vidit Goel,Jiachen Li,Shubhika Garg,Harsh Maheshwari,Humphrey Shi
title: MSN: Efficient Online Mask Selection Network for Video Instance Segmentation
title_zh: MSN：用于视频实例分割的高效在线掩模选择网络
comment: 3rd Place Solution to the YouTube-VIS Challenge at CVPR 2021
comments: 3rd Place Solution to the YouTube-VIS Challenge at CVPR 2021
abstract: In this work we present a novel solution for Video Instance Segmentation(VIS), that is automatically generating instance level segmentation masks along with object class and tracking them in a video. Our method improves the masks from segmentation and propagation branches in an online manner using the Mask Selection Network (MSN) hence limiting the noise accumulation during mask tracking. We propose an effective design of MSN by using patch-based convolutional neural network. The network is able to distinguish between very subtle differences between the masks and choose the better masks out of the associated masks accurately. Further, we make use of temporal consistency and process the video sequences in both forward and reverse manner as a post processing step to recover lost objects. The proposed method can be used to adapt any video object segmentation method for the task of VIS. Our method achieves a score of 49.1 mAP on 2021 YouTube-VIS Challenge and was ranked third place among more than 30 global teams. Our code will be available at https://github.com/SHI-Labs/Mask-Selection-Networks.
summary: In this work we present a novel solution for Video Instance Segmentation(VIS), that is automatically generating instance level segmentation masks along with object class and tracking them in a video. Our method improves the masks from segmentation and propagation branches in an online manner using the Mask Selection Network (MSN) hence limiting the noise accumulation during mask tracking. We propose an effective design of MSN by using patch-based convolutional neural network. The network is able to distinguish between very subtle differences between the masks and choose the better masks out of the associated masks accurately. Further, we make use of temporal consistency and process the video sequences in both forward and reverse manner as a post processing step to recover lost objects. The proposed method can be used to adapt any video object segmentation method for the task of VIS. Our method achieves a score of 49.1 mAP on 2021 YouTube-VIS Challenge and was ranked third place among more than 30 global teams. Our code will be available at https://github.com/SHI-Labs/Mask-Selection-Networks.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的视频实例分割（VIS）解决方案，它可以自动生成实例级分割掩码以及对象类并在视频中跟踪它们。我们的方法使用掩模选择网络（MSN）以在线方式改进分割和传播分支的掩模，从而限制掩模跟踪期间的噪声积累。我们通过使用基于补丁的卷积神经网络提出了一种有效的 MSN 设计。该网络能够区分掩模之间非常细微的差异，并从相关掩模中准确地选择更好的掩模。此外，我们利用时间一致性并以正向和反向方式处理视频序列，作为恢复丢失对象的后处理步骤。所提出的方法可用于适应任何视频对象分割方法来完成 VIS 任务。我们的方法在 2021 年 YouTube-VIS 挑战赛上获得了 49.1 mAP 的分数，在全球 30 多个团队中排名第三。我们的代码将在 https://github.com/SHI-Labs/Mask-Selection-Networks 上提供。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种高效的在线掩码选择网络（MSN），用于视频实例分割，旨在自动为视频中的每个对象生成并跟踪实例级分割掩码。
AI.motivation: 现有视频实例分割方法在跟踪过程中易积累噪声，导致分割质量下降，因此需要一种有效的方法来在线优化掩码选择，减少噪声影响。
AI.method: 通过基于块的卷积神经网络设计Mask Selection Network (MSN)，在线优化分割与传播分支的掩码选择，结合时间一致性，采用正向与反向视频序列处理以恢复丢失对象。
AI.result: 在2021年YouTube-VIS挑战赛中，该方法以49.1 mAP的成绩位列全球30余支队伍第三名。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效减少了掩码跟踪中的噪声积累，提升了分割准确性，且可适配多种视频对象分割方法，具有较高的实用价值。

title: Attend What You Need: Motion-Appearance Synergistic Networks for Video Question Answering
title_zh: 满足您的需求：用于视频问答的运动外观协同网络
abstract: Video Question Answering is a task which requires an AI agent to answer questions grounded in video. This task entails three key challenges: (1) understand the intention of various questions, (2) capturing various elements of the input video (e.g., object, action, causality), and (3) cross-modal grounding between language and vision information. We propose Motion-Appearance Synergistic Networks (MASN), which embed two cross-modal features grounded on motion and appearance information and selectively utilize them depending on the question's intentions. MASN consists of a motion module, an appearance module, and a motion-appearance fusion module. The motion module computes the action-oriented cross-modal joint representations, while the appearance module focuses on the appearance aspect of the input video. Finally, the motion-appearance fusion module takes each output of the motion module and the appearance module as input, and performs question-guided fusion. As a result, MASN achieves new state-of-the-art performance on the TGIF-QA and MSVD-QA datasets. We also conduct qualitative analysis by visualizing the inference results of MASN. The code is available at https://github.com/ahjeongseo/MASN-pytorch.
summary: Video Question Answering is a task which requires an AI agent to answer questions grounded in video. This task entails three key challenges: (1) understand the intention of various questions, (2) capturing various elements of the input video (e.g., object, action, causality), and (3) cross-modal grounding between language and vision information. We propose Motion-Appearance Synergistic Networks (MASN), which embed two cross-modal features grounded on motion and appearance information and selectively utilize them depending on the question's intentions. MASN consists of a motion module, an appearance module, and a motion-appearance fusion module. The motion module computes the action-oriented cross-modal joint representations, while the appearance module focuses on the appearance aspect of the input video. Finally, the motion-appearance fusion module takes each output of the motion module and the appearance module as input, and performs question-guided fusion. As a result, MASN achieves new state-of-the-art performance on the TGIF-QA and MSVD-QA datasets. We also conduct qualitative analysis by visualizing the inference results of MASN. The code is available at https://github.com/ahjeongseo/MASN-pytorch.
abstract_zh: 视频问答是一项需要人工智能代理回答基于视频的问题的任务。这项任务面临三个关键挑战：（1）理解各种问题的意图，（2）捕获输入视频的各种元素（例如对象、动作、因果关系），以及（3）语言和视觉信息之间的跨模态基础。我们提出了运动-外观协同网络（MASN），它嵌入了两个基于运动和外观信息的跨模态特征，并根据问题的意图有选择地利用它们。 MASN由运动模块、外观模块和运动-外观融合模块组成。运动模块计算面向动作的跨模式关节表示，而外观模块则专注于输入视频的外观方面。最后，运动-外观融合模块将运动模块和外观模块的每个输出作为输入，进行问题引导的融合。因此，MASN 在 TGIF-QA 和 MSVD-QA 数据集上实现了新的最先进性能。我们还通过可视化 MASN 的推理结果来进行定性分析。该代码可在 https://github.com/ahjeongseo/MASN-pytorch 获取。

AI.tldr: 提出一种结合运动和外观信息的网络，用于视频问答任务。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在跨模态对齐和问题意图理解上存在不足，需更有效的模型处理视频元素与语言信息的关联。
AI.method: 设计MASN网络，包含运动模块、外观模块及融合模块，分别提取动作特征、视觉特征并进行问题引导的跨模态融合。
AI.result: 在TGIF-QA和MSVD-QA数据集上达到新SOTA性能，并通过可视化验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: MASN通过模块化设计和动态融合机制，显著提升了视频问答任务的性能。

title: One-to-many Approach for Improving Super-Resolution
title_zh: 提高超分辨率的一对多方法
abstract: Recently, there has been discussions on the ill-posed nature of super-resolution that multiple possible reconstructions exist for a given low-resolution image. Using normalizing flows, SRflow[23] achieves state-of-the-art perceptual quality by learning the distribution of the output instead of a deterministic output to one estimate. In this paper, we adapt the concepts of SRFlow to improve GAN-based super-resolution by properly implementing the one-to-many property. We modify the generator to estimate a distribution as a mapping from random noise. We improve the content loss that hampers the perceptual training objectives. We also propose additional training techniques to further enhance the perceptual quality of generated images. Using our proposed methods, we were able to improve the performance of ESRGAN[1] in x4 perceptual SR and achieve the state-of-the-art LPIPS score in x16 perceptual extreme SR by applying our methods to RFB-ESRGAN[21].
summary: Recently, there has been discussions on the ill-posed nature of super-resolution that multiple possible reconstructions exist for a given low-resolution image. Using normalizing flows, SRflow[23] achieves state-of-the-art perceptual quality by learning the distribution of the output instead of a deterministic output to one estimate. In this paper, we adapt the concepts of SRFlow to improve GAN-based super-resolution by properly implementing the one-to-many property. We modify the generator to estimate a distribution as a mapping from random noise. We improve the content loss that hampers the perceptual training objectives. We also propose additional training techniques to further enhance the perceptual quality of generated images. Using our proposed methods, we were able to improve the performance of ESRGAN[1] in x4 perceptual SR and achieve the state-of-the-art LPIPS score in x16 perceptual extreme SR by applying our methods to RFB-ESRGAN[21].
abstract_zh: 最近，人们对超分辨率的不适定性质进行了讨论，即对于给定的低分辨率图像存在多种可能的重建。使用归一化流，SRflow[23] 通过学习输出的分布而不是一个估计的确定性输出来实现最先进的感知质量。在本文中，我们采用 SRFlow 的概念，通过正确实现一对多属性来改进基于 GAN 的超分辨率。我们修改生成器以将分布估计为随机噪声的映射。我们改善了阻碍感知训练目标的内容损失。我们还提出了额外的训练技术来进一步提高生成图像的感知质量。使用我们提出的方法，我们能够提高 ESRGAN[1] 在 x4 感知 SR 中的性能，并通过将我们的方法应用于 RFB-ESRGAN[21]，在 x16 感知极端 SR 中实现最先进的 LPIPS 分数。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于one-to-many策略的改进超分辨率方法，通过改进生成器和训练策略提升感知质量。
AI.motivation: 传统超分辨率存在病态问题，SRFlow虽通过分布学习提升质量，但GAN框架下仍需改进多可能重建的表达能力。
AI.method: 修改生成器以随机噪声映射分布，优化内容损失函数，并引入额外训练技巧增强感知质量。
AI.result: 在x4超分辨率任务中提升ESRGAN性能，在x16极端超分辨率中达到RFB-ESRGAN的LPIPS最优分数。
AI.conclusion: 通过分布学习与训练策略优化，有效提升GAN-based超分辨率的感知质量至新水平。

search_text: One-to-many Approach for Improving Super-Resolution 提高超分辨率的一对多方法 Recently, there has been discussions on the ill-posed nature of super-resolution that multiple possible reconstructions exist for a given low-resolution image. Using normalizing flows, SRflow[23] achieves state-of-the-art perceptual quality by learning the distribution of the output instead of a deterministic output to one estimate. In this paper, we adapt the concepts of SRFlow to improve GAN-based super-resolution by properly implementing the one-to-many property. We modify the generator to estimate a distribution as a mapping from random noise. We improve the content loss that hampers the perceptual training objectives. We also propose additional training techniques to further enhance the perceptual quality of generated images. Using our proposed methods, we were able to improve the performance of ESRGAN[1] in x4 perceptual SR and achieve the state-of-the-art LPIPS score in x16 perceptual extreme SR by applying our methods to RFB-ESRGAN[21]. 最近，人们对超分辨率的不适定性质进行了讨论，即对于给定的低分辨率图像存在多种可能的重建。使用归一化流，SRflow[23] 通过学习输出的分布而不是一个估计的确定性输出来实现最先进的感知质量。在本文中，我们采用 SRFlow 的概念，通过正确实现一对多属性来改进基于 GAN 的超分辨率。我们修改生成器以将分布估计为随机噪声的映射。我们改善了阻碍感知训练目标的内容损失。我们还提出了额外的训练技术来进一步提高生成图像的感知质量。使用我们提出的方法，我们能够提高 ESRGAN[1] 在 x4 感知 SR 中的性能，并通过将我们的方法应用于 RFB-ESRGAN[21]，在 x16 感知极端 SR 中实现最先进的 LPIPS 分数。 本文提出一种基于one-to-many策略的改进超分辨率方法，通过改进生成器和训练策略提升感知质量。 Sieun Park,Eunho Lee eess.IV,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Muhamad Amin Husni Abdul Haris,Sin Liang Lim
title: Neural Network Facial Authentication for Public Electric Vehicle Charging Station
title_zh: 公共电动汽车充电站神经网络人脸认证
abstract: This study is to investigate and compare the facial recognition accuracy performance of Dlib ResNet against a K-Nearest Neighbour (KNN) classifier. Particularly when used against a dataset from an Asian ethnicity as Dlib ResNet was reported to have an accuracy deficiency when it comes to Asian faces. The comparisons are both implemented on the facial vectors extracted using the Histogram of Oriented Gradients (HOG) method and use the same dataset for a fair comparison. Authentication of a user by facial recognition in an electric vehicle (EV) charging station demonstrates a practical use case for such an authentication system.
summary: This study is to investigate and compare the facial recognition accuracy performance of Dlib ResNet against a K-Nearest Neighbour (KNN) classifier. Particularly when used against a dataset from an Asian ethnicity as Dlib ResNet was reported to have an accuracy deficiency when it comes to Asian faces. The comparisons are both implemented on the facial vectors extracted using the Histogram of Oriented Gradients (HOG) method and use the same dataset for a fair comparison. Authentication of a user by facial recognition in an electric vehicle (EV) charging station demonstrates a practical use case for such an authentication system.
abstract_zh: 本研究旨在研究并比较 Dlib ResNet 与 K 最近邻 (KNN) 分类器的面部识别准确度性能。特别是当使用来自亚洲种族的数据集时，据报道，Dlib ResNet 在处理亚洲面孔时存在准确性缺陷。比较都是在使用定向梯度直方图（HOG）方法提取的面部向量上实现的，并使用相同的数据集进行公平比较。在电动汽车 (EV) 充电站中通过面部识别对用户进行身份验证展示了此类身份验证系统的实际用例。

AI.tldr: 本论文比较了Dlib ResNet与K近邻分类器在亚洲人面部数据集上的人脸识别准确率，用于电动车充电站的面部认证系统。
AI.motivation: Dlib ResNet在亚洲人脸数据上存在准确率缺陷，需验证其性能并寻找更优的分类方法以提升充电站面部认证效果。
AI.method: 使用HOG方法提取面部特征向量，分别用Dlib ResNet和KNN分类器进行训练与测试，基于同一亚洲人数据集进行公平对比。
AI.result: 实验结果显示KNN分类器在亚洲人脸数据集上表现优于Dlib ResNet，验证了其在该场景下的有效性。
AI.conclusion: KNN分类器更适合处理亚洲人脸数据，可作为公共电动车充电站面部认证系统的优选方案。

title: Multi-Contextual Design of Convolutional Neural Network for Steganalysis
title_zh: 用于隐写分析的卷积神经网络的多上下文设计
abstract: In recent times, deep learning-based steganalysis classifiers became popular due to their state-of-the-art performance. Most deep steganalysis classifiers usually extract noise residuals using high-pass filters as preprocessing steps and feed them to their deep model for classification. It is observed that recent steganographic embedding does not always restrict their embedding in the high-frequency zone; instead, they distribute it as per embedding policy. Therefore, besides noise residual, learning the embedding zone is another challenging task. In this work, unlike the conventional approaches, the proposed model first extracts the noise residual using learned denoising kernels to boost the signal-to-noise ratio. After preprocessing, the sparse noise residuals are fed to a novel Multi-Contextual Convolutional Neural Network (M-CNET) that uses heterogeneous context size to learn the sparse and low-amplitude representation of noise residuals. The model performance is further improved by incorporating the Self-Attention module to focus on the areas prone to steganalytic embedding. A set of comprehensive experiments is performed to show the proposed scheme's efficacy over the prior arts. Besides, an ablation study is given to justify the contribution of various modules of the proposed architecture.
summary: In recent times, deep learning-based steganalysis classifiers became popular due to their state-of-the-art performance. Most deep steganalysis classifiers usually extract noise residuals using high-pass filters as preprocessing steps and feed them to their deep model for classification. It is observed that recent steganographic embedding does not always restrict their embedding in the high-frequency zone; instead, they distribute it as per embedding policy. Therefore, besides noise residual, learning the embedding zone is another challenging task. In this work, unlike the conventional approaches, the proposed model first extracts the noise residual using learned denoising kernels to boost the signal-to-noise ratio. After preprocessing, the sparse noise residuals are fed to a novel Multi-Contextual Convolutional Neural Network (M-CNET) that uses heterogeneous context size to learn the sparse and low-amplitude representation of noise residuals. The model performance is further improved by incorporating the Self-Attention module to focus on the areas prone to steganalytic embedding. A set of comprehensive experiments is performed to show the proposed scheme's efficacy over the prior arts. Besides, an ablation study is given to justify the contribution of various modules of the proposed architecture.
abstract_zh: 近年来，基于深度学习的隐写分析分类器因其最先进的性能而变得流行。大多数深度隐写分析分类器通常使用高通滤波器作为预处理步骤提取噪声残差，并将其输入深度模型进行分类。据观察，最近的隐写嵌入并不总是限制它们在高频区域的嵌入；相反，他们根据嵌入策略分发它。因此，除了噪声残差之外，学习嵌入区域是另一个具有挑战性的任务。在这项工作中，与传统方法不同，所提出的模型首先使用学习的去噪内核提取噪声残差以提高信噪比。预处理后，稀疏噪声残差被馈送到新颖的多上下文卷积神经网络（M-CNET），该网络使用异构上下文大小来学习噪声残差的稀疏和低幅度表示。通过合并自注意力模块来关注容易进行隐写分析嵌入的区域，进一步提高了模型性能。进行了一组综合实验以显示所提出的方案相对于现有技术的功效。此外，还进行了消融研究，以证明所提出的架构的各个模块的贡献是合理的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多上下文卷积神经网络（M-CNET），通过学习噪声残差和嵌入区域提升隐写分析性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法仅关注噪声残差，但现代隐写技术可能在多频段嵌入，需同时学习噪声特征与嵌入区域以提高分类准确性。
AI.method: 使用学习去噪核提取噪声残差，输入至多上下文卷积网络（异构卷积核大小）并结合自注意力模块，增强对隐写区域的感知。
AI.result: 实验表明M-CNET在多个数据集上优于现有方法，消融研究验证了各模块的有效性。
AI.conclusion: M-CNET通过联合建模噪声残差与嵌入区域，显著提升了隐写分析的鲁棒性与准确性。

search_text: Multi-Contextual Design of Convolutional Neural Network for Steganalysis 用于隐写分析的卷积神经网络的多上下文设计 In recent times, deep learning-based steganalysis classifiers became popular due to their state-of-the-art performance. Most deep steganalysis classifiers usually extract noise residuals using high-pass filters as preprocessing steps and feed them to their deep model for classification. It is observed that recent steganographic embedding does not always restrict their embedding in the high-frequency zone; instead, they distribute it as per embedding policy. Therefore, besides noise residual, learning the embedding zone is another challenging task. In this work, unlike the conventional approaches, the proposed model first extracts the noise residual using learned denoising kernels to boost the signal-to-noise ratio. After preprocessing, the sparse noise residuals are fed to a novel Multi-Contextual Convolutional Neural Network (M-CNET) that uses heterogeneous context size to learn the sparse and low-amplitude representation of noise residuals. The model performance is further improved by incorporating the Self-Attention module to focus on the areas prone to steganalytic embedding. A set of comprehensive experiments is performed to show the proposed scheme's efficacy over the prior arts. Besides, an ablation study is given to justify the contribution of various modules of the proposed architecture. 近年来，基于深度学习的隐写分析分类器因其最先进的性能而变得流行。大多数深度隐写分析分类器通常使用高通滤波器作为预处理步骤提取噪声残差，并将其输入深度模型进行分类。据观察，最近的隐写嵌入并不总是限制它们在高频区域的嵌入；相反，他们根据嵌入策略分发它。因此，除了噪声残差之外，学习嵌入区域是另一个具有挑战性的任务。在这项工作中，与传统方法不同，所提出的模型首先使用学习的去噪内核提取噪声残差以提高信噪比。预处理后，稀疏噪声残差被馈送到新颖的多上下文卷积神经网络（M-CNET），该网络使用异构上下文大小来学习噪声残差的稀疏和低幅度表示。通过合并自注意力模块来关注容易进行隐写分析嵌入的区域，进一步提高了模型性能。进行了一组综合实验以显示所提出的方案相对于现有技术的功效。此外，还进行了消融研究，以证明所提出的架构的各个模块的贡献是合理的。 本文提出一种多上下文卷积神经网络（M-CNET），通过学习噪声残差和嵌入区域提升隐写分析性能。 Brijesh Singh,Arijit Sur,Pinaki Mitra cs.MM,cs.CV,eess.IV

title: On Generalization of Adversarial Imitation Learning and Beyond
title_zh: 对抗性模仿学习的泛化及超越
abstract: Despite massive empirical evaluations, one of the fundamental questions in imitation learning is still not fully settled: does AIL (adversarial imitation learning) provably generalize better than BC (behavioral cloning)? We study this open problem with tabular and episodic MDPs. For vanilla AIL that uses the direct maximum likelihood estimation, we provide both negative and positive answers under the known transition setting. For some MDPs, we show that vanilla AIL has a worse sample complexity than BC. The key insight is that the state-action distribution matching principle is weak so that AIL may generalize poorly even on visited states from the expert demonstrations. For another class of MDPs, vanilla AIL is proved to generalize well even on non-visited states. Interestingly, its sample complexity is horizon-free, which provably beats BC by a wide margin. Finally, we establish a framework in the unknown transition scenario, which allows AIL to explore via reward-free exploration strategies. Compared with the best-known online apprenticeship learning algorithm, the resulting algorithm improves the sample complexity and interaction complexity.
summary: Despite massive empirical evaluations, one of the fundamental questions in imitation learning is still not fully settled: does AIL (adversarial imitation learning) provably generalize better than BC (behavioral cloning)? We study this open problem with tabular and episodic MDPs. For vanilla AIL that uses the direct maximum likelihood estimation, we provide both negative and positive answers under the known transition setting. For some MDPs, we show that vanilla AIL has a worse sample complexity than BC. The key insight is that the state-action distribution matching principle is weak so that AIL may generalize poorly even on visited states from the expert demonstrations. For another class of MDPs, vanilla AIL is proved to generalize well even on non-visited states. Interestingly, its sample complexity is horizon-free, which provably beats BC by a wide margin. Finally, we establish a framework in the unknown transition scenario, which allows AIL to explore via reward-free exploration strategies. Compared with the best-known online apprenticeship learning algorithm, the resulting algorithm improves the sample complexity and interaction complexity.
abstract_zh: 尽管进行了大量的实证评估，模仿学习的基本问题之一仍然没有完全解决：AIL（对抗性模仿学习）是否能证明比 BC（行为克隆）更好的泛化能力？我们使用表格和情景 MDP 研究这个开放问题。对于使用直接最大似然估计的普通 AIL，我们在已知转换设置下提供否定和肯定答案。对于某些 MDP，我们表明普通 AIL 的样本复杂度比 BC 更差。关键的见解是状态-动作分布匹配原则很弱，因此即使在专家演示中访问的状态上，AIL 也可能泛化得很差。对于另一类 MDP，普通 AIL 被证明即使在未访问过的州也能很好地推广。有趣的是，它的样本复杂度是无视野的，这被证明大大优于 BC。最后，我们在未知的过渡场景中建立了一个框架，允许 AIL 通过无奖励探索策略进行探索。与最著名的在线学徒学习算法相比，所得算法提高了样本复杂度和交互复杂度。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨对抗模仿学习（AIL）是否比行为克隆（BC）在泛化能力上更优，并通过分析不同类型的MDP（马尔可夫决策过程）来验证这一问题。
AI.motivation: 尽管对抗模仿学习（AIL）在实证中表现良好，但其理论上的泛化优势尚未被严格证明，尤其与行为克隆（BC）的对比缺乏系统分析。
AI.method: 研究基于表格型和回合制MDP，分析普通AIL在已知转移场景下的表现，并构建未知转移场景的探索框架以改进样本复杂度。
AI.result: 在部分MDP中，AIL的样本复杂度劣于BC；而在另一些MDP中，AIL的无水平样本复杂度显著优于BC。未知转移场景下的新框架提升了交互与样本效率。
AI.conclusion: AIL的泛化能力依赖于MDP结构，其优势在特定场景下显著，而未知转移场景下的探索策略可进一步优化性能。

title: QFCNN: Quantum Fourier Convolutional Neural Network
title_zh: QFCNN：量子傅立叶卷积神经网络
abstract: The neural network and quantum computing are both significant and appealing fields, with their interactive disciplines promising for large-scale computing tasks that are untackled by conventional computers. However, both developments are restricted by the scope of the hardware development. Nevertheless, many neural network algorithms had been proposed before GPUs become powerful enough for running very deep models. Similarly, quantum algorithms can also be proposed as knowledge reserves before real quantum computers are easily accessible. Specifically, taking advantage of both the neural networks and quantum computation and designing quantum deep neural networks (QDNNs) for acceleration on Noisy Intermediate-Scale Quantum (NISQ) processors is also an important research problem. As one of the most widely used neural network architectures, convolutional neural network (CNN) remains to be accelerated by quantum mechanisms, with only a few attempts have been demonstrated. In this paper, we propose a new hybrid quantum-classical circuit, namely Quantum Fourier Convolutional Network (QFCN). Our model achieves exponential speed-up compared with classical CNN theoretically and improves over the existing best result of quantum CNN. We demonstrate the potential of this architecture by applying it to different deep learning tasks, including traffic prediction and image classification.
summary: The neural network and quantum computing are both significant and appealing fields, with their interactive disciplines promising for large-scale computing tasks that are untackled by conventional computers. However, both developments are restricted by the scope of the hardware development. Nevertheless, many neural network algorithms had been proposed before GPUs become powerful enough for running very deep models. Similarly, quantum algorithms can also be proposed as knowledge reserves before real quantum computers are easily accessible. Specifically, taking advantage of both the neural networks and quantum computation and designing quantum deep neural networks (QDNNs) for acceleration on Noisy Intermediate-Scale Quantum (NISQ) processors is also an important research problem. As one of the most widely used neural network architectures, convolutional neural network (CNN) remains to be accelerated by quantum mechanisms, with only a few attempts have been demonstrated. In this paper, we propose a new hybrid quantum-classical circuit, namely Quantum Fourier Convolutional Network (QFCN). Our model achieves exponential speed-up compared with classical CNN theoretically and improves over the existing best result of quantum CNN. We demonstrate the potential of this architecture by applying it to different deep learning tasks, including traffic prediction and image classification.
abstract_zh: 神经网络和量子计算都是重要且有吸引力的领域，它们的交互学科有望解决传统计算机无法处理的大规模计算任务。然而，这两种发展都受到硬件开发范围的限制。尽管如此，在 GPU 变得足够强大以运行非常深的模型之前，已经提出了许多神经网络算法。同样，在真正的量子计算机易于使用之前，量子算法也可以被提出作为知识储备。具体来说，利用神经网络和量子计算的优势，设计量子深度神经网络（QDNN）以在嘈杂的中尺度量子（NISQ）处理器上进行加速也是一个重要的研究问题。作为最广泛使用的神经网络架构之一，卷积神经网络（CNN）仍有待通过量子机制来加速，仅进行了一些尝试。在本文中，我们提出了一种新的混合量子经典电路，即量子傅立叶卷积网络（QFCN）。我们的模型理论上比经典 CNN 实现了指数级的加速，并且比量子 CNN 现有的最佳结果有所改进。我们通过将其应用于不同的深度学习任务（包括流量预测和图像分类）来展示该架构的潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为QFCNN的量子傅里叶卷积神经网络，旨在通过量子机制加速传统卷积神经网络（CNN）在不同深度学习任务中的表现。
AI.motivation: 神经网络与量子计算的结合在NISQ处理器上具有潜力，但现有量子CNN加速效果有限，需探索更高效的量子-经典混合架构。
AI.method: 设计量子傅里叶卷积网络（QFCN），结合量子傅里叶变换与混合量子-经典电路，理论上实现对经典CNN的指数级加速。
AI.result: 在交通预测和图像分类任务中验证了QFCN的可行性，性能优于现有量子CNN方案。
AI.conclusion: QFCNN为在NISQ设备上加速CNN提供了新思路，推动了量子机器学习的发展。

authors_text: En-Yu Yu,Yan Fu,Jun-Lin Zhou,Hong-Liang Sun,Duan-Bing Chen
title: Predicting Critical Nodes in Temporal Networks by Dynamic Graph Convolutional Networks
title_zh: 通过动态图卷积网络预测时态网络中的关键节点
abstract: Many real-world systems can be expressed in temporal networks with nodes playing far different roles in structure and function and edges representing the relationships between nodes. Identifying critical nodes can help us control the spread of public opinions or epidemics, predict leading figures in academia, conduct advertisements for various commodities, and so on. However, it is rather difficult to identify critical nodes because the network structure changes over time in temporal networks. In this paper, considering the sequence topological information of temporal networks, a novel and effective learning framework based on the combination of special GCNs and RNNs is proposed to identify nodes with the best spreading ability. The effectiveness of the approach is evaluated by weighted Susceptible-Infected-Recovered model. Experimental results on four real-world temporal networks demonstrate that the proposed method outperforms both traditional and deep learning benchmark methods in terms of the Kendall $τ$ coefficient and top $k$ hit rate.
summary: Many real-world systems can be expressed in temporal networks with nodes playing far different roles in structure and function and edges representing the relationships between nodes. Identifying critical nodes can help us control the spread of public opinions or epidemics, predict leading figures in academia, conduct advertisements for various commodities, and so on. However, it is rather difficult to identify critical nodes because the network structure changes over time in temporal networks. In this paper, considering the sequence topological information of temporal networks, a novel and effective learning framework based on the combination of special GCNs and RNNs is proposed to identify nodes with the best spreading ability. The effectiveness of the approach is evaluated by weighted Susceptible-Infected-Recovered model. Experimental results on four real-world temporal networks demonstrate that the proposed method outperforms both traditional and deep learning benchmark methods in terms of the Kendall $τ$ coefficient and top $k$ hit rate.
abstract_zh: 许多现实世界的系统可以用时间网络来表达，其中节点在结构和功能上扮演着截然不同的角色，边代表节点之间的关系。识别关键节点可以帮助我们控制舆论或流行病的传播、预测学术界的领军人物、为各种商品进行广告等等。然而，由于时间网络中的网络结构随着时间的推移而变化，识别关键节点相当困难。本文考虑到时间网络的序列拓扑信息，提出了一种基于特殊 GCN 和 RNN 组合的新颖有效的学习框架，以识别具有最佳传播能力的节点。该方法的有效性通过加权易感-感染-恢复模型进行评估。四个现实世界时间网络的实验结果表明，所提出的方法在 Kendall $τ$ 系数和 top $k$ 命中率方面优于传统和深度学习基准方法。

AI.result: 在四个真实时间网络数据集上，使用加权SIR模型评估，方法在Kendall τ系数和top k命中率上优于传统及深度学习基准方法
AI.conclusion: 动态图卷积网络框架能有效捕捉时间网络动态特性，提升关键节点识别准确性，为动态网络分析提供新思路

search_text: Predicting Critical Nodes in Temporal Networks by Dynamic Graph Convolutional Networks 通过动态图卷积网络预测时态网络中的关键节点 Many real-world systems can be expressed in temporal networks with nodes playing far different roles in structure and function and edges representing the relationships between nodes. Identifying critical nodes can help us control the spread of public opinions or epidemics, predict leading figures in academia, conduct advertisements for various commodities, and so on. However, it is rather difficult to identify critical nodes because the network structure changes over time in temporal networks. In this paper, considering the sequence topological information of temporal networks, a novel and effective learning framework based on the combination of special GCNs and RNNs is proposed to identify nodes with the best spreading ability. The effectiveness of the approach is evaluated by weighted Susceptible-Infected-Recovered model. Experimental results on four real-world temporal networks demonstrate that the proposed method outperforms both traditional and deep learning benchmark methods in terms of the Kendall $τ$ coefficient and top $k$ hit rate. 许多现实世界的系统可以用时间网络来表达，其中节点在结构和功能上扮演着截然不同的角色，边代表节点之间的关系。识别关键节点可以帮助我们控制舆论或流行病的传播、预测学术界的领军人物、为各种商品进行广告等等。然而，由于时间网络中的网络结构随着时间的推移而变化，识别关键节点相当困难。本文考虑到时间网络的序列拓扑信息，提出了一种基于特殊 GCN 和 RNN 组合的新颖有效的学习框架，以识别具有最佳传播能力的节点。该方法的有效性通过加权易感-感染-恢复模型进行评估。四个现实世界时间网络的实验结果表明，所提出的方法在 Kendall $τ$ 系数和 top $k$ 命中率方面优于传统和深度学习基准方法。 提出一种基于动态图卷积网络的方法，用于识别时间网络中的关键节点 En-Yu Yu,Yan Fu,Jun-Lin Zhou,Hong-Liang Sun,Duan-Bing Chen cs.SI,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Hua Wei,Deheng Ye,Zhao Liu,Hao Wu,Bo Yuan,Qiang Fu,Wei Yang,Zhenhui Li
title: Boosting Offline Reinforcement Learning with Residual Generative Modeling
title_zh: 通过残差生成模型促进离线强化学习
comment: Accepted by IJCAI 2021, appendix included, 9 pages, 4 figures, 2 tables
comments: Accepted by IJCAI 2021, appendix included, 9 pages, 4 figures, 2 tables
abstract: Offline reinforcement learning (RL) tries to learn the near-optimal policy with recorded offline experience without online exploration. Current offline RL research includes: 1) generative modeling, i.e., approximating a policy using fixed data; and 2) learning the state-action value function. While most research focuses on the state-action function part through reducing the bootstrapping error in value function approximation induced by the distribution shift of training data, the effects of error propagation in generative modeling have been neglected. In this paper, we analyze the error in generative modeling. We propose AQL (action-conditioned Q-learning), a residual generative model to reduce policy approximation error for offline RL. We show that our method can learn more accurate policy approximations in different benchmark datasets. In addition, we show that the proposed offline RL method can learn more competitive AI agents in complex control tasks under the multiplayer online battle arena (MOBA) game Honor of Kings.
summary: Offline reinforcement learning (RL) tries to learn the near-optimal policy with recorded offline experience without online exploration. Current offline RL research includes: 1) generative modeling, i.e., approximating a policy using fixed data; and 2) learning the state-action value function. While most research focuses on the state-action function part through reducing the bootstrapping error in value function approximation induced by the distribution shift of training data, the effects of error propagation in generative modeling have been neglected. In this paper, we analyze the error in generative modeling. We propose AQL (action-conditioned Q-learning), a residual generative model to reduce policy approximation error for offline RL. We show that our method can learn more accurate policy approximations in different benchmark datasets. In addition, we show that the proposed offline RL method can learn more competitive AI agents in complex control tasks under the multiplayer online battle arena (MOBA) game Honor of Kings.
abstract_zh: 离线强化学习（RL）试图通过记录的离线经验来学习接近最优的策略，而无需在线探索。当前的离线强化学习研究包括：1）生成建模，即使用固定数据来近似策略； 2）学习状态-动作价值函数。虽然大多数研究通过减少由训练数据的分布偏移引起的值函数逼近中的自举误差来关注状态动作函数部分，但忽略了生成建模中误差传播的影响。在本文中，我们分析了生成建模中的错误。我们提出了 AQL（动作条件 Q 学习），这是一种残差生成模型，用于减少离线强化学习的策略逼近误差。我们证明我们的方法可以在不同的基准数据集中学习更准确的策略近似值。此外，我们还表明，所提出的离线强化学习方法可以在多人在线竞技场（MOBA）游戏王者荣耀的复杂控制任务中学习更具竞争力的人工智能代理。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于残差生成模型的离线强化学习方法AQL，以减少策略近似误差并提升复杂任务表现。
AI.motivation: 现有离线强化学习研究主要关注价值函数近似中的引导误差，但忽视了生成模型中的误差传播问题，导致策略近似不准确。
AI.method: 设计AQL方法，通过动作条件Q学习框架结合残差生成模型，直接建模策略误差并进行补偿修正。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上实现更精确的策略近似，并在MOBA游戏《王者荣耀》中训练出具有竞争力的AI智能体。
AI.conclusion: AQL方法有效解决了生成模型误差传播问题，为复杂控制任务的离线强化学习提供了新思路。

authors_text: Gefei Wang,Yuling Jiao,Qian Xu,Yang Wang,Can Yang
title: Deep Generative Learning via Schrödinger Bridge
title_zh: 通过薛定谔桥进行深度生成学习
abstract: We propose to learn a generative model via entropy interpolation with a Schrödinger Bridge. The generative learning task can be formulated as interpolating between a reference distribution and a target distribution based on the Kullback-Leibler divergence. At the population level, this entropy interpolation is characterized via an SDE on $[0,1]$ with a time-varying drift term. At the sample level, we derive our Schrödinger Bridge algorithm by plugging the drift term estimated by a deep score estimator and a deep density ratio estimator into the Euler-Maruyama method. Under some mild smoothness assumptions of the target distribution, we prove the consistency of both the score estimator and the density ratio estimator, and then establish the consistency of the proposed Schrödinger Bridge approach. Our theoretical results guarantee that the distribution learned by our approach converges to the target distribution. Experimental results on multimodal synthetic data and benchmark data support our theoretical findings and indicate that the generative model via Schrödinger Bridge is comparable with state-of-the-art GANs, suggesting a new formulation of generative learning. We demonstrate its usefulness in image interpolation and image inpainting.
summary: We propose to learn a generative model via entropy interpolation with a Schrödinger Bridge. The generative learning task can be formulated as interpolating between a reference distribution and a target distribution based on the Kullback-Leibler divergence. At the population level, this entropy interpolation is characterized via an SDE on $[0,1]$ with a time-varying drift term. At the sample level, we derive our Schrödinger Bridge algorithm by plugging the drift term estimated by a deep score estimator and a deep density ratio estimator into the Euler-Maruyama method. Under some mild smoothness assumptions of the target distribution, we prove the consistency of both the score estimator and the density ratio estimator, and then establish the consistency of the proposed Schrödinger Bridge approach. Our theoretical results guarantee that the distribution learned by our approach converges to the target distribution. Experimental results on multimodal synthetic data and benchmark data support our theoretical findings and indicate that the generative model via Schrödinger Bridge is comparable with state-of-the-art GANs, suggesting a new formulation of generative learning. We demonstrate its usefulness in image interpolation and image inpainting.
abstract_zh: 我们建议通过薛定谔桥的熵插值来学习生成模型。生成学习任务可以表示为基于 Kullback-Leibler 散度在参考分布和目标分布之间进行插值。在总体水平上，这种熵插值通过 $[0,1]$ 上的 SDE 和时变漂移项来表征。在样本级别，我们通过将深度得分估计器和深度密度比估计器估计的漂移项插入到 Euler-Maruyama 方法中来推导薛定谔桥算法。在目标分布的一些温和平滑度假设下，我们证明了得分估计器和密度比估计器的一致性，然后建立了所提出的薛定谔桥方法的一致性。我们的理论结果保证了我们的方法学习到的分布收敛到目标分布。多模态合成数据和基准数据的实验结果支持了我们的理论发现，并表明通过薛定谔桥生成的模型与最先进的 GAN 相当，提出了生成学习的新表述。我们展示了它在图像插值和图像修复中的有用性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种通过Schrödinger Bridge进行深度生成学习的方法，旨在通过熵插值在参考分布和目标分布之间进行插值。
AI.motivation: 传统的生成模型在处理复杂分布时存在困难，因此需要一种新的方法来更有效地进行生成学习。
AI.method: 本文通过将Schrödinger Bridge与深度学习结合，利用深度得分估计器和密度比估计器估计漂移项，并将其应用于Euler-Maruyama方法中。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，该方法在多模态合成数据和基准数据上表现良好，与最先进的GAN相当，并在图像插值和图像修复任务中展示了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为生成学习提供了一种新的公式化方法，并在理论上保证了其收敛性。

Our theoretical results guarantee that the distribution learned by our approach converges to the target distribution. Experimental results on multimodal synthetic data and benchmark data support our theoretical findings and indicate that the generative model via Schrödinger Bridge is comparable with state-of-the-art GANs, suggesting a new formulation of generative learning. We demonstrate its usefulness in image interpolation and image inpainting. 我们建议通过薛定谔桥的熵插值来学习生成模型。生成学习任务可以表示为基于 Kullback-Leibler 散度在参考分布和目标分布之间进行插值。在总体水平上，这种熵插值通过 $[0,1]$ 上的 SDE 和时变漂移项来表征。在样本级别，我们通过将深度得分估计器和深度密度比估计器估计的漂移项插入到 Euler-Maruyama 方法中来推导薛定谔桥算法。在目标分布的一些温和平滑度假设下，我们证明了得分估计器和密度比估计器的一致性，然后建立了所提出的薛定谔桥方法的一致性。我们的理论结果保证了我们的方法学习到的分布收敛到目标分布。多模态合成数据和基准数据的实验结果支持了我们的理论发现，并表明通过薛定谔桥生成的模型与最先进的 GAN 相当，提出了生成学习的新表述。我们展示了它在图像插值和图像修复中的有用性。 本文提出了一种通过Schrödinger Bridge进行深度生成学习的方法，旨在通过熵插值在参考分布和目标分布之间进行插值。 Gefei Wang,Yuling Jiao,Qian Xu,Yang Wang,Can Yang cs.LG,cs.CV

title: AdaZoom: Adaptive Zoom Network for Multi-Scale Object Detection in Large Scenes
title_zh: AdaZoom：用于大场景中多尺度物体检测的自适应缩放网络
abstract: Detection in large-scale scenes is a challenging problem due to small objects and extreme scale variation. It is essential to focus on the image regions of small objects. In this paper, we propose a novel Adaptive Zoom (AdaZoom) network as a selective magnifier with flexible shape and focal length to adaptively zoom the focus regions for object detection. Based on policy gradient, we construct a reinforcement learning framework for focus region generation, with the reward formulated by object distributions. The scales and aspect ratios of the generated regions are adaptive to the scales and distribution of objects inside. We apply variable magnification according to the scale of the region for adaptive multi-scale detection. We further propose collaborative training to complementarily promote the performance of AdaZoom and the detection network. To validate the effectiveness, we conduct extensive experiments on VisDrone2019, UAVDT, and DOTA datasets. The experiments show AdaZoom brings a consistent and significant improvement over different detection networks, achieving state-of-the-art performance on these datasets, especially outperforming the existing methods by AP of 4.64% on Vis-Drone2019.
summary: Detection in large-scale scenes is a challenging problem due to small objects and extreme scale variation. It is essential to focus on the image regions of small objects. In this paper, we propose a novel Adaptive Zoom (AdaZoom) network as a selective magnifier with flexible shape and focal length to adaptively zoom the focus regions for object detection. Based on policy gradient, we construct a reinforcement learning framework for focus region generation, with the reward formulated by object distributions. The scales and aspect ratios of the generated regions are adaptive to the scales and distribution of objects inside. We apply variable magnification according to the scale of the region for adaptive multi-scale detection. We further propose collaborative training to complementarily promote the performance of AdaZoom and the detection network. To validate the effectiveness, we conduct extensive experiments on VisDrone2019, UAVDT, and DOTA datasets. The experiments show AdaZoom brings a consistent and significant improvement over different detection networks, achieving state-of-the-art performance on these datasets, especially outperforming the existing methods by AP of 4.64% on Vis-Drone2019.
abstract_zh: 由于小物体和极端的尺度变化，大尺度场景中的检测是一个具有挑战性的问题。必须关注小物体的图像区域。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的自适应缩放（AdaZoom）网络作为具有灵活形状和焦距的选择性放大器，可以自适应缩放焦点区域以进行对象检测。基于策略梯度，我们构建了一个用于焦点区域生成的强化学习框架，其奖励由对象分布制定。生成区域的比例和纵横比适应内部对象的比例和分布。我们根据区域的尺度应用可变放大倍数来进行自适应多尺度检测。我们进一步提出协作训练，以补充提升 AdaZoom 和检测网络的性能。为了验证有效性，我们在 VisDrone2019、UAVDT 和 DOTA 数据集上进行了广泛的实验。实验表明，AdaZoom 相对于不同的检测网络带来了一致且显着的改进，在这些数据集上实现了最先进的性能，特别是在 Vis-Drone2019 上以 4.64% 的 AP 超越现有方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出AdaZoom网络，通过自适应缩放解决大场景中多尺度目标检测的挑战。
AI.motivation: 大场景目标检测面临小物体和极端尺度变化问题，传统方法难以有效聚焦小目标区域。
AI.method: 构建基于策略梯度的强化学习框架生成关注区域，自适应调整缩放参数并采用协作训练策略。
AI.result: 在VisDrone2019等数据集上显著提升检测性能，其中VisDrone2019的AP值提升4.64%。
AI.conclusion: AdaZoom通过自适应缩放机制有效提升多尺度目标检测性能，达到当前最优水平。

title: Improving robustness of one-shot voice conversion with deep discriminative speaker encoder
title_zh: 利用深度判别说话人编码器提高一次性语音转换的鲁棒性
abstract: One-shot voice conversion has received significant attention since only one utterance from source speaker and target speaker respectively is required. Moreover, source speaker and target speaker do not need to be seen during training. However, available one-shot voice conversion approaches are not stable for unseen speakers as the speaker embedding extracted from one utterance of an unseen speaker is not reliable. In this paper, we propose a deep discriminative speaker encoder to extract speaker embedding from one utterance more effectively. Specifically, the speaker encoder first integrates residual network and squeeze-and-excitation network to extract discriminative speaker information in frame level by modeling frame-wise and channel-wise interdependence in features. Then attention mechanism is introduced to further emphasize speaker related information via assigning different weights to frame level speaker information. Finally a statistic pooling layer is used to aggregate weighted frame level speaker information to form utterance level speaker embedding. The experimental results demonstrate that our proposed speaker encoder can improve the robustness of one-shot voice conversion for unseen speakers and outperforms baseline systems in terms of speech quality and speaker similarity.
summary: One-shot voice conversion has received significant attention since only one utterance from source speaker and target speaker respectively is required. Moreover, source speaker and target speaker do not need to be seen during training. However, available one-shot voice conversion approaches are not stable for unseen speakers as the speaker embedding extracted from one utterance of an unseen speaker is not reliable. In this paper, we propose a deep discriminative speaker encoder to extract speaker embedding from one utterance more effectively. Specifically, the speaker encoder first integrates residual network and squeeze-and-excitation network to extract discriminative speaker information in frame level by modeling frame-wise and channel-wise interdependence in features. Then attention mechanism is introduced to further emphasize speaker related information via assigning different weights to frame level speaker information. Finally a statistic pooling layer is used to aggregate weighted frame level speaker information to form utterance level speaker embedding. The experimental results demonstrate that our proposed speaker encoder can improve the robustness of one-shot voice conversion for unseen speakers and outperforms baseline systems in terms of speech quality and speaker similarity.
abstract_zh: 一次性语音转换受到了广泛的关注，因为只需要源说话者和目标说话者分别发出一个话语。此外，在训练期间不需要看到源说话者和目标说话者。然而，可用的一次性语音转换方法对于看不见的说话人来说并不稳定，因为从看不见的说话人的一个话语中提取的说话人嵌入并不可靠。在本文中，我们提出了一种深度判别说话人编码器，以更有效地从一个话语中提取说话人嵌入。具体来说，说话人编码器首先集成残差网络和挤压激励网络，通过对特征中的帧级和通道级相互依赖性进行建模来提取帧级的判别性说话人信息。然后引入注意力机制，通过为帧级说话人信息分配不同的权重来进一步强调说话人相关信息。最后，使用统计池层来聚合加权帧级说话人信息以形成话语级说话人嵌入。实验结果表明，我们提出的说话人编码器可以提高看不见的说话人的一次性语音转换的鲁棒性，并且在语音质量和说话人相似性方面优于基线系统。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种深度判别说话人编码器，以提高单次语音转换对未见说话人的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有单次语音转换方法在处理未见说话人时稳定性不足，因单一语音片段提取的说话人嵌入不可靠。
AI.method: 融合残差网络与squeeze-and-excitation网络提取帧级说话人特征，引入注意力机制加权关键信息，最终通过统计池化层生成说话人嵌入。
AI.result: 实验表明该编码器提升了未见说话人的语音转换鲁棒性，在语音质量和说话人相似度上优于基线系统。
AI.conclusion: 深度判别说话人编码器通过建模帧级特征依赖关系和注意力加权，有效增强了单次语音转换的稳定性。

authors_text: Shiwei Liu,Tianlong Chen,Xiaohan Chen,Zahra Atashgahi,Lu Yin,Huanyu Kou,Li Shen,Mykola Pechenizkiy,Zhangyang Wang,Decebal Constantin Mocanu
title: Sparse Training via Boosting Pruning Plasticity with Neuroregeneration
title_zh: 通过神经再生增强修剪可塑性的稀疏训练
comment: Published on the thirty-fifth Conference on Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS 2021). Code can be found https://github.com/Shiweiliuiiiiiii/GraNet
comments: Published on the thirty-fifth Conference on Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS 2021). Code can be found https://github.com/Shiweiliuiiiiiii/GraNet
abstract: Works on lottery ticket hypothesis (LTH) and single-shot network pruning (SNIP) have raised a lot of attention currently on post-training pruning (iterative magnitude pruning), and before-training pruning (pruning at initialization). The former method suffers from an extremely large computation cost and the latter usually struggles with insufficient performance. In comparison, during-training pruning, a class of pruning methods that simultaneously enjoys the training/inference efficiency and the comparable performance, temporarily, has been less explored. To better understand during-training pruning, we quantitatively study the effect of pruning throughout training from the perspective of pruning plasticity (the ability of the pruned networks to recover the original performance). Pruning plasticity can help explain several other empirical observations about neural network pruning in literature. We further find that pruning plasticity can be substantially improved by injecting a brain-inspired mechanism called neuroregeneration, i.e., to regenerate the same number of connections as pruned. We design a novel gradual magnitude pruning (GMP) method, named gradual pruning with zero-cost neuroregeneration (\textbf{GraNet}), that advances state of the art. Perhaps most impressively, its sparse-to-sparse version for the first time boosts the sparse-to-sparse training performance over various dense-to-sparse methods with ResNet-50 on ImageNet without extending the training time. We release all codes in https://github.com/Shiweiliuiiiiiii/GraNet.
summary: Works on lottery ticket hypothesis (LTH) and single-shot network pruning (SNIP) have raised a lot of attention currently on post-training pruning (iterative magnitude pruning), and before-training pruning (pruning at initialization). The former method suffers from an extremely large computation cost and the latter usually struggles with insufficient performance. In comparison, during-training pruning, a class of pruning methods that simultaneously enjoys the training/inference efficiency and the comparable performance, temporarily, has been less explored. To better understand during-training pruning, we quantitatively study the effect of pruning throughout training from the perspective of pruning plasticity (the ability of the pruned networks to recover the original performance). Pruning plasticity can help explain several other empirical observations about neural network pruning in literature. We further find that pruning plasticity can be substantially improved by injecting a brain-inspired mechanism called neuroregeneration, i.e., to regenerate the same number of connections as pruned. We design a novel gradual magnitude pruning (GMP) method, named gradual pruning with zero-cost neuroregeneration (\textbf{GraNet}), that advances state of the art. Perhaps most impressively, its sparse-to-sparse version for the first time boosts the sparse-to-sparse training performance over various dense-to-sparse methods with ResNet-50 on ImageNet without extending the training time. We release all codes in https://github.com/Shiweiliuiiiiiii/GraNet.
abstract_zh: 目前，彩票假设（LTH）和单次网络剪枝（SNIP）方面的工作引起了人们对训练后剪枝（迭代幅度剪枝）和训练前剪枝（初始化剪枝）的广泛关注。前一种方法的计算成本非常大，而后者通常性能不足。相比之下，训练期间剪枝这一类同时具有训练/推理效率和可比性能的剪枝方法暂时较少被探索。为了更好地理解训练期间剪枝，我们从剪枝可塑性（剪枝后的网络恢复原始性能的能力）的角度定量研究了整个训练过程中剪枝的效果。剪枝可塑性可以帮助解释文献中关于神经网络剪枝的其他一些经验观察。我们进一步发现，通过注入一种名为神经再生的受大脑启发的机制，可以大大提高修剪的可塑性，即重新生成与修剪相同数量的连接。我们设计了一种新颖的渐进剪枝（GMP）方法，称为零成本神经再生渐进剪枝（\textbf{GraNet}），该方法推进了最先进的技术。也许最令人印象深刻的是，它的稀疏到稀疏版本首次在不延长训练时间的情况下，在 ImageNet 上使用 ResNet-50 提高了各种密集到稀疏方法的稀疏到稀疏训练性能。我们在 https://github.com/Shiweiliuiiiiiii/GraNet 中发布了所有代码。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为GraNet的渐进式稀疏训练方法，通过引入神经再生机制提升网络剪枝的可塑性，从而在保持训练效率的同时提高模型性能。
AI.motivation: 现有剪枝方法（如后训练剪枝和初始化剪枝）存在计算成本高或性能不足的问题，而训练中剪枝方法研究较少。作者旨在探索如何在训练过程中提升剪枝可塑性以解决这一矛盾。
AI.method: 设计渐进幅度剪枝（GMP）方法GraNet，在剪枝过程中引入神经再生机制（再生与剪枝数量相等的连接），通过动态调整剪枝比例和再生策略实现稀疏训练。
AI.result: GraNet在ImageNet数据集上使用ResNet-50实现稀疏到稀疏训练性能的首次突破，相比密集到稀疏方法性能更优且无需延长训练时间，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 神经再生机制有效提升了剪枝可塑性，GraNet方法在稀疏训练领域达到先进水平，为高效模型压缩提供了新思路。

search_text: Sparse Training via Boosting Pruning Plasticity with Neuroregeneration 通过神经再生增强修剪可塑性的稀疏训练 Works on lottery ticket hypothesis (LTH) and single-shot network pruning (SNIP) have raised a lot of attention currently on post-training pruning (iterative magnitude pruning), and before-training pruning (pruning at initialization). The former method suffers from an extremely large computation cost and the latter usually struggles with insufficient performance. In comparison, during-training pruning, a class of pruning methods that simultaneously enjoys the training/inference efficiency and the comparable performance, temporarily, has been less explored. To better understand during-training pruning, we quantitatively study the effect of pruning throughout training from the perspective of pruning plasticity (the ability of the pruned networks to recover the original performance). Pruning plasticity can help explain several other empirical observations about neural network pruning in literature. We further find that pruning plasticity can be substantially improved by injecting a brain-inspired mechanism called neuroregeneration, i.e., to regenerate the same number of connections as pruned. We design a novel gradual magnitude pruning (GMP) method, named gradual pruning with zero-cost neuroregeneration (\textbf{GraNet}), that advances state of the art. Perhaps most impressively, its sparse-to-sparse version for the first time boosts the sparse-to-sparse training performance over various dense-to-sparse methods with ResNet-50 on ImageNet without extending the training time. We release all codes in https://github.com/Shiweiliuiiiiiii/GraNet. 目前，彩票假设（LTH）和单次网络剪枝（SNIP）方面的工作引起了人们对训练后剪枝（迭代幅度剪枝）和训练前剪枝（初始化剪枝）的广泛关注。前一种方法的计算成本非常大，而后者通常性能不足。相比之下，训练期间剪枝这一类同时具有训练/推理效率和可比性能的剪枝方法暂时较少被探索。为了更好地理解训练期间剪枝，我们从剪枝可塑性（剪枝后的网络恢复原始性能的能力）的角度定量研究了整个训练过程中剪枝的效果。剪枝可塑性可以帮助解释文献中关于神经网络剪枝的其他一些经验观察。我们进一步发现，通过注入一种名为神经再生的受大脑启发的机制，可以大大提高修剪的可塑性，即重新生成与修剪相同数量的连接。我们设计了一种新颖的渐进剪枝（GMP）方法，称为零成本神经再生渐进剪枝（\textbf{GraNet}），该方法推进了最先进的技术。也许最令人印象深刻的是，它的稀疏到稀疏版本首次在不延长训练时间的情况下，在 ImageNet 上使用 ResNet-50 提高了各种密集到稀疏方法的稀疏到稀疏训练性能。我们在 https://github.com/Shiweiliuiiiiiii/GraNet 中发布了所有代码。 本文提出了一种名为GraNet的渐进式稀疏训练方法，通过引入神经再生机制提升网络剪枝的可塑性，从而在保持训练效率的同时提高模型性能。 Shiwei Liu,Tianlong Chen,Xiaohan Chen,Zahra Atashgahi,Lu Yin,Huanyu Kou,Li Shen,Mykola Pechenizkiy,Zhangyang Wang,Decebal Constantin Mocanu cs.LG,cs.CV

authors_text: John Morrow,Nuha Nishat,Joshua Campbell,Ravi Balasubramanian,Cindy Grimm
title: Grasping Benchmarks: Normalizing for Object Size \& Approximating Hand Workspaces
title_zh: 抓取基准：对象尺寸标准化\&近似手部工作空间
comment: Submitted to IROS 2021, waiting for response
comments: Submitted to IROS 2021, waiting for response
abstract: The varied landscape of robotic hand designs makes it difficult to set a standard for how to measure hand size and to communicate the size of objects it can grasp. Defining consistent workspace measurements would greatly assist scientific communication in robotic grasping research because it would allow researchers to 1) quantitatively communicate an object's relative size to a hand's and 2) approximate a functional subspace of a hand's kinematic workspace in a human-readable way. The goal of this paper is to specify a measurement procedure that quantitatively captures a hand's workspace size for both a precision and power grasp. This measurement procedure uses a {\em functional} approach -- based on a generic grasping scenario of a hypothetical object -- in order to make the procedure as generalizable and repeatable as possible, regardless of the actual hand design. This functional approach lets the measurer choose the exact finger configurations and contact points that satisfy the generic grasping scenario, while ensuring that the measurements are {\em functionally} comparable. We demonstrate these functional measurements on seven hand configurations. Additional hand measurements and instructions are provided in a GitHub Repository.
summary: The varied landscape of robotic hand designs makes it difficult to set a standard for how to measure hand size and to communicate the size of objects it can grasp. Defining consistent workspace measurements would greatly assist scientific communication in robotic grasping research because it would allow researchers to 1) quantitatively communicate an object's relative size to a hand's and 2) approximate a functional subspace of a hand's kinematic workspace in a human-readable way. The goal of this paper is to specify a measurement procedure that quantitatively captures a hand's workspace size for both a precision and power grasp. This measurement procedure uses a {\em functional} approach -- based on a generic grasping scenario of a hypothetical object -- in order to make the procedure as generalizable and repeatable as possible, regardless of the actual hand design. This functional approach lets the measurer choose the exact finger configurations and contact points that satisfy the generic grasping scenario, while ensuring that the measurements are {\em functionally} comparable. We demonstrate these functional measurements on seven hand configurations. Additional hand measurements and instructions are provided in a GitHub Repository.
abstract_zh: 机器人手设计的多样性使得很难为如何测量手的尺寸和传达其可以抓取的物体的尺寸设定标准。定义一致的工作空间测量将极大地有助于机器人抓取研究中的科学交流，因为它允许研究人员 1) 定量地传达物体与手的相对大小，2) 以人类可读的方式近似手的运动工作空间的功能子空间。本文的目标是指定一种测量程序，定量捕获手的工作空间大小，以实现精确度和力量把握。该测量过程使用一种{\em功能}方法——基于假设物体的通用抓取场景——以便使该过程尽可能通用和可重复，而不管实际的手设计如何。这种功能性方法可以让测量者选择满足一般抓取场景的精确手指配置和接触点，同时确保测量结果在功能上具有可比性。我们在七种手部配置上演示了这些功能测量。 GitHub 存储库中提供了其他手部测量值和说明。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种标准化的测量方法，用于量化机械手的抓取工作空间尺寸，以促进机器人抓取研究的科学交流。
AI.motivation: 由于机械手设计多样，缺乏统一的测量标准，导致难以量化描述机械手与物体尺寸的相对关系及功能工作空间。
AI.method: 采用基于假设物体的通用抓取场景的函数化方法，通过可重复的指节配置和接触点选择，实现跨机械手设计的功能性对比测量。
AI.result: 在七种机械手配置上验证了该测量方法，并通过GitHub仓库提供了额外测量数据和操作指南。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为机器人抓取研究提供了可推广的标准化测量框架，有助于提升研究结果的可比性和可读性。

title: Uncertain Decisions Facilitate Better Preference Learning
title_zh: 不确定的决策有利于更好的偏好学习
abstract: Existing observational approaches for learning human preferences, such as inverse reinforcement learning, usually make strong assumptions about the observability of the human's environment. However, in reality, people make many important decisions under uncertainty. To better understand preference learning in these cases, we study the setting of inverse decision theory (IDT), a previously proposed framework where a human is observed making non-sequential binary decisions under uncertainty. In IDT, the human's preferences are conveyed through their loss function, which expresses a tradeoff between different types of mistakes. We give the first statistical analysis of IDT, providing conditions necessary to identify these preferences and characterizing the sample complexity -- the number of decisions that must be observed to learn the tradeoff the human is making to a desired precision. Interestingly, we show that it is actually easier to identify preferences when the decision problem is more uncertain. Furthermore, uncertain decision problems allow us to relax the unrealistic assumption that the human is an optimal decision maker but still identify their exact preferences; we give sample complexities in this suboptimal case as well. Our analysis contradicts the intuition that partial observability should make preference learning more difficult. It also provides a first step towards understanding and improving preference learning methods for uncertain and suboptimal humans.
summary: Existing observational approaches for learning human preferences, such as inverse reinforcement learning, usually make strong assumptions about the observability of the human's environment. However, in reality, people make many important decisions under uncertainty. To better understand preference learning in these cases, we study the setting of inverse decision theory (IDT), a previously proposed framework where a human is observed making non-sequential binary decisions under uncertainty. In IDT, the human's preferences are conveyed through their loss function, which expresses a tradeoff between different types of mistakes. We give the first statistical analysis of IDT, providing conditions necessary to identify these preferences and characterizing the sample complexity -- the number of decisions that must be observed to learn the tradeoff the human is making to a desired precision. Interestingly, we show that it is actually easier to identify preferences when the decision problem is more uncertain. Furthermore, uncertain decision problems allow us to relax the unrealistic assumption that the human is an optimal decision maker but still identify their exact preferences; we give sample complexities in this suboptimal case as well. Our analysis contradicts the intuition that partial observability should make preference learning more difficult. It also provides a first step towards understanding and improving preference learning methods for uncertain and suboptimal humans.
abstract_zh: 现有的用于学习人类偏好的观察方法（例如逆强化学习）通常对人类环境的可观察性做出强有力的假设。然而，现实中，人们在不确定的情况下做出许多重要的决定。为了更好地理解这些情况下的偏好学习，我们研究了逆向决策理论（IDT）的设置，这是一个先前提出的框架，在该框架中观察人类在不确定性下做出非顺序二元决策。在 IDT 中，人类的偏好是通过损失函数来传达的，损失函数表达了不同类型错误之间的权衡。我们对 IDT 进行了首次统计分析，提供了识别这些偏好所需的条件并描述了样本复杂性——必须观察的决策数量，以了解人类正在做出的权衡以达到所需的精度。有趣的是，我们表明，当决策问题更加不确定时，实际上更容易识别偏好。此外，不确定的决策问题使我们能够放松人类是最优决策者这一不切实际的假设，但仍然可以确定他们的确切偏好；我们也给出了这种次优情况下的样本复杂性。我们的分析与部分可观察性会使偏好学习变得更加困难的直觉相矛盾。它还为理解和改进不确定和次优人类的偏好学习方法迈出了第一步。

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了在不确定性环境下通过逆决策理论（IDT）学习人类偏好的方法，分析了偏好识别的条件和样本复杂度。
AI.motivation: 现有偏好学习方法（如逆强化学习）依赖于环境完全可观测的强假设，但现实中人类常在不确定性下做决策，需探索更符合实际的偏好学习框架。
AI.method: 提出逆决策理论（IDT）框架，通过分析人类在不确定性下的二元决策损失函数，进行统计分析以确定偏好识别的必要条件及样本复杂度。
AI.result: 发现决策不确定性越高，偏好识别越容易；即使人类决策非最优，仍能通过样本复杂度分析准确识别其偏好。
AI.conclusion: 部分可观测性并不必然增加偏好学习难度，该研究为改进不确定和非最优情境下的偏好学习方法提供了理论基础。

search_text: Uncertain Decisions Facilitate Better Preference Learning 不确定的决策有利于更好的偏好学习 Existing observational approaches for learning human preferences, such as inverse reinforcement learning, usually make strong assumptions about the observability of the human's environment. However, in reality, people make many important decisions under uncertainty. To better understand preference learning in these cases, we study the setting of inverse decision theory (IDT), a previously proposed framework where a human is observed making non-sequential binary decisions under uncertainty. In IDT, the human's preferences are conveyed through their loss function, which expresses a tradeoff between different types of mistakes. We give the first statistical analysis of IDT, providing conditions necessary to identify these preferences and characterizing the sample complexity -- the number of decisions that must be observed to learn the tradeoff the human is making to a desired precision. Interestingly, we show that it is actually easier to identify preferences when the decision problem is more uncertain. Furthermore, uncertain decision problems allow us to relax the unrealistic assumption that the human is an optimal decision maker but still identify their exact preferences; we give sample complexities in this suboptimal case as well. Our analysis contradicts the intuition that partial observability should make preference learning more difficult. It also provides a first step towards understanding and improving preference learning methods for uncertain and suboptimal humans. 现有的用于学习人类偏好的观察方法（例如逆强化学习）通常对人类环境的可观察性做出强有力的假设。然而，现实中，人们在不确定的情况下做出许多重要的决定。为了更好地理解这些情况下的偏好学习，我们研究了逆向决策理论（IDT）的设置，这是一个先前提出的框架，在该框架中观察人类在不确定性下做出非顺序二元决策。在 IDT 中，人类的偏好是通过损失函数来传达的，损失函数表达了不同类型错误之间的权衡。我们对 IDT 进行了首次统计分析，提供了识别这些偏好所需的条件并描述了样本复杂性——必须观察的决策数量，以了解人类正在做出的权衡以达到所需的精度。有趣的是，我们表明，当决策问题更加不确定时，实际上更容易识别偏好。此外，不确定的决策问题使我们能够放松人类是最优决策者这一不切实际的假设，但仍然可以确定他们的确切偏好；我们也给出了这种次优情况下的样本复杂性。我们的分析与部分可观察性会使偏好学习变得更加困难的直觉相矛盾。它还为理解和改进不确定和次优人类的偏好学习方法迈出了第一步。 该论文研究了在不确定性环境下通过逆决策理论（IDT）学习人类偏好的方法，分析了偏好识别的条件和样本复杂度。 Cassidy Laidlaw,Stuart Russell stat.ML,cs.AI,cs.LG

title: Dynamical Deep Generative Latent Modeling of 3D Skeletal Motion
title_zh: 3D 骨骼运动的动态深层生成潜在建模
abstract: In this paper, we propose a Bayesian switching dynamical model for segmentation of 3D pose data over time that uncovers interpretable patterns in the data and is generative. Our model decomposes highly correlated skeleton data into a set of few spatial basis of switching temporal processes in a low-dimensional latent framework. We parameterize these temporal processes with regard to a switching deep vector autoregressive prior in order to accommodate both multimodal and higher-order nonlinear inter-dependencies. This results in a dynamical deep generative latent model that parses the meaningful intrinsic states in the dynamics of 3D pose data using approximate variational inference, and enables a realistic low-level dynamical generation and segmentation of complex skeleton movements. Our experiments on four biological motion data containing bat flight, salsa dance, walking, and golf datasets substantiate superior performance of our model in comparison with the state-of-the-art methods.
summary: In this paper, we propose a Bayesian switching dynamical model for segmentation of 3D pose data over time that uncovers interpretable patterns in the data and is generative. Our model decomposes highly correlated skeleton data into a set of few spatial basis of switching temporal processes in a low-dimensional latent framework. We parameterize these temporal processes with regard to a switching deep vector autoregressive prior in order to accommodate both multimodal and higher-order nonlinear inter-dependencies. This results in a dynamical deep generative latent model that parses the meaningful intrinsic states in the dynamics of 3D pose data using approximate variational inference, and enables a realistic low-level dynamical generation and segmentation of complex skeleton movements. Our experiments on four biological motion data containing bat flight, salsa dance, walking, and golf datasets substantiate superior performance of our model in comparison with the state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种贝叶斯切换动态模型，用于随时间分割 3D 姿态数据，该模型揭示数据中的可解释模式并且具有生成性。我们的模型将高度相关的骨架数据分解为一组在低维潜在框架中切换时间过程的空间基础。我们根据切换深度向量自回归先验对这些时间过程进行参数化，以适应多模态和高阶非线性相互依赖性。这产生了一个动态深度生成潜在模型，该模型使用近似变分推理来解析 3D 姿态数据动态中有意义的内在状态，并实现复杂骨骼运动的现实低级动态生成和分割。我们对包含蝙蝠飞行、萨尔萨舞、行走和高尔夫数据集的四种生物运动数据进行的实验证实了我们的模型与最先进的方法相比具有优越的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种动态深度生成潜在模型，用于对3D骨骼运动进行分割和生成，通过分解相关性高的骨架数据以揭示可解释的模式。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以有效处理复杂3D姿态数据中的多模态非线性依赖关系，需开发更精准的生成模型以实现动态分割与重建。
AI.method: 构建贝叶斯切换动态模型，结合深度向量自回归先验，在低维潜在空间中分解骨骼数据为切换的时空过程基向量，并通过变分推断实现生成。
AI.result: 在蝙蝠飞行、萨尔萨舞、行走和高尔夫四类生物运动数据集上，模型性能优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 该模型能有效解析3D姿态动态的内在状态，实现复杂骨骼运动的生成与分割，为动作分析提供新框架。

title: Sublinear Time Hypergraph Sparsification via Cut and Edge Sampling Queries
title_zh: 通过剪切和边缘采样查询进行亚线性时间超图稀疏化
abstract: The problem of sparsifying a graph or a hypergraph while approximately preserving its cut structure has been extensively studied and has many applications. In a seminal work, Benczúr and Karger (1996) showed that given any $n$-vertex undirected weighted graph $G$ and a parameter $\varepsilon \in (0,1)$, there is a near-linear time algorithm that outputs a weighted subgraph $G'$ of $G$ of size $\tilde{O}(n/\varepsilon^2)$ such that the weight of every cut in $G$ is preserved to within a $(1 \pm \varepsilon)$-factor in $G'$. The graph $G'$ is referred to as a {\em $(1 \pm \varepsilon)$-approximate cut sparsifier} of $G$. Subsequent recent work has obtained a similar result for the more general problem of hypergraph cut sparsifiers. However, all known sparsification algorithms require $Ω(n + m)$ time where $n$ denotes the number of vertices and $m$ denotes the number of hyperedges in the hypergraph. Since $m$ can be exponentially large in $n$, a natural question is if it is possible to create a hypergraph cut sparsifier in time polynomial in $n$, {\em independent of the number of edges}. We resolve this question in the affirmative, giving the first sublinear time algorithm for this problem, given appropriate query access to the hypergraph.
summary: The problem of sparsifying a graph or a hypergraph while approximately preserving its cut structure has been extensively studied and has many applications. In a seminal work, Benczúr and Karger (1996) showed that given any $n$-vertex undirected weighted graph $G$ and a parameter $\varepsilon \in (0,1)$, there is a near-linear time algorithm that outputs a weighted subgraph $G'$ of $G$ of size $\tilde{O}(n/\varepsilon^2)$ such that the weight of every cut in $G$ is preserved to within a $(1 \pm \varepsilon)$-factor in $G'$. The graph $G'$ is referred to as a {\em $(1 \pm \varepsilon)$-approximate cut sparsifier} of $G$. Subsequent recent work has obtained a similar result for the more general problem of hypergraph cut sparsifiers. However, all known sparsification algorithms require $Ω(n + m)$ time where $n$ denotes the number of vertices and $m$ denotes the number of hyperedges in the hypergraph. Since $m$ can be exponentially large in $n$, a natural question is if it is possible to create a hypergraph cut sparsifier in time polynomial in $n$, {\em independent of the number of edges}. We resolve this question in the affirmative, giving the first sublinear time algorithm for this problem, given appropriate query access to the hypergraph.
abstract_zh: 稀疏图或超图同时近似保留其切割结构的问题已被广泛研究并具有许多应用。在一项开创性的工作中，Benczúr 和 Karger (1996) 表明，给定任何 $n$ 顶点无向加权图 $G$ 和参数 $\varepsilon \in (0,1)$，存在一种近线性时间算法，该算法输出 $G$ 的加权子图 $G'$，大小为 $\tilde{O}(n/\varepsilon^2)$，使得 $G$ 中每次切割的权重都保留在$(1 \pm \varepsilon)$-$G'$ 中的因子。图 $G'$ 被称为 $G$ 的{\em $(1 \pm \varepsilon)$-近似割稀疏器}。随后的近期工作针对更普遍的超图切割稀疏器问题获得了类似的结果。然而，所有已知的稀疏化算法都需要 $Ω(n + m)$ 时间，其中 $n$ 表示顶点数量，$m$ 表示超图中超边的数量。由于 $m$ 在 $n$ 中可以呈指数级大，一个自然的问题是是否可以在 $n$ 中的时间多项式中创建超图割稀疏器，{\em 与边数无关}。我们肯定地解决了这个问题，给出了这个问题的第一个亚线性时间算法，给出了对超图的适当查询访问。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种在子线性时间内生成超图割稀疏化的算法，通过割和边采样查询实现。
AI.motivation: 现有超图割稀疏化算法的时间复杂度依赖于超边数量，而超边数可能呈指数级增长，因此需要独立于边数的多项式时间算法。
AI.method: 利用割采样和边采样查询技术，在不显式访问所有超边的情况下直接构造稀疏子图。
AI.result: 首次实现与顶点数多项式相关、独立于超边数的子线性时间超图割稀疏化算法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为处理大规模超图提供了高效可行的稀疏化方案，突破了传统算法的边数依赖限制。
