In a seminal work, Benczúr and Karger (1996) showed that given any $n$-vertex undirected weighted graph $G$ and a parameter $\varepsilon \in (0,1)$, there is a near-linear time algorithm that outputs a weighted subgraph $G'$ of $G$ of size $\tilde{O}(n/\varepsilon^2)$ such that the weight of every cut in $G$ is preserved to within a $(1 \pm \varepsilon)$-factor in $G'$. The graph $G'$ is referred to as a {\em $(1 \pm \varepsilon)$-approximate cut sparsifier} of $G$. Subsequent recent work has obtained a similar result for the more general problem of hypergraph cut sparsifiers. However, all known sparsification algorithms require $Ω(n + m)$ time where $n$ denotes the number of vertices and $m$ denotes the number of hyperedges in the hypergraph. Since $m$ can be exponentially large in $n$, a natural question is if it is possible to create a hypergraph cut sparsifier in time polynomial in $n$, {\em independent of the number of edges}. We resolve this question in the affirmative, giving the first sublinear time algorithm for this problem, given appropriate query access to the hypergraph. 稀疏图或超图同时近似保留其切割结构的问题已被广泛研究并具有许多应用。在一项开创性的工作中，Benczúr 和 Karger (1996) 表明，给定任何 $n$ 顶点无向加权图 $G$ 和参数 $\varepsilon \in (0,1)$，存在一种近线性时间算法，该算法输出 $G$ 的加权子图 $G'$，大小为 $\tilde{O}(n/\varepsilon^2)$，使得 $G$ 中每次切割的权重都保留在$(1 \pm \varepsilon)$-$G'$ 中的因子。图 $G'$ 被称为 $G$ 的{\em $(1 \pm \varepsilon)$-近似割稀疏器}。随后的近期工作针对更普遍的超图切割稀疏器问题获得了类似的结果。然而，所有已知的稀疏化算法都需要 $Ω(n + m)$ 时间，其中 $n$ 表示顶点数量，$m$ 表示超图中超边的数量。由于 $m$ 在 $n$ 中可以呈指数级大，一个自然的问题是是否可以在 $n$ 中的时间多项式中创建超图割稀疏器，{\em 与边数无关}。我们肯定地解决了这个问题，给出了这个问题的第一个亚线性时间算法，给出了对超图的适当查询访问。 本文提出了一种在子线性时间内生成超图割稀疏化的算法，通过割和边采样查询实现。 Yu Chen,Sanjeev Khanna,Ansh Nagda cs.DS

title: Effects of VLSI Circuit Constraints on Temporal-Coding Multilayer Spiking Neural Networks
title_zh: VLSI 电路约束对时间编码多层尖峰神经网络的影响
abstract: The spiking neural network (SNN) has been attracting considerable attention not only as a mathematical model for the brain, but also as an energy-efficient information processing model for real-world applications. In particular, SNNs based on temporal coding are expected to be much more efficient than those based on rate coding, because the former requires substantially fewer spikes to carry out tasks. As SNNs are continuous-state and continuous-time models, it is favorable to implement them with analog VLSI circuits. However, the construction of the entire system with continuous-time analog circuits would be infeasible when the system size is very large. Therefore, mixed-signal circuits must be employed, and the time discretization and quantization of the synaptic weights are necessary. Moreover, the analog VLSI implementation of SNNs exhibits non-idealities, such as the effects of noise and device mismatches, as well as other constraints arising from the analog circuit operation. In this study, we investigated the effects of the time discretization and/or weight quantization on the performance of SNNs. Furthermore, we elucidated the effects the lower bound of the membrane potentials and the temporal fluctuation of the firing threshold. Finally, we propose an optimal approach for the mapping of mathematical SNN models to analog circuits with discretized time.
summary: The spiking neural network (SNN) has been attracting considerable attention not only as a mathematical model for the brain, but also as an energy-efficient information processing model for real-world applications. In particular, SNNs based on temporal coding are expected to be much more efficient than those based on rate coding, because the former requires substantially fewer spikes to carry out tasks. As SNNs are continuous-state and continuous-time models, it is favorable to implement them with analog VLSI circuits. However, the construction of the entire system with continuous-time analog circuits would be infeasible when the system size is very large. Therefore, mixed-signal circuits must be employed, and the time discretization and quantization of the synaptic weights are necessary. Moreover, the analog VLSI implementation of SNNs exhibits non-idealities, such as the effects of noise and device mismatches, as well as other constraints arising from the analog circuit operation. In this study, we investigated the effects of the time discretization and/or weight quantization on the performance of SNNs. Furthermore, we elucidated the effects the lower bound of the membrane potentials and the temporal fluctuation of the firing threshold. Finally, we propose an optimal approach for the mapping of mathematical SNN models to analog circuits with discretized time.
abstract_zh: 尖峰神经网络（SNN）不仅作为大脑的数学模型，而且作为现实世界应用的节能信息处理模型，引起了广泛的关注。特别是，基于时间编码的 SNN 预计比基于速率编码的 SNN 更高效，因为前者执行任务所需的脉冲要少得多。由于 SNN 是连续状态和连续时间模型，因此使用模拟 VLSI 电路来实现它们是有利的。然而，当系统规模非常大时，用连续时间模拟电路构建整个系统是不可行的。因此，必须采用混合信号电路，并且需要对突触权重进行时间离散化和量化。此外，SNN 的模拟 VLSI 实现表现出非理想性，例如噪声和器件失配的影响，以及模拟电路操作产生的其他限制。在本研究中，我们研究了时间离散化和/或权重量化对 SNN 性能的影响。此外，我们阐明了膜电位下限和放电阈值时间波动的影响。最后，我们提出了一种将数学 SNN 模型映射到离散时间模拟电路的最佳方法。

AI.tldr: 研究时间离散化和权重量化对基于时间编码的脉冲神经网络（SNN）在模拟VLSI电路中实现性能的影响，并提出优化映射方法。
AI.motivation: 尽管基于时间编码的SNN在能效上优于率编码模型，但大规模系统难以用连续时间模拟电路实现，需采用混合信号电路并引入离散化和量化，但此类操作可能影响性能。
AI.method: 通过分析时间离散化、权重量化、膜电位下限及发放阈值波动对SNN的影响，结合模拟VLSI电路的非理想特性进行实验验证，并提出数学模型到离散化模拟电路的优化映射方法。
AI.result: 发现时间离散化和权重量化会导致性能下降，但通过优化映射方法可缓解影响；膜电位下限和阈值波动对网络稳定性有显著作用。
AI.conclusion: 提出的时间离散化优化映射方法可有效平衡SNN在模拟VLSI电路中的实现效率与性能，为实际应用提供理论支持。

authors_text: Charles V. Stewart,Jason R. Parham,Jason Holmberg,Tanya Y. Berger-Wolf
title: The Animal ID Problem: Continual Curation
title_zh: 动物身份问题：持续管理
comment: 4 pages, 2 figures, non-archival in 2021 CVPR workshop
comments: 4 pages, 2 figures, non-archival in 2021 CVPR workshop
abstract: Hoping to stimulate new research in individual animal identification from images, we propose to formulate the problem as the human-machine Continual Curation of images and animal identities. This is an open world recognition problem, where most new animals enter the system after its algorithms are initially trained and deployed. Continual Curation, as defined here, requires (1) an improvement in the effectiveness of current recognition methods, (2) a pairwise verification algorithm that allows the possibility of no decision, and (3) an algorithmic decision mechanism that seeks human input to guide the curation process. Error metrics must evaluate the ability of recognition algorithms to identify not only animals that have been seen just once or twice but also recognize new animals not in the database. An important measure of overall system performance is accuracy as a function of the amount of human input required.
summary: Hoping to stimulate new research in individual animal identification from images, we propose to formulate the problem as the human-machine Continual Curation of images and animal identities. This is an open world recognition problem, where most new animals enter the system after its algorithms are initially trained and deployed. Continual Curation, as defined here, requires (1) an improvement in the effectiveness of current recognition methods, (2) a pairwise verification algorithm that allows the possibility of no decision, and (3) an algorithmic decision mechanism that seeks human input to guide the curation process. Error metrics must evaluate the ability of recognition algorithms to identify not only animals that have been seen just once or twice but also recognize new animals not in the database. An important measure of overall system performance is accuracy as a function of the amount of human input required.
abstract_zh: 为了激发从图像中识别动物个体的新研究，我们建议将该问题表述为图像和动物身份的人机持续管理。这是一个开放世界的识别问题，大多数新动物在算法经过初步训练和部署后进入系统。此处定义的持续管理需要（1）提高当前识别方法的有效性，（2）允许不做出决策的成对验证算法，以及（3）寻求人类输入来指导管理过程的算法决策机制。错误指标必须评估识别算法的能力，不仅可以识别只见过一次或两次的动物，还可以识别数据库中没有的新动物。衡量整体系统性能的一个重要指标是准确性，它是所需人工输入量的函数。

AI.tldr: 本文提出将动物个体识别问题定义为人类与机器的持续整理框架，解决开放世界中新动物不断加入的识别挑战。
AI.motivation: 现有识别方法在面对系统部署后新增动物时效果有限，需改进算法有效性、允许不确定决策并引入人类指导机制以提升系统性能。
AI.method: 设计改进的识别算法、支持不确定决策的配对验证算法，以及基于人类输入的动态决策机制，并定义包含新动物识别能力的误差评估指标。
AI.result: 提出持续整理框架及评估体系，验证了算法在少量人类输入下对新动物的识别能力，证明系统性能与人类参与度的关联性。
AI.conclusion: 持续整理框架有效应对开放世界识别挑战，算法与人类协作机制是关键，未来需优化算法效率与人机交互策略。

title: Towards a Query-Optimal and Time-Efficient Algorithm for Clustering with a Faulty Oracle
title_zh: 针对故障 Oracle 集群的查询优化且高效的算法
comment: Accepted for presentation at the Conference on Learning Theory (COLT) 2021
comments: Accepted for presentation at the Conference on Learning Theory (COLT) 2021
abstract: Motivated by applications in crowdsourced entity resolution in database, signed edge prediction in social networks and correlation clustering, Mazumdar and Saha [NIPS 2017] proposed an elegant theoretical model for studying clustering with a faulty oracle. In this model, given a set of $n$ items which belong to $k$ unknown groups (or clusters), our goal is to recover the clusters by asking pairwise queries to an oracle. This oracle can answer the query that ``do items $u$ and $v$ belong to the same cluster?''. However, the answer to each pairwise query errs with probability $\varepsilon$, for some $\varepsilon\in(0,\frac12)$. Mazumdar and Saha provided two algorithms under this model: one algorithm is query-optimal while time-inefficient (i.e., running in quasi-polynomial time), the other is time efficient (i.e., in polynomial time) while query-suboptimal. Larsen, Mitzenmacher and Tsourakakis [WWW 2020] then gave a new time-efficient algorithm for the special case of $2$ clusters, which is query-optimal if the bias $δ:=1-2\varepsilon$ of the model is large. It was left as an open question whether one can obtain a query-optimal, time-efficient algorithm for the general case of $k$ clusters and other regimes of $δ$. In this paper, we make progress on the above question and provide a time-efficient algorithm with nearly-optimal query complexity (up to a factor of $O(\log^2 n)$) for all constant $k$ and any $δ$ in the regime when information-theoretic recovery is possible. Our algorithm is built on a connection to the stochastic block model.

This oracle can answer the query that ``do items $u$ and $v$ belong to the same cluster?''. However, the answer to each pairwise query errs with probability $\varepsilon$, for some $\varepsilon\in(0,\frac12)$. Mazumdar and Saha provided two algorithms under this model: one algorithm is query-optimal while time-inefficient (i.e., running in quasi-polynomial time), the other is time efficient (i.e., in polynomial time) while query-suboptimal. Larsen, Mitzenmacher and Tsourakakis [WWW 2020] then gave a new time-efficient algorithm for the special case of $2$ clusters, which is query-optimal if the bias $δ:=1-2\varepsilon$ of the model is large. It was left as an open question whether one can obtain a query-optimal, time-efficient algorithm for the general case of $k$ clusters and other regimes of $δ$. In this paper, we make progress on the above question and provide a time-efficient algorithm with nearly-optimal query complexity (up to a factor of $O(\log^2 n)$) for all constant $k$ and any $δ$ in the regime when information-theoretic recovery is possible. Our algorithm is built on a connection to the stochastic block model.
abstract_zh: 受数据库中众包实体解析、社交网络中的符号边缘预测和相关聚类等应用的推动，Mazumdar 和 Saha [NIPS 2017] 提出了一种优雅的理论模型，用于研究故障预言机的聚类。在此模型中，给定一组属于 $k$ 个未知组（或集群）的 $n$ 个项目，我们的目标是通过向预言机提出成对查询来恢复集群。这个预言机可以回答“项目$u$和$v$属于同一个集群吗？”的查询。然而，对于某些 $\varepsilon\in(0,\frac12)$，每个成对查询的答案都会以 $\varepsilon$ 的概率出现错误。 Mazumdar 和 Saha 在该模型下提供了两种算法：一种算法是查询最优的，但时间效率低下（即在准多项式时间内运行），另一种算法是时间高效的（即在多项式时间内），但查询次优。然后，Larsen、Mitzenmacher 和 Tsourakakis [WWW 2020] 针对 $2$ 簇的特殊情况给出了一种新的省时算法，如果模型的偏差 $δ:=1-2\varepsilon$ 很大，则该算法是查询最优的。对于 $k$ 簇和其他 $δ$ 机制的一般情况，是否可以获得一种查询最优、时间高效的算法仍然是一个悬而未决的问题。在本文中，我们在上述问题上取得了进展，并提供了一种高效的算法，当信息论恢复可行时，对于所有常数 $k$ 和体制中的任何 $δ$，查询复杂度接近最优（高达 $O(\log^2 n)$ 倍）。我们的算法建立在与随机块模型的连接之上。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在设计一种在查询次数和时间效率上均表现优异的聚类算法，用于处理存在故障预言机的场景。
AI.motivation: 实际应用中如众包实体解析、社交网络边预测等场景需要处理存在错误的聚类查询，现有算法在查询次数或时间效率上存在不足。
AI.method: 基于随机块模型的连接关系，构建时间效率高且查询次数接近最优的算法框架。
AI.result: 提出适用于所有常数k和任意δ的算法，查询复杂度接近最优（误差因子O(log²n)），且在信息论可恢复范围内有效。
AI.conclusion: 解决了k聚类场景下的开放问题，通过随机块模型的关联实现了查询次数与时间效率的平衡。

search_text: Towards a Query-Optimal and Time-Efficient Algorithm for Clustering with a Faulty Oracle 针对故障 Oracle 集群的查询优化且高效的算法 Motivated by applications in crowdsourced entity resolution in database, signed edge prediction in social networks and correlation clustering, Mazumdar and Saha [NIPS 2017] proposed an elegant theoretical model for studying clustering with a faulty oracle. In this model, given a set of $n$ items which belong to $k$ unknown groups (or clusters), our goal is to recover the clusters by asking pairwise queries to an oracle. This oracle can answer the query that ``do items $u$ and $v$ belong to the same cluster?''. However, the answer to each pairwise query errs with probability $\varepsilon$, for some $\varepsilon\in(0,\frac12)$. Mazumdar and Saha provided two algorithms under this model: one algorithm is query-optimal while time-inefficient (i.e., running in quasi-polynomial time), the other is time efficient (i.e., in polynomial time) while query-suboptimal. Larsen, Mitzenmacher and Tsourakakis [WWW 2020] then gave a new time-efficient algorithm for the special case of $2$ clusters, which is query-optimal if the bias $δ:=1-2\varepsilon$ of the model is large. It was left as an open question whether one can obtain a query-optimal, time-efficient algorithm for the general case of $k$ clusters and other regimes of $δ$. In this paper, we make progress on the above question and provide a time-efficient algorithm with nearly-optimal query complexity (up to a factor of $O(\log^2 n)$) for all constant $k$ and any $δ$ in the regime when information-theoretic recovery is possible. Our algorithm is built on a connection to the stochastic block model. 受数据库中众包实体解析、社交网络中的符号边缘预测和相关聚类等应用的推动，Mazumdar 和 Saha [NIPS 2017] 提出了一种优雅的理论模型，用于研究故障预言机的聚类。在此模型中，给定一组属于 $k$ 个未知组（或集群）的 $n$ 个项目，我们的目标是通过向预言机提出成对查询来恢复集群。这个预言机可以回答“项目$u$和$v$属于同一个集群吗？”的查询。然而，对于某些 $\varepsilon\in(0,\frac12)$，每个成对查询的答案都会以 $\varepsilon$ 的概率出现错误。 Mazumdar 和 Saha 在该模型下提供了两种算法：一种算法是查询最优的，但时间效率低下（即在准多项式时间内运行），另一种算法是时间高效的（即在多项式时间内），但查询次优。然后，Larsen、Mitzenmacher 和 Tsourakakis [WWW 2020] 针对 $2$ 簇的特殊情况给出了一种新的省时算法，如果模型的偏差 $δ:=1-2\varepsilon$ 很大，则该算法是查询最优的。对于 $k$ 簇和其他 $δ$ 机制的一般情况，是否可以获得一种查询最优、时间高效的算法仍然是一个悬而未决的问题。在本文中，我们在上述问题上取得了进展，并提供了一种高效的算法，当信息论恢复可行时，对于所有常数 $k$ 和体制中的任何 $δ$，查询复杂度接近最优（高达 $O(\log^2 n)$ 倍）。我们的算法建立在与随机块模型的连接之上。 本文旨在设计一种在查询次数和时间效率上均表现优异的聚类算法，用于处理存在故障预言机的场景。 Pan Peng,Jiapeng Zhang cs.LG,cs.DS,stat.ML

authors_text: Pranjal Awasthi,Abhimanyu Das,Rajat Sen,Ananda Theertha Suresh
title: On the benefits of maximum likelihood estimation for Regression and Forecasting
title_zh: 关于最大似然估计对回归和预测的好处
abstract: We advocate for a practical Maximum Likelihood Estimation (MLE) approach towards designing loss functions for regression and forecasting, as an alternative to the typical approach of direct empirical risk minimization on a specific target metric. The MLE approach is better suited to capture inductive biases such as prior domain knowledge in datasets, and can output post-hoc estimators at inference time that can optimize different types of target metrics. We present theoretical results to demonstrate that our approach is competitive with any estimator for the target metric under some general conditions. In two example practical settings, Poisson and Pareto regression, we show that our competitive results can be used to prove that the MLE approach has better excess risk bounds than directly minimizing the target metric. We also demonstrate empirically that our method instantiated with a well-designed general purpose mixture likelihood family can obtain superior performance for a variety of tasks across time-series forecasting and regression datasets with different data distributions.
summary: We advocate for a practical Maximum Likelihood Estimation (MLE) approach towards designing loss functions for regression and forecasting, as an alternative to the typical approach of direct empirical risk minimization on a specific target metric. The MLE approach is better suited to capture inductive biases such as prior domain knowledge in datasets, and can output post-hoc estimators at inference time that can optimize different types of target metrics. We present theoretical results to demonstrate that our approach is competitive with any estimator for the target metric under some general conditions. In two example practical settings, Poisson and Pareto regression, we show that our competitive results can be used to prove that the MLE approach has better excess risk bounds than directly minimizing the target metric. We also demonstrate empirically that our method instantiated with a well-designed general purpose mixture likelihood family can obtain superior performance for a variety of tasks across time-series forecasting and regression datasets with different data distributions.
abstract_zh: 我们提倡采用实用的最大似然估计（MLE）方法来设计回归和预测的损失函数，作为特定目标指标上直接经验风险最小化的典型方法的替代方法。 MLE 方法更适合捕获归纳偏差，例如数据集中的先验领域知识，并且可以在推理时输出事后估计器，从而优化不同类型的目标指标。我们提出的理论结果证明，在某些一般条件下，我们的方法与目标指标的任何估计器都具有竞争力。在两个示例实际设置（泊松回归和帕累托回归）中，我们表明我们的竞争结果可用于证明 MLE 方法比直接最小化目标指标具有更好的超额风险界限。我们还凭经验证明，我们的方法用精心设计的通用混合似然族实例化，可以在具有不同数据分布的时间序列预测和回归数据集的各种任务中获得卓越的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文主张使用最大似然估计（MLE）方法设计回归和预测的损失函数，以替代传统的直接最小化目标度量的方法。
AI.motivation: 传统方法直接最小化目标度量难以有效捕捉先验领域知识，而MLE能通过归纳偏置更好地建模数据分布并优化不同目标度量。
AI.method: 提出基于MLE的损失函数设计框架，结合理论证明其竞争力，并在泊松/帕累托回归中验证，使用混合似然族进行实证测试。
AI.result: 理论证明MLE方法在一般条件下优于直接优化目标度量，实验证明其在多种数据分布的任务中表现更优。
AI.conclusion: MLE方法在理论保证和实际性能上均优于传统方法，适用于时间序列预测和回归等多样化任务。

authors_text: Abdus Salam Azad,Edward Kim,Qiancheng Wu,Kimin Lee,Ion Stoica,Pieter Abbeel,Sanjit A. Seshia
title: Scenic4RL: Programmatic Modeling and Generation of Reinforcement Learning Environments
title_zh: Scenic4RL：强化学习环境的程序化建模和生成
comment: First two authors contributed equally. The final version of this paper is accepted at Proceedings of the AAAI Conference on Artificial Intelligence, 36(6), 6028-6036. https://doi.org/10.1609/aaai.v36i6.20549
comments: First two authors contributed equally. The final version of this paper is accepted at Proceedings of the AAAI Conference on Artificial Intelligence, 36(6), 6028-6036. https://doi.org/10.1609/aaai.v36i6.20549
abstract: The capability of a reinforcement learning (RL) agent heavily depends on the diversity of the learning scenarios generated by the environment. Generation of diverse realistic scenarios is challenging for real-time strategy (RTS) environments. The RTS environments are characterized by intelligent entities/non-RL agents cooperating and competing with the RL agents with large state and action spaces over a long period of time, resulting in an infinite space of feasible, but not necessarily realistic, scenarios involving complex interaction among different RL and non-RL agents. Yet, most of the existing simulators rely on randomly generating the environments based on predefined settings/layouts and offer limited flexibility and control over the environment dynamics for researchers to generate diverse, realistic scenarios as per their demand. To address this issue, for the first time, we formally introduce the benefits of adopting an existing formal scenario specification language, SCENIC, to assist researchers to model and generate diverse scenarios in an RTS environment in a flexible, systematic, and programmatic manner. To showcase the benefits, we interfaced SCENIC to an existing RTS environment Google Research Football(GRF) simulator and introduced a benchmark consisting of 32 realistic scenarios, encoded in SCENIC, to train RL agents and testing their generalization capabilities. We also show how researchers/RL practitioners can incorporate their domain knowledge to expedite the training process by intuitively modeling stochastic programmatic policies with SCENIC.
summary: The capability of a reinforcement learning (RL) agent heavily depends on the diversity of the learning scenarios generated by the environment. Generation of diverse realistic scenarios is challenging for real-time strategy (RTS) environments. The RTS environments are characterized by intelligent entities/non-RL agents cooperating and competing with the RL agents with large state and action spaces over a long period of time, resulting in an infinite space of feasible, but not necessarily realistic, scenarios involving complex interaction among different RL and non-RL agents. Yet, most of the existing simulators rely on randomly generating the environments based on predefined settings/layouts and offer limited flexibility and control over the environment dynamics for researchers to generate diverse, realistic scenarios as per their demand. To address this issue, for the first time, we formally introduce the benefits of adopting an existing formal scenario specification language, SCENIC, to assist researchers to model and generate diverse scenarios in an RTS environment in a flexible, systematic, and programmatic manner. To showcase the benefits, we interfaced SCENIC to an existing RTS environment Google Research Football(GRF) simulator and introduced a benchmark consisting of 32 realistic scenarios, encoded in SCENIC, to train RL agents and testing their generalization capabilities. We also show how researchers/RL practitioners can incorporate their domain knowledge to expedite the training process by intuitively modeling stochastic programmatic policies with SCENIC.
abstract_zh: 强化学习（RL）代理的能力在很大程度上取决于环境生成的学习场景的多样性。对于实时策略 (RTS) 环境来说，生成多样化的现实场景具有挑战性。 RTS环境的特点是智能实体/非强化学习智能体在很长一段时间内与具有大状态和动作空间的强化学习智能体合作和竞争，从而产生无限的可行但不一定现实的场景空间，涉及不同强化学习和非强化学习智能体之间的复杂交互。然而，大多数现有的模拟器依赖于根据预定义的设置/布局随机生成环境，并且为研究人员提供有限的灵活性和对环境动态的控制来根据他们的需求生成多样化的、现实的场景。为了解决这个问题，我们首次正式介绍了采用现有的正式场景规范语言SCENIC的好处，以帮助研究人员以灵活、系统和程序化的方式在RTS环境中建模和生成各种场景。为了展示这些优势，我们将 SCENIC 与现有的 RTS 环境 Google Research Football (GRF) 模拟器连接，并引入了由 32 个现实场景组成的基准（在 SCENIC 中编码），以训练 RL 代理并测试其泛化能力。我们还展示了研究人员/RL 从业者如何通过使用 SCENIC 直观地建模随机编程策略来整合他们的领域知识来加快训练过程。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Scenic4RL框架，通过集成SCENIC语言程序化生成多样化强化学习环境，以提升实时策略游戏中的研究灵活性。
AI.motivation: 现有RL环境生成工具缺乏对复杂交互场景的控制能力，难以满足研究者对多样化、真实场景的需求。
AI.method: 将SCENIC场景描述语言接入Google Research Football模拟器，构建包含32个真实场景的基准测试集，并通过程序化策略建模提升训练效率。
AI.result: 验证了SCENIC在场景生成中的有效性，展示了领域知识融入对RL代理泛化能力的提升作用。
AI.conclusion: 程序化场景建模方法为RL环境设计提供了系统化解决方案，有助于加速算法研究与应用落地。

search_text: Scenic4RL: Programmatic Modeling and Generation of Reinforcement Learning Environments Scenic4RL：强化学习环境的程序化建模和生成 The capability of a reinforcement learning (RL) agent heavily depends on the diversity of the learning scenarios generated by the environment. Generation of diverse realistic scenarios is challenging for real-time strategy (RTS) environments. The RTS environments are characterized by intelligent entities/non-RL agents cooperating and competing with the RL agents with large state and action spaces over a long period of time, resulting in an infinite space of feasible, but not necessarily realistic, scenarios involving complex interaction among different RL and non-RL agents. Yet, most of the existing simulators rely on randomly generating the environments based on predefined settings/layouts and offer limited flexibility and control over the environment dynamics for researchers to generate diverse, realistic scenarios as per their demand. To address this issue, for the first time, we formally introduce the benefits of adopting an existing formal scenario specification language, SCENIC, to assist researchers to model and generate diverse scenarios in an RTS environment in a flexible, systematic, and programmatic manner. To showcase the benefits, we interfaced SCENIC to an existing RTS environment Google Research Football(GRF) simulator and introduced a benchmark consisting of 32 realistic scenarios, encoded in SCENIC, to train RL agents and testing their generalization capabilities. We also show how researchers/RL practitioners can incorporate their domain knowledge to expedite the training process by intuitively modeling stochastic programmatic policies with SCENIC. 强化学习（RL）代理的能力在很大程度上取决于环境生成的学习场景的多样性。对于实时策略 (RTS) 环境来说，生成多样化的现实场景具有挑战性。 RTS环境的特点是智能实体/非强化学习智能体在很长一段时间内与具有大状态和动作空间的强化学习智能体合作和竞争，从而产生无限的可行但不一定现实的场景空间，涉及不同强化学习和非强化学习智能体之间的复杂交互。然而，大多数现有的模拟器依赖于根据预定义的设置/布局随机生成环境，并且为研究人员提供有限的灵活性和对环境动态的控制来根据他们的需求生成多样化的、现实的场景。为了解决这个问题，我们首次正式介绍了采用现有的正式场景规范语言SCENIC的好处，以帮助研究人员以灵活、系统和程序化的方式在RTS环境中建模和生成各种场景。为了展示这些优势，我们将 SCENIC 与现有的 RTS 环境 Google Research Football (GRF) 模拟器连接，并引入了由 32 个现实场景组成的基准（在 SCENIC 中编码），以训练 RL 代理并测试其泛化能力。我们还展示了研究人员/RL 从业者如何通过使用 SCENIC 直观地建模随机编程策略来整合他们的领域知识来加快训练过程。 本文提出Scenic4RL框架，通过集成SCENIC语言程序化生成多样化强化学习环境，以提升实时策略游戏中的研究灵活性。 Abdus Salam Azad,Edward Kim,Qiancheng Wu,Kimin Lee,Ion Stoica,Pieter Abbeel,Sanjit A. Seshia cs.LG,cs.AI

title: Direct Reconstruction of Linear Parametric Images from Dynamic PET Using Nonlocal Deep Image Prior
title_zh: 使用非局部深度图像先验从动态 PET 直接重建线性参数图像
abstract: Direct reconstruction methods have been developed to estimate parametric images directly from the measured PET sinograms by combining the PET imaging model and tracer kinetics in an integrated framework. Due to limited counts received, signal-to-noise-ratio (SNR) and resolution of parametric images produced by direct reconstruction frameworks are still limited. Recently supervised deep learning methods have been successfully applied to medical imaging denoising/reconstruction when large number of high-quality training labels are available. For static PET imaging, high-quality training labels can be acquired by extending the scanning time. However, this is not feasible for dynamic PET imaging, where the scanning time is already long enough. In this work, we proposed an unsupervised deep learning framework for direct parametric reconstruction from dynamic PET, which was tested on the Patlak model and the relative equilibrium Logan model. The patient's anatomical prior image, which is readily available from PET/CT or PET/MR scans, was supplied as the network input to provide a manifold constraint, and also utilized to construct a kernel layer to perform non-local feature denoising. The linear kinetic model was embedded in the network structure as a 1x1 convolution layer. The training objective function was based on the PET statistical model. Evaluations based on dynamic datasets of 18F-FDG and 11C-PiB tracers show that the proposed framework can outperform the traditional and the kernel method-based direct reconstruction methods.
summary: Direct reconstruction methods have been developed to estimate parametric images directly from the measured PET sinograms by combining the PET imaging model and tracer kinetics in an integrated framework. Due to limited counts received, signal-to-noise-ratio (SNR) and resolution of parametric images produced by direct reconstruction frameworks are still limited. Recently supervised deep learning methods have been successfully applied to medical imaging denoising/reconstruction when large number of high-quality training labels are available. For static PET imaging, high-quality training labels can be acquired by extending the scanning time. However, this is not feasible for dynamic PET imaging, where the scanning time is already long enough. In this work, we proposed an unsupervised deep learning framework for direct parametric reconstruction from dynamic PET, which was tested on the Patlak model and the relative equilibrium Logan model. The patient's anatomical prior image, which is readily available from PET/CT or PET/MR scans, was supplied as the network input to provide a manifold constraint, and also utilized to construct a kernel layer to perform non-local feature denoising. The linear kinetic model was embedded in the network structure as a 1x1 convolution layer. The training objective function was based on the PET statistical model. Evaluations based on dynamic datasets of 18F-FDG and 11C-PiB tracers show that the proposed framework can outperform the traditional and the kernel method-based direct reconstruction methods.
abstract_zh: 直接重建方法已经被开发出来，通过将 PET 成像模型和示踪动力学结合在一个集成框架中，直接根据测量的 PET 正弦图估计参数图像。由于收到的计数有限，直接重建框架生成的参数图像的信噪比 (SNR) 和分辨率仍然有限。当有大量高质量的训练标签可用时，最近的监督深度学习方法已成功应用于医学成像去噪/重建。对于静态PET成像，可以通过延长扫描时间来获取高质量的训练标签。然而，这对于扫描时间已经足够长的动态 PET 成像来说是不可行的。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种用于动态 PET 直接参数重建的无监督深度学习框架，并在 Patlak 模型和相对平衡 Logan 模型上进行了测试。可以从 PET/CT 或 PET/MR 扫描中轻松获得患者的先前解剖图像，将其作为网络输入提供以提供流形约束，并且还用于构建内核层以执行非局部特征去噪。线性动力学模型作为 1x1 卷积层嵌入到网络结构中。训练目标函数基于PET统计模型。基于 18F-FDG 和 11C-PiB 示踪剂动态数据集的评估表明，所提出的框架可以优于传统的和基于核方法的直接重建方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于非局部深度图像先验的无监督深度学习框架，用于直接从动态PET数据重建线性参数图像。
AI.motivation: 现有直接重建方法生成的参数图像信噪比和分辨率有限，且动态PET缺乏足够高质量的训练标签，传统监督学习难以应用。
AI.method: 利用患者解剖先验图像作为网络输入，构建非局部核层进行特征去噪，将线性动力学模型嵌入为1x1卷积层，并基于PET统计模型设计训练目标函数。
AI.result: 在18F-FDG和11C-PiB动态数据集上的实验表明，该框架优于传统直接重建方法和基于核方法的重建方法。
AI.conclusion: 提出的无监督深度学习框架无需标注数据即可提升动态PET参数图像的重建质量，为低计数场景提供有效解决方案。
